title: Mitigating Cross-Lingual Cultural Inconsistencies in LLMs via Consensus-Driven Preference Optimisation
summary: Despite their impressive capabilities, multilingual large language models (MLLMs) frequently exhibit inconsistent behaviour when the prompt's language changes. While such adaptation is generally desirable, it becomes a critical failure when a user's identity is explicitly defined. For instance, given a fixed British persona and an ambiguous everyday knowledge query about literature, the prompt's language frequently overwrites the system persona -- yielding Shakespeare in English but Cervantes in Spanish. To robustly quantify this Cross-lingual Cultural Inconsistency, we introduce Singleton Fleiss's $κ_S$, a metric mathematically resilient to hallucinations. For mitigation, we propose Cross-lingual Cultural Consistent Preference Optimisation (C-3PO), a consensus-driven alignment framework. C-3PO achieves up to a 0.10-point absolute increase in $κ_S$ over unaligned models, outperforming strong prompting and representation steering baselines. Empirical evaluations show this inconsistency disproportionately affects lower-resource languages like Indonesian and Persian. A layer-wise interpretability analysis reveals the underlying mechanism: by early-decoding intermediate layer representations, we find that MLLMs implicitly personalise outputs towards the prompt language's stereotypical culture as forward-pass representations stabilise.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多语言大模型(MLLMs)在提示语言变化时会出现跨语言文化不一致问题（如英国人物角色下英语提示输出莎士比亚，西班牙语提示输出塞万提斯），为此提出Singleton Fleiss's κ_S指标进行稳健量化，并采用跨语言文化一致性偏好优化(C-3PO)框架进行对齐缓解，最高提升κ_S达0.10，消歧分析揭示了模型隐式个性化输出的机制。
AI.motivation: 多语言大模型虽能力强大，但在提示语言改变时行为不一致，尤其是在用户身份已明确设定的情况下，提示语言会覆盖系统设定的角色文化背景，导致输出严重偏离预期，这一问题在低资源语言上尤为突出。
AI.method: 1)提出Singleton Fleiss's κ_S指标来稳健量化跨语言文化不一致性，该指标对幻觉具有数学鲁棒性；2)提出跨语言文化一致性偏好优化(C-3PO)框架，一种基于共识驱动的对齐方法；3)采用逐层可解释性分析，通过早期解码中间层表示来揭示机制。
AI.result: C-3PO在κ_S指标上相比未对齐模型提升高达0.10绝对值，优于强提示方法和表示引导基线；跨语言文化不一致性对低资源语言（如印尼语和波斯语）影响尤为严重。
AI.conclusion: 多语言大模型存在系统性的跨语言文化不一致问题，C-3PO能有效缓解；模型在前向传播过程中会隐式地将输出向提示语言的刻板文化方向个性化。

title: Domain Adaptation of Large Language Models for Polymer-Composite Additive Manufacturing Using Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Fine-Tuning
summary: General-purpose large language models (LLMs) often struggle to generate reliable responses in specialized engineering domains due to limited domain grounding and insufficient exposure to structured technical knowledge. This study investigates practical strategies for adapting a foundation LLM to the additive manufacturing (AM) domain in order to improve answer accuracy, relevance, and usability for expert-level question answering. AM knowledge is distributed across heterogeneous sources such as academic literature, manufacturer documentation, technical standards, and procedural guides. Although general LLMs demonstrate strong linguistic capabilities, they frequently fail to retrieve and contextualize such domain-specific information. Two common approaches to address this limitation are domain-specific fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We construct a curated AM corpus and evaluate three configurations based on LLaMA-3-8B: (1) the pretrained baseline model, (2) a RAG system that retrieves relevant document chunks from a vector database, and (3) a model fine-tuned on raw domain text. Performance is evaluated using 200 expert-designed AM questions assessed by mechanical engineering experts for accuracy, relevance, and overall preference. Results show that the RAG model consistently outperforms the baseline. Among the 200 questions, 75.5% of RAG responses are judged more accurate, 85.2% are preferred overall, and 90.8% are rated more relevant than baseline responses. In contrast, fine-tuning on raw AM text reduces performance, producing more accurate answers in only 5.6% of cases and more relevant answers in 32.5% of cases. These results indicate that retrieval-augmented approaches provide a more effective pathway for adapting LLMs to specialized engineering domains than naive fine-tuning on unstructured technical data.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了检索增强生成（RAG）与领域微调两种策略，在将通用大语言模型（LLaMA-3-8B）适配至增材制造（AM）专业领域的效果。实验表明，RAG在75.5%的问题中更准确，85.2%更受专家青睐，90.8%相关性更高；而直接在原始领域文本上微调反而降低了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在专业工程领域（如增材制造）因缺乏领域知识和结构化技术信息，难以生成可靠回答。研究者希望探索有效的适配策略来提升模型在该领域的专业问答能力。
AI.method: 构建AM领域语料库，基于LLaMA-3-8B设置三种配置：（1）预训练基线模型；（2）RAG系统（从向量数据库检索相关文档块）；（3）在原始领域文本上微调的模型。使用200个专家设计的AM问题，由机械工程专家评估准确性、相关性和总体偏好。
AI.result: RAG模型显著优于基线：75.5%的回答更准确，85.2%更受偏好，90.8%相关性更高。而微调模型表现更差，仅5.6%的回答更准确，32.5%更相关。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强方法（RAG）是适配LLM至专业工程领域的更有效路径，优于在非结构化技术数据上的朴素微调。

title: Bridging the Missing-Modality Gap: Improving Text-Only Calibration of Vision Language Models
comment: 9 pages, 16 figures. Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Principled Design for Trustworthy AI: Interpretability, Robustness, and Safety across Modalities
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are often deployed on text-only inputs, although they are trained with images. We find that removing the vision modality causes large drops in accuracy and severe miscalibration, and the model does not behave like its original language backbone under text-only prompting. This failure is not explained only by missing semantic information. Even when text descriptions preserve key content, confidence becomes unreliable, while adding a visual signal through generated images partially restores accuracy and calibration. We propose the Latent Imagination Module (LIM), a lightweight cross-attention module that predicts imagined latent embeddings from textual input and feeds them into a frozen VLM backbone without pixel-level image synthesis. Across text-only benchmarks, unseen tasks, and missing-image scenarios, LIM improves accuracy and reduces calibration error. These results suggest that latent modality completion is a practical approach for reliable VLM inference under missing-modality.

AI.tldr: 当视觉-语言模型(VLM)仅接收文本输入时，性能会显著下降且校准严重失准。本文提出潜想象模块(LIM)，通过从文本输入预测想象的潜嵌入并注入冻结的VLM骨干网络，无需像素级图像合成即可改善准确率和校准误差。
AI.motivation: VLM在实际部署中常面临缺少图像的情况（只有文本输入），但直接移除视觉模态会导致严重的准确率下降和校准失准。这种失败不仅源于语义信息缺失，即使文本描述保留了关键内容，模型的置信度也变得不可靠。
AI.method: 提出潜想象模块(LIM)，一个轻量级跨注意力模块，能够从纯文本输入中预测"想象出的"潜层嵌入，并将其注入到冻结的VLM骨干网络中，无需进行像素级的图像生成。
AI.result: 在纯文本基准、未见任务和缺失图像场景下，LIM提升了准确率并降低了校准误差。此外，通过生成图像来添加视觉信号可以部分恢复准确率和校准性能，但LIM直接操作潜空间更为高效。
AI.conclusion: 潜模态补全（latent modality completion）是一种在缺失模态情况下实现可靠VLM推理的实用方法。

title: Beyond Centralization: User-Controlled Federated Recommendations in Practice
summary: Recommendation systems typically require centralized user data, limiting user control and raising privacy concerns. Federated learning offers an alternative by keeping data on-device, but its impact on real user behavior remains largely unexplored. We present a live federated recommender system that allows users to control the recommendation objective while keeping their data local. In a 53-day deployment with 22 participants and a catalog of 8807 titles, users interacted with recommendations and switched between personalization and diversity-enhanced ranking. We find that users prefer personalization when given explicit choice (65.37\% vs.\ 62.07\% CTR), actively engage with control mechanisms (3.93/5 satisfaction; 248 settings changes), and develop an understanding of how their interactions affect recommendations through immediate feedback. Our results show that user control, privacy, and effective personalization can be combined in a working system. We demonstrate a practical approach to interactive, privacy-preserving recommendation. Code and demo materials are available at: https://github.com/SlokomManel/federated-recommendations-participants

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个联邦推荐系统，在真实用户部署中验证了用户控制、隐私保护和个性化推荐可以共存。22名参与者在53天内与8807个标题互动，结果显示用户偏好个性化（点击率65.37% vs 多样性62.07%），对控制机制满意度高（3.93/5），并理解交互行为对推荐的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统依赖集中式用户数据，限制用户控制权并引发隐私担忧。联邦学习虽能保护隐私，但对其在真实用户行为中的影响研究不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个实时联邦推荐系统，用户数据保留在本地设备上，用户可自主切换个性化与多样性增强排序。在53天内对22名参与者进行部署，包含8807个标题的目录。
AI.result: 用户明确选择时更偏好个性化（点击率65.37% vs 62.07%）；用户积极参与控制机制（满意度3.93/5，调整设置248次）；通过即时反馈理解了交互如何影响推荐。
AI.conclusion: 用户控制、隐私保护和有效个性化可以融合在实际系统中，提供了一种交互式、隐私保护的推荐方法。

title: TimelineReasoner: Advancing Timeline Summarization with Large Reasoning Models
summary: The proliferation of online news poses a challenge to extracting structured timelines from unstructured content. While recent studies have shown that Large Language Models (LLMs) can assist Timeline Summarization (TLS), these approaches primarily treat models as passive generators. The emergence of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) presents an opportunity to reason over events actively, enabling iterative evidence acquisition, the detection of missing events, and the validation of temporal consistency. To systematically leverage the reasoning capabilities of LRMs, we propose TimelineReasoner, a novel framework that shifts TLS from static generation to an active, reasoning-driven process. Unlike prior work, TimelineReasoner adopts a two-stage framework: Global Cognition, which tracks events at a macroscopic level and continuously updates a global event memory, and Detail Exploration, which identifies informational gaps and refines the timeline via targeted document retrieval. To support this, TimelineReasoner incorporates several specialized mechanisms, including an Event Scraper for retrieving temporal event descriptions, a Timeline Updater for refining the timeline, and a Supervisor for detecting gaps in the timeline and guiding retrieval. Experimental results on open-domain TLS datasets demonstrate that TimelineReasoner significantly outperforms existing LLM-based TLS methods in terms of timeline accuracy, coverage, and coherence. On closed-domain TLS datasets, our method performs on par with or exceeds state-of-the-art approaches. This work not only pushes the boundaries of TLS but also highlights the broader potential of LRM-based reasoning frameworks for timeline summarization.

AI.tldr: 提出TimelineReasoner框架，利用大型推理模型（LRM）将时间线摘要从静态生成转变为主动推理驱动过程，通过全局认知和细节探索两阶段机制，在开放域和封闭域数据集上均取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法在时间线摘要任务中仅作为被动生成器，缺乏主动推理和事件验证能力，难以应对海量在线新闻中结构化时间线提取的挑战。
AI.method: 提出TimelineReasoner框架，包含两阶段：1) 全局认知——宏观追踪事件并持续更新全局事件记忆；2) 细节探索——识别信息缺口并通过目标文档检索完善时间线。内置Event Scraper、Timeline Updater、Supervisor等专用机制。
AI.result: 在开放域TLS数据集上，TimelineReasoner在时间线准确性、覆盖度和连贯性上显著优于现有LLM方法；在封闭域数据集上达到或超越当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅推动了时间线摘要任务的边界，还展示了基于LRM的推理框架在该领域的广阔潜力。

title: MLPs are Efficient Distilled Generative Recommenders
summary: Generative recommendation models employing Semantic IDs (SIDs) exhibit strong potential, yet their practical deployment is bottlenecked by the high inference latency of beam-expanded autoregressive decoding. In this work, we identify that standard attention-heavy Transformer decoders represent a structural overkill for this task: the hierarchical nature of SIDs makes prediction difficulty drops sharply after the first token, rendering repeated attention computations highly redundant. Driven by this insight, we propose SID-MLP, a lightweight MLP-centric distillation framework that fundamentally simplifies the decoding paradigm for GR. Instead of executing complex, step-by-step attention mechanisms, our approach captures the global user context in a single operation, decoupled from sequential token prediction. We then distill the heavy autoregressive teacher into position-specific MLP heads, eliminating the dense attention overhead while preserving prefix and context dependencies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SID-MLP matches the accuracy of teacher models while accelerating inference by 8.74x. Crucially, this distillation strategy can serve as a plug-and-play accelerator for different backbones and tokenizer settings. Furthermore, we introduce SID-MLP++, extending our distillation framework to replace the Transformer encoder, unlocking further latency reductions. Ultimately, our work reveals that decoder-side MLPs distillation is an effective acceleration path for structured SID recommendation, while full encoder replacement offers an additional speed--accuracy trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SID-MLP，一个轻量级MLP蒸馏框架，通过将重自回归Transformer解码器蒸馏为位置特定MLP头，在保持推荐精度的同时实现8.74倍推理加速，并可作为即插即用加速器。进一步扩展的SID-MLP++还替换了Transformer编码器，提供速度-精度权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐模型使用语义ID（SIDs）虽潜力巨大，但波束扩展自回归解码的高推理延迟成为实际部署的瓶颈。标准注意力密集的Transformer解码器对于SIDs分层结构存在计算冗余——首token后预测难度急剧下降，重复注意力计算高度冗余。
AI.method: 提出SID-MLP蒸馏框架：(1) 将全局用户上下文捕获与序列token预测解耦为单一操作；(2) 将重自回归教师模型蒸馏为位置特定MLP头，消除密集注意力开销同时保留前缀和上下文依赖。进一步扩展SID-MLP++替换Transformer编码器。
AI.result: SID-MLP在保持与教师模型相同精度的前提下，实现8.74倍推理加速。该蒸馏策略可作为即插即用加速器适用于不同主干网络和分词器设置。SID-MLP++在替换编码器后进一步降低延迟，但存在速度-精度权衡。
AI.conclusion: 工作揭示了解码器侧MLP蒸馏是结构化SID推荐的有效加速路径，而全编码器替换提供了额外的速度-精度权衡选择。

title: FiTS: Interpretable Spiking Neurons via Frequency Selectivity and Temporal Shaping
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are a promising framework for event-driven temporal processing. Prior work has improved temporal modeling through richer neuron dynamics and network-level mechanisms such as recurrence and delays, but it remains unclear how individual spiking neurons should specialize within a network. In this work, we introduce FiTS, a spiking neuron that factorizes temporal computation within each neuron into Frequency Selectivity (FS) and Temporal Shaping (TS). The FS module parameterizes each neuron's target frequency as the maximizer of its subthreshold magnitude response, while the TS module reshapes when frequency components contribute to membrane voltage accumulation through group-delay modulation. On auditory benchmarks where frequency selectivity and timing are central to the input structure, FiTS consistently improves over a plain Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) baseline in simple feedforward SNNs without recurrence or network-level delays, while remaining competitive with strong temporal SNN baselines. Beyond accuracy, the learned target frequencies and group-delay shifts provide interpretable neuron-level summaries of the frequency and timing organization learned within the network.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FiTS脉冲神经元，通过频率选择性（FS）和时间塑造（TS）两个模块分解每个神经元内的时序计算，在听觉任务中无需循环或网络级延迟即可提升性能，并提供可解释的频率与时间组织分析。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN通过更丰富的神经元动力学和网络级机制（如循环、延迟）改进时序建模，但单个脉冲神经元如何在网络内进行专门化分工尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出FiTS神经元，分解为频率选择性（FS）模块和目标频率的亚阈值幅值响应最大化，以及时间塑造（TS）模块通过群延迟调制调整频率分量对膜电位积累的贡献时机。
AI.result: 在听觉基准上，FiTS在前馈SNN中持续优于普通LIF基线，与强时序SNN基线竞争力相当；此外，学习到的目标频率和群延迟偏移提供了网络中频率与时间组织的可解释神经元级摘要。
AI.conclusion: FiTS通过神经元内部分解时序计算，实现了无需递归或网络级延迟的优越性能，同时具备可解释性。

title: Scale-Gest: Scalable Model-Space Synthesis and Runtime Selection for On-Device Gesture Detection
summary: Realizing on-device ML-based gesture detection under tight real-time performance, energy and memory constraints is challenging, especially when considering mobile devices with varying battery-power levels. Existing EdgeAI deployments typically rely on a single fixed detector, limiting optimization opportunities. We present Scale-Gest, a novel run-time adaptive gesture detection framework that expands the detector space into a dense family of tiny-YOLO architectures. We introduce multiple novel device-calibrated ACE (Accuracy-Complexity-Energy) profiles by analyzing different model-resolution-stride operating points. A lightweight run-time controller selects an appropriate ACE mode under user-defined and battery constraints, while a motion-aware hand-gesture-tracking ROI gate crops the input for reduced complexity detection. To evaluate performance of our system in real-world car driving scenarios, we introduce a temporally-annotated Driver Simulated Gesture (DSG-18) dataset. Scale-Gest maintains event-level F1 while significantly reducing energy and latency compared to single-detector approaches. On a battery-powered laptop running gesture streams, our ACE controller reduces per-frame energy by 4x (from 6.9 mJ to 1.6 mJ) while maintaining high gesture-detection performance (event-level F1 = 0.8-0.9) and low mean latency (6 ms).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scale-Gest，一个运行时自适应的手势检测框架，通过密集的tiny-YOLO架构家族、多组ACE（精度-复杂度-能耗）配置文件和运行时控制器，在电池供电设备上实现4倍能耗降低（6.9mJ→1.6mJ）的同时保持高手势检测性能（F1=0.8-0.9）和低延迟（6ms）。
AI.motivation: 现有EdgeAI部署通常依赖单一的固定检测器，无法在不同电池电量水平下优化能效与性能的权衡，难以满足移动设备上ML手势检测对实时性、能耗和内存的严苛约束。
AI.method: 1) 将检测器空间扩展为密集的tiny-YOLO架构家族；2) 分析不同模型-分辨率-步长操作点，生成设备校准的ACE（精度-复杂度-能耗）配置；3) 设计轻量级运行时控制器，根据用户定义约束和电池状态选择合适ACE模式；4) 引入运动感知的手势跟踪ROI门控，裁剪输入以降低检测复杂度。
AI.result: 在电池供电笔记本上，每帧能耗从6.9mJ降至1.6mJ（4倍降低），事件级F1保持在0.8-0.9，平均延迟仅6ms。同时引入了一个新的时序标注数据集DSG-18（驾驶员模拟手势）。
AI.conclusion: Scale-Gest通过运行时自适应机制显著优于单一固定检测器方法，在保持高检测性能的同时大幅降低能耗和延迟，为移动设备上的手势检测提供了一种高效的解决方案。

title: Fine-Tuning Models for Automated Code Review Feedback
summary: Large Language Models have introduced new possibilities for programming education through personalized support, content creation, and automated feedback. While recent studies have demonstrated the potential for feedback generation, many techniques rely on proprietary models, raising concerns about cost, computational demands, and the ethical implications of sharing student code. Open LLMs provide an alternative approach, but they do not currently have the capabilities of proprietary models. To address this problem, we investigate whether parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and prompt engineering, both of which distil knowledge from a dataset derived from a large, more capable model, can be used to adapt and enhance the quality of feedback generated by the open LLM Code Llama. Feedback quality on buggy Java code was assessed using a combination of student evaluation, manual annotation and the automated metrics BLEU, ROUGE, and BERTScore. Our findings indicate that PEFT leads to notable improvements in feedback quality and significantly outperforms prompt engineering, providing an avenue for developing freely deployable feedback tools that can be effectively used to guide student learning. Student evaluation indicates that learners value the PEFT model's feedback and see it as being equally effective as the proprietary ChatGPT model. Participants suggested that incorporating additional explanation for technical terms in the PEFT model's feedback could be more beneficial. This study demonstrates that fine-tuned models can effectively support critical thinking and guide the design of scalable pedagogical systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了参数高效微调（PEFT）和提示工程两种方法在开源LLM（Code Llama）上提升编程反馈质量的效果，发现PEFT显著优于提示工程，其反馈质量可与ChatGPT媲美。
AI.motivation: 现有编程教育中的反馈生成多依赖专有模型，存在成本高、计算需求大、学生代码隐私泄露等伦理问题。开源LLM虽可替代，但能力不足。因此需要探索如何通过PEFT和提示工程来提升开源模型的反馈质量。
AI.method: 使用PEFT和提示工程技术，从更大、更强模型中蒸馏知识，对开源LLM Code Llama进行微调和优化。反馈质量通过学生评估、人工标注以及BLEU、ROUGE、BERTScore等自动指标综合评估。
AI.result: PEFT显著提升了反馈质量，大幅优于提示工程；学生认为PEFT模型的反馈与专有ChatGPT模型同样有效；参与者建议在PEFT模型反馈中增加技术术语的解释会更有帮助。
AI.conclusion: 微调后的模型能有效支持编程教育中的批判性思维培养，为开发可自由部署的反馈工具和可扩展的教学系统提供了可行路径。

title: Think Twice, Act Once: Verifier-Guided Action Selection For Embodied Agents
summary: Building generalist embodied agents capable of solving complex real-world tasks remains a fundamental challenge in AI. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of such agents through strong vision-language knowledge and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet remain brittle when faced with challenging out-of-distribution scenarios. To address this, we propose Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VegAS), a test-time framework designed to improve the robustness of MLLM-based embodied agents through an explicit verification step. At inference time, rather than committing to a single decoded action, VeGAS samples an ensemble of candidate actions and uses a generative verifier to identify the most reliable choice, without modifying the underlying policy. Crucially, we find that using an MLLM off-the-shelf as a verifier yields no improvement, motivating our LLM-driven data synthesis strategy, which automatically constructs a diverse curriculum of failure cases to expose the verifier to a rich distribution of potential errors at training time. Across embodied reasoning benchmarks spanning the Habitat and ALFRED environments, VeGAS consistently improves generalization, achieving up to a 36% relative performance gain over strong CoT baselines on the most challenging multi-object, long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: VeGAS是一个测试时框架，通过生成式验证器从候选动作集合中筛选最优动作，提升基于多模态大模型的具身智能体的鲁棒性和泛化能力，在Habitat和ALFRED基准上最高提升36%性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型增强了具身智能体的推理能力，但在分布外场景下表现脆弱，现有方法缺乏有效的验证机制来确保动作选择的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VeGAS)框架：1）推理时采样候选动作集合；2）使用生成式验证器筛选最优动作；3）通过LLM驱动的数据合成策略自动构建多样化失败案例课程来训练验证器。
AI.result: 在Habitat和ALFRED环境的具身推理基准上，VeGAS持续提升泛化能力，在最具挑战性的多目标、长时域任务上相比强CoT基线实现最高36%的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: VeGAS通过显式的验证步骤有效提升了MLLM-based具身智能体的鲁棒性，且无需修改底层策略；直接使用现成MLLM作为验证器无效，需要专门的数据合成训练策略。

title: Learning When to Act: Communication-Efficient Reinforcement Learning via Run-Time Assurance
summary: Safe reinforcement learning (RL) typically asks $\textit{what}$ an agent should do. We ask $\textit{when}$ it needs to act, and show that a single policy can jointly learn control inputs and communication-efficient timing decisions under a pointwise Lyapunov safety shield. We focus on stabilization around a known equilibrium, where CARE-based LQR backups, Lyapunov certificates, and classical Lyapunov-STC are well defined, enabling clean comparison against analytical baselines. A run-time assurance (RTA) layer overrides the policy via a one-step-ahead Lyapunov prediction and a precomputed LQR backup, providing a strictly stronger guarantee than constrained MDP methods that enforce safety only in expectation. On an inverted pendulum, cart--pole, and planar quadrotor, the learned policy achieves $1.91\times$, $1.45\times$, and $3.51\times$ higher mean inter-sample interval (MSI) than a Lyapunov-triggered baseline; a fixed LQR controller at the same average rate is unstable on all three plants, showing that adaptive timing, not a lower average rate, makes sparsity safe. A CARE-derived Lyapunov reward transfers across environments without redesign, with a single weight $w_c$ controlling the stability--communication tradeoff; ablations confirm the RTA shield is essential, with its removal reducing MSI by $1.27$--$1.84\times$ and degrading state norms. A preference-conditioned extension recovers the full tradeoff frontier from one model at $\tfrac{2}{11}$ of training compute, and SAC experiments show the results are algorithm-agnostic across discrete and continuous domains. A 12-state 3D quadrotor case study extends the framework to higher-dimensional systems where classical STC is intractable, and robustness to $\pm30\%$ mass variation and disturbances shows graceful degradation, with the RTA absorbing what the learned policy cannot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"何时行动"而非"如何行动"的安全强化学习框架，通过点李雅普诺夫安全屏蔽层联合学习控制输入与通信高效的时序决策，在倒立摆、小车-摆杆和平面四旋翼上分别实现1.91倍、1.45倍和3.51倍的采样间隔提升，且LQR固定控制器在相同平均采样率下不稳定，证明自适应时序而非低平均率保障了稀疏控制的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统安全强化学习关注代理"应该做什么"，但忽略了"何时需要行动"这一关键问题。本文旨在为安全强化学习引入通信高效的时序决策能力，在保证李雅普诺夫稳定性的同时最大化采样间隔。
AI.method: 提出基于CARE的LQR备份、点李雅普诺夫安全屏蔽层（RTA）和一步前瞻李雅普诺夫预测的联合学习框架，同时学习控制输入与时序决策。采用CARE导出的李雅普诺夫奖励函数实现跨环境迁移，并扩展出偏好条件变体以恢复完整权衡前沿。
AI.result: 在三个物理平台上分别实现1.91倍、1.45倍和3.51倍的采样间隔提升；去除RTA屏蔽层后MSI下降1.27-1.84倍且状态范数恶化；偏好条件扩展用2/11计算量恢复完整前沿；对±30%质量变化和扰动表现出优雅退化。
AI.conclusion: 自适应时序决策而非降低平均采样率才是实现安全稀疏控制的关键；RTA屏蔽层提供比约束MDP更严格的期望安全保障；框架在12维3D四旋翼等更高维系统中仍有效，且结果跨离散/连续域算法无关。

title: Profit Maximization in Bilateral Trade against a Smooth Adversary
summary:
Bilateral trade models the task of intermediating between two strategic agents, a seller and a buyer, who wish to trade a good. We study this problem from the perspective of a profit-maximizing broker within an online learning framework, where the agents' valuations are generated by a smooth adversary.
  We devise a learning algorithm that guarantees a $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret bound, which is tight in the time horizon $T$ up to poly-logarithmic factors. This matches the minimax rate for the stochastic i.i.d. case, and is also well separated from the adversarial setting, where sublinear-regret is unattainable. By extending the strong regret guarantees from the i.i.d. case to the smooth adversary, we significantly broaden the scope of settings where such fast rate is achievable, while closing an important gap in the regret landscape of this fundamental economic problem.
  To overcome the challenges posed by this adversary, we leverage a continuity property of smooth instances and combines this with a hierarchical net-construction of the broker's action space, which is analyzed via algorithmic chaining. We showcase the applicability of these techniques by deriving a similarly tight $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret bound for a related mechanism design model: the joint ads problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双边贸易中利润最大化的中间商在线学习问题，针对平滑对抗环境设计了达到 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ 遗憾界的算法，该界紧致且与随机i.i.d.情形的极小化最优率匹配，并通过分层网络构建和算法链技巧克服了平滑对手带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 将双边贸易问题中经纪人的在线学习遗憾界从随机i.i.d.情形扩展到更广泛的平滑对抗情形，填补了这一基本经济问题在遗憾界格局中的重要空白，并展示相关技术的通用性。
AI.method: 利用平滑实例的连续性特性，结合中间商动作空间的分层网络构建（hierarchical net-construction），并通过算法链（algorithmic chaining）技术进行分析，设计在线学习算法。
AI.result: 提出了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ 遗憾界的算法，该界在时间跨度 $T$ 上紧致（至多相差多对数因子），与随机i.i.d.情形的极小化最优率匹配，且与纯对抗情形（无法实现次线性遗憾）有明确区分。同时将相同遗憾界推广到了联合广告问题（joint ads problem）中。
AI.conclusion: 显著拓宽了可实现快速遗憾率的设置范围，表明从随机i.i.d.情形到平滑对抗情形的遗憾界可以保持强保证，为双边贸易这一基本经济问题建立了更完整的遗憾界格局。

title: Correct Answers from Sound Reasoning: Verifiable Process Supervision for Language Models
summary: Training language models to produce both correct answers and sound reasoning remains an open challenge. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards typically optimizes only final outcomes, which can lead to a failure mode where task accuracy improves while reasoning becomes less accurate, less complete, or even internally inconsistent. We propose verifiable process supervision (VPS), a post-training framework for verifiable domains that jointly optimizes prediction accuracy and reasoning quality. We first apply supervised fine-tuning to induce a structured reasoning format, enabling syntactic extraction of intermediate claims that are evaluated against ground-truth signals to form process-level rewards. To address the heterogeneous difficulty of reasoning subtasks, we introduce adaptive reward weighting that prioritizes components with the largest remaining errors, creating an implicit curriculum. We evaluate VPS on chess, a controlled testbed where reasoning steps can be deterministically verified against engine signals. While accuracy-only RL improves move accuracy, it sharply degrades reasoning quality, increasing win-rate error by up to 112% and reducing internal consistency by up to 69%. In contrast, VPS preserves accuracy while significantly improving reasoning quality, reducing win-rate error by up to 30% and restoring consistency to near saturation. At matched accuracy, judge evaluation also prefers the process-supervised models. A reasoning-space analysis further shows that, without a structured prior, accuracy-only RL converges to budget-dependent shortcuts rather than sound multi-step reasoning. These results show that VPS enables language models to reason both accurately and reliably in verifiable domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可验证过程监督（VPS），一种针对可验证领域的后训练框架，通过结构化推理格式和自适应奖励权重，在提升任务准确性的同时显著改善推理质量。实验表明，仅基于准确率的RL会严重损害推理质量（胜率误差增加112%、内部一致性下降69%），而VPS在保持准确率的同时将胜率误差降低30%，并恢复一致性至接近饱和。该框架使语言模型在可验证领域中实现准确且可靠的推理。
AI.motivation: 现有利用可验证奖励的强化学习通常只优化最终结果，导致一种失败模式：任务准确率提升的同时，推理质量下降（变得不准确、不完整甚至内部不一致）。因此需要一种能同时优化预测准确性和推理质量的框架。
AI.method: 1）通过监督微调诱导结构化推理格式，实现中间声明的语法提取；2）将中间声明与真实信号对比，形成过程级奖励；3）提出自适应奖励加权，优先关注剩余错误最大的推理组件，形成隐式课程学习。
AI.result: 在国际象棋测试中：仅基于准确率的RL使胜率误差增加最多112%，内部一致性下降最多69%；VPS将胜率误差降低最多30%，一致性恢复至接近饱和。在同等准确率下，评审偏好也倾向于过程监督模型。
AI.conclusion: VPS框架能够在可验证领域中使语言模型既保持高准确率又具备高质量的推理能力。证明了缺乏结构化先验时，仅优化准确率的RL会收敛到基于预算的捷径而非合理的多步推理。

title: EcoGEO: Trajectory-Aware Evidence Ecosystems for Web-Enabled LLM Search Agents
summary: Web-enabled LLM agents are changing how online information influences search outcomes. \ Existing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) studies mainly focus on individual webpages. \ However, agentic web search is not a single-document setting: an agent may issue queries, crawl pages, follow links, reformulate searches, and synthesize evidence across multiple browsing steps. \ Influence therefore depends not only on page content, but also on how pages are organized, connected, and encountered along the agent's browsing trajectory. \ We study this shift through \textbf{Ecosystem Generative Engine Optimization} (\textbf{EcoGEO}), which treats GEO as an environment-level influence problem for web-enabled LLM agents. \ To instantiate this perspective, we propose \textbf{TRACE}, a \textbf{Trajectory-Aware Coordinated Evidence Ecosystem}. \ Given a recommendation query and a fictional target product, our method builds a controlled evidence environment that coordinates an agent-facing navigation entry page with heterogeneous support pages. \ These pages use shared terminology, internal links, and consistent product attributes to introduce, verify, and reinforce the target product. We evaluate our method on OPR-Bench, a benchmark for open-ended product recommendation. \ Experiments show that it consistently outperforms page-level GEO baselines in final target recommendation. \ Trajectory-level metrics further show increased initial target-result crawls, target-specific follow-up searches, and internal-link crawls, suggesting that the gains come from shaping the agent's evidence-acquisition process rather than merely adding more target-related content. \ Overall, our findings support an ecosystem research paradigm for GEO, where web-enabled LLM agents are studied in relation to the broader evidence environments that guide search, browsing, and answer synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EcoGEO（生态系统级生成引擎优化），将GEO从单页面优化提升到环境级影响力问题，并设计了TRACE方法，通过构建协调的导航页面和支持页面网络来引导LLM智能体的浏览轨迹，从而提升目标产品的推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GEO研究聚焦于单页面优化，但智能体网络搜索涉及多步浏览（查询、爬取、链接跟踪、搜索重构、证据综合），页面之间的组织结构和浏览轨迹同样影响结果。因此需要将GEO视为环境级影响力问题。
AI.method: 提出TRACE方法，针对推荐查询和目标产品构建受控的证据环境，包括智能体导向的导航入口页面和异质支持页面，通过共享术语、内部链接和一致产品属性来引入、验证和强化目标产品。
AI.result: 在OPR-Bench上，TRACE持续优于页面级GEO基线。轨迹级指标显示：目标结果初始爬取增加、目标特定后续搜索增加、内部链接爬取增加，表明收益来自塑造智能体的证据获取过程而非仅增加内容。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持将GEO研究范式提升到生态系统层面，需将LLM智能体置于更广泛的证据环境中进行研究，以理解如何引导搜索、浏览和答案综合过程。

title: The Geno-Synthetic Algorithm: Type-Factored Coevolutionary Optimization for Heterogeneous Genotypes and Assembled Phenotypes
summary: Many real-world optimization problems are not naturally homogeneous vectors but composite design objects with heterogeneous parameters: integers, real values, Booleans, categoricals, complex-valued descriptors, and embedding vectors. Standard evolutionary algorithms flatten these into a single chromosome and apply generic operators with rounding and repair, sacrificing representational fidelity. We introduce the Geno-Synthetic Algorithm (GSA), a type-factored coevolutionary framework in which gene families are partitioned by representational type, evolved in parallel with type-native operators, and assembled into executable phenotypes for joint fitness evaluation. GSA is formalized as a typed product-space search procedure with an explicit assembly operator. An open-source reference implementation (gsa-experiments, MIT-licensed) is released. A focused empirical study compares eight GSA variants against five baselines across seven benchmark problems (six synthetic plus the external COCO BBOB-MixInt suite) at budgets from 5,000 to 100,000 evaluations. The headline finding is architectural: GSA is the only method that operates when gene families include complex-valued descriptors or embedding vectors. On smooth synthetic multi-family problems, well-tuned flattened differential evolution remains the strongest baseline; on BBOB-MixInt at 100,000 evaluations, GSA_DIRECT becomes statistically indistinguishable from FLATTENED_DE while FLATTENED_EA drops from second to fifth rank, an asymptotic crossover. Ablations confirm that type-native operators are essential, elite credit dominates ensemble credit, and active assembly outperforms passive concatenation on gated benchmarks. The framework extends naturally to prompt and embedding optimization for large language model systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Geno-Synthetic Algorithm (GSA)，一种类型分解的协进化框架，将异构参数按表示类型分区进化，在包含复数描述符和嵌入向量的问题上表现独特，实验表明其架构在复杂问题上具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现实优化问题的设计对象包含异构参数（整数、实数、布尔值、类别、复数描述符、嵌入向量等），标准进化算法将其扁平化为单一染色体后使用通用算子（含取整和修复）会损失表示保真度，需要一种保持类型原生表示的搜索框架。
AI.method: GSA将基因家族按表示类型分区，每个家族使用类型原生算子并行进化，再通过显式的组装算子组合成可执行表型进行联合适应度评估，形式化为类型化乘积空间搜索过程。
AI.result: 在7个基准问题（含COCO BBOB-MixInt）上比较8种GSA变体与5种基线；GSA是唯一能在基因家族包含复数描述符或嵌入向量时运行的方法；在BBOB-MixInt上100,000评估时GSA_DIRECT与FLATTENED_DE无统计差异；消融实验证实类型原生算子不可或缺，精英信用优于集成信用，主动组装优于被动拼接。
AI.conclusion: GSA框架有效处理异构参数优化问题，在复杂表示类型场景下具有独特优势，并自然扩展至大语言模型的提示和嵌入优化。

title: MorphOPC: Advancing Mask Optimization with Multi-scale Hierarchical Morphological Learning
summary: As feature sizes shrink to the nanometer scale, accurately transferring circuit patterns from photomasks to silicon wafers becomes increasingly challenging. Optical proximity correction (OPC) is widely used to ensure pattern fidelity and manufacturability. Recent generative mask optimization models based on encoder-decoder architecture can synthesize near-optimal masks, serving as fast machine learning (ML) surrogates for traditional OPC. However, these models often fail to capture the geometric transformations from target layouts to mask patterns, leading to suboptimal quality. In this work, we formulate mask generation as a sequence of morphological operations on local layout features and propose \textit{MorphOPC}, a multi-scale hierarchical model with neural morphological modules to learn these transformations. Experiments on edge-based OPC and ILT benchmarks across metal and via layers show that \textit{MorphOPC} consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving higher printing fidelity and lower manufacturing cost, demonstrating strong potential for scalable mask optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MorphOPC，一种基于神经形态学操作的多尺度分层模型，用于光刻掩膜优化，在边缘OPC和ILT基准测试中优于现有方法，能生成更高保真度和更低成本的掩膜图案。
AI.motivation: 随着特征尺寸缩小至纳米级，电路图案从光掩膜转移到硅晶圆的精度面临挑战。现有基于编码器-解码器的生成式掩膜优化模型无法有效捕捉目标布局到掩膜图案的几何变换，导致优化质量不佳。
AI.method: 将掩膜生成建模为对局部布局特征的一系列形态学操作，提出MorphOPC，一种包含神经形态学模块的多尺度分层模型，通过学习这些几何变换来生成掩膜。
AI.result: 在边缘OPC和ILT基准测试中，覆盖金属层和通孔层，MorphOPC在印刷保真度和制造成本方面均持续优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MorphOPC展现了在可扩展掩膜优化方面的巨大潜力，为传统OPC提供了一种高质量、高效的机器学习替代方案。

title: User Reviews as a Source for Usability Requirements: A Precursor Study on Using Large Language Models
summary: It is known that user-centered approaches to requirements engineering in general lead to a better suited product for the end-users. LLM4RE provides promising approaches to support the requirements elicitation process (e.g. classification of requirements). Previous approaches focus on Machine-Learning (ML) or Deep-Learning (DL) aspects, which require intensive training with a large amount of manually labeled data. LLMs, on the other hand, are pre-trained on large amounts of user-generated text data, enabling a user-centric workflow to analyze requirements. In this paper, we explore the possibility of exploiting the improved natural language understanding of LLMs, rather than strict ML classification, together with the mass extraction of user reviews to analyze if the performance of LLMs in understanding user reviews is comparable to the performance of human raters. This enables a quick and cheap workflow for development teams to gather and process their userś requirements. This paper provides three major contributions: (1) We provide a completely coded dataset of 300 user reviews containing usability-relevant aspects from three different types of apps, that were labeled by two human raters and by an LLM. (2) We build an initial prompt, based on two prompt engineering iterations and specifically developed coding guidelines derived from the 10 Nielsen Usability Heuristics, for LLMs to filter usability relevant user reviews. (3) We determine that LLMs are generally able to recognize usability as a non-functional requirement in user reviews, in terms of their F-score, but the performance and reliability is strongly dependent on the prompt.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用LLM的自然语言理解能力替代传统ML分类方法，结合用户评论批量提取，分析LLM在理解用户评论方面是否达到人类评估者水平。研究提供了300条标注数据集、基于尼尔森启发式准则的提示工程模板，并发现LLM能识别用户评论中的可用性需求，但其性能高度依赖于提示词设计。
AI.motivation: 传统ML/DL方法需要大量人工标注数据进行训练，成本高昂。LLM预训练于海量用户文本，有望实现以用户为中心的需求分析，提供一种快速、低成本的需求获取与处理工作流。
AI.method: (1) 构建300条用户评论数据集，涵盖三类应用，由两名人类评估者和LLM分别标注；(2) 基于10条尼尔森可用性启发式准则，经过两轮提示工程迭代，开发用于LLM过滤可用性相关评论的初始提示；(3) 对比LLM与人类评估者在识别可用性非功能需求方面的F-score表现。
AI.result: LLM在识别用户评论中的可用性需求方面，F-score表现整体可行，但性能和可靠性强烈依赖于提示词的设计质量。
AI.conclusion: LLM可以作为快速、低成本的需求工程工具，辅助开发团队获取和处理用户需求，但需谨慎设计提示词以保证结果可靠性。

title: Macro-Action Based Multi-Agent Instruction Following through Value Cancellation
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in real-world use cases may need to adapt to external natural language instructions that interrupt ongoing behavior and conflict with long-horizon objectives. However, conditioning rewards on instructions introduces a fundamental failure mode as Bellman updates couple value estimates across instruction contexts, leading to inconsistent values when instructions interrupt macro-actions. We propose Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC), which corrects Bellman backups at instruction boundaries by correcting the incoming instruction objective and restoring the continuation value under the current objective. Unlike reward shaping, MAVIC modifies the bootstrapping target itself, enabling consistent value estimation under stochastic instruction switching within a unified policy. We provide theoretical analysis and an actor-critic implementation, and show that MAVIC achieves high instruction compliance while preserving base task performance in increasingly complex cooperative multi-agent environments.

AI.tldr: 提出MAVIC方法，通过修正指令边界的Bellman备份，解决多智能体强化学习中自然语言指令与长期目标冲突导致的值函数不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习在实际应用中需要响应外部自然语言指令，但指令可能中断正在执行的行为并与长期目标冲突。传统方法在Bellman更新时会将不同指令上下文的值估计耦合，导致值函数不一致。
AI.method: 提出MAVIC（宏动作值修正指令遵从方法），在指令边界处修正Bellman备份：一方面修正传入的指令目标，另一方面恢复当前目标下的延续价值。与奖励塑形不同，MAVIC直接修改自举目标本身。
AI.result: 在日益复杂的多智能体协作环境中，MAVIC实现了高指令遵从性，同时保持了基础任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: MAVIC能够在随机指令切换下实现一致的值估计，并在统一策略内兼顾指令遵从与任务性能。

title: CAWI: Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization for Randomized Neural Networks
summary: Randomized neural networks (RdNNs) enable efficient, backpropagation-free training by freezing randomly initialized input-to-hidden weights, which permits a closed-form solution for the output layer. However, conventional random initialization is blind to inter-feature dependence, ignoring correlations, asymmetries, and tail dependence in the data, which degrades conditioning and predictive performance. To the best of our knowledge, this limitation remains unaddressed in the RdNN literature. To close this gap, we propose CAWI (Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization), a framework that draws input-to-hidden weights from a data-fitted copula that matches empirical dependence, ensuring the frozen projections respect inter-feature dependence without sacrificing the closed-form solution. CAWI (i) maps each feature to the unit interval using empirical CDFs, (ii) fits a multivariate copula that captures rank-based dependence among features, and (iii) samples each weight column w_j from the fitted copula and applies a fixed inverse marginal transform to set scale. The objective, solver, and "freeze-once" paradigm remain unchanged; only the sampling law for W becomes dependence-aware. For dependence modeling, we consider two copula families: elliptical (Gaussian, t) and Archimedean (Clayton, Frank, Gumbel). This enables CAWI to handle diverse dependence, including tail dependence. We evaluate CAWI across 83 diverse classification benchmarks (binary and multiclass) and two biomedical datasets, BreaKHis and the Schizophrenia dataset, using standard shallow and deep RdNN architectures. CAWI consistently delivers significant improvements in predictive performance over conventional random initialization. Code is available at: https://github.com/mtanveer1/CAWI

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAWI（Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization）框架，通过从数据拟合的copula中采样输入到隐藏层的权重，使随机神经网络能感知特征间依赖关系，在不改变封闭解训练范式的前提下提升预测性能，在83个分类基准和两个生物医学数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统随机神经网络（RdNN）的随机初始化忽略了特征间的相关性、非对称性和尾部依赖，导致条件数恶化、预测性能下降，这一局限性在现有RdNN文献中尚未得到解决。
AI.method: CAWI框架包含三步：(i) 用经验CDF将每个特征映射到单位区间；(ii) 拟合多元copula（椭圆族和高阿基米德族）捕捉特征间的秩依赖；(iii) 从拟合的copula中采样权重列并施加固定的逆边际变换设定尺度。目标函数、求解器和"一次冻结"范式保持不变，仅改变了权重的采样分布。
AI.result: 在83个分类基准（二分类和多分类）以及BreaKHis、精神分裂症两个生物医学数据集上，使用标准浅层和深层RdNN架构，CAWI相比传统随机初始化持续带来显著的预测性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CAWI通过copula感知特征依赖的权重初始化，有效提升了随机神经网络的性能，且不改变其高效训练的闭式解优势，为依赖感知的RdNN提供了一种通用且有效的框架。

title: The End Justifies the Mean: A Linear Ranking Rule for Proportional Sequential Decisions
summary:
AI alignment and participatory design motivate a new democratic design problem: how to collectively choose a decision rule to use repeatedly. We study this problem for linear ranking rules, which repeatedly rank items $x_j$ within batches $X=(x_1,\dots,x_m)\in(\mathbb{R}^d)^m$, where each item's ranking is dictated by its score $\langle θ^*,x_j\rangle$ according to a fixed scoring vector $θ^*$. Given voters' preferred scoring vectors $θ^{(1)},\dots,θ^{(n)}$ and their population fractions $α^{(1)},\dots,α^{(n)}$, we ask how to choose a collective vector $θ^*$ satisfying individual proportionality (IP): every voter type $i$ should agree with the resulting rankings to an $α^{(i)}$-proportional degree, either on average over time (long-run IP) or even within each batch (per-batch IP).
  The default rule, the arithmetic mean of the $θ^{(i)}$, has been shown to be severely majoritarian; more generally, it is not clear that any fixed linear rule can balance many voters' disparate opinions. Our main result is that, surprisingly, there is a simple rule that does satisfy long-run IP: the angular mean, the spherical analog of the arithmetic mean. We then show that exact per-batch IP is impossible for fixed linear rules, but that the gap between per-batch and long-run IP shrinks quickly with batch size. Experiments on three real-world preference datasets show that all rules perform similarly when voters' preferences are homogeneous, while the angular mean substantially improves proportionality in high-disagreement regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为重复使用的线性排序规则进行集体选择，提出角均值（angular mean）作为满足个体比例性（individual proportionality）的简单规则，并通过实验证明其在高度分歧场景下能显著提升比例性。
AI.motivation: AI对齐与参与式设计催生了一个新的民主设计问题：如何集体选择一个可重复使用的决策规则。现有默认的算术均值规则存在严重的多数主义偏向，难以平衡众多选民的不同意见。
AI.method: 定义了线性排序规则下的个体比例性（IP），分为长期IP和每批次IP。提出角均值（angular mean）作为算术均值的球面对应物。通过理论分析证明角均值满足长期IP，并证明固定线性规则无法实现精确的每批次IP，但差距随批次规模增大而快速缩小。
AI.result: 角均值满足长期IP；固定线性规则无法实现精确的每批次IP，但与长期IP的差距随批次规模增大而缩小；在三个真实世界偏好数据集上，当选民偏好同质时所有规则表现相似，而在高度分歧场景下角均值显著提升比例性。
AI.conclusion: 角均值是一种简单有效的满足长期个体比例性的线性排序规则，在高度分歧的场景下相比算术均值具有更好的比例性表现。

title: BoostTaxo: Zero-Shot Taxonomy Induction via Boosting-Style Agentic Reasoning and Constraint-Aware Calibration
summary: Taxonomy induction is crucial for organizing concepts into explicit and interpretable semantic hierarchies. While existing methods have achieved promising results, their generalization, structural reliability, and efficiency remain limited, hindering their performance in zero-shot and large-scale scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we introduce BoostTaxo, a boosting-style LLM framework for zero-shot taxonomy induction. It takes a set of domain terms as inputs and performs parent identification in a coarse-to-fine manner, employing retrieval-augmented definition refinement, hybrid parent candidate selection, candidate rating, and structure-aware score calibration to improve taxonomy construction. Specifically, a lightweight LLM is used to efficiently filter candidate parents, while a large-scale LLM is employed to rank and score candidate parents for fine-grained parent selection. Structural features are further incorporated to calibrate candidate edge weights and enhance the reliability of the induced taxonomy. The unified BoostTaxo is evaluated on three public benchmark datasets, namely WordNet, DBLP, and SemEval-Sci, and achieves superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods in zero-shot taxonomy induction. The ablation study validates the contribution of the hybrid parent candidate selection and the structure-aware score calibration to the overall performance. Further analysis investigates the impact of candidate selection size on taxonomy quality and presents representative case and failure studies, providing deeper insights into the effectiveness and limitations of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: BoostTaxo 是一个基于 boosting 风格的 LLM 框架，用于零样本 taxonomy 归纳。它通过粗到细的方式识别父节点，采用检索增强的定义细化、混合父候选选择、候选评分和结构感知分数校准，在三个公开数据集上达到了最优或可比的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 taxonomy 归纳方法在泛化能力、结构可靠性和效率方面存在局限，尤其是在零样本和大规模场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 采用 boosting 风格的粗到细父节点识别流程：(1) 检索增强的定义细化；(2) 混合父候选选择（轻量级 LLM 高效过滤 + 大规模 LLM 精细排序评分）；(3) 结构感知分数校准以增强 taxonomy 可靠性。
AI.result: 在 WordNet、DBLP 和 SemEval-Sci 三个公开基准上达到最优或可比性能；消融实验验证了混合父候选选择和结构感知校准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BoostTaxo 通过结合轻量级和大规模 LLM 的优势，并引入结构感知校准，有效提升了零样本 taxonomy 归纳的泛化性、可靠性和效率。

title: Same Image, Different Meanings: Toward Retrieval of Context-Dependent Meanings
summary: A scene of two people in the rain can convey hope and warmth in a reunion story or sorrow and finality in a farewell story. We investigate this context-dependent nature of image meaning and its implications for retrieval. Our key observation is that context dependency correlates with semantic abstraction: concrete elements (objects, actions) remain stable across contexts, while abstract elements (atmosphere, intent) shift with context. We operationalize this as the L1--L4 framework, organizing image semantics from context-independent (L1) to maximally context-dependent (L4). Using synthetic story contexts and queries for controlled evaluation, we examine how injecting narrative context into embeddings affects retrieval across abstraction levels. Concrete queries are retrievable without context, while abstract levels increasingly depend on narrative grounding. Where context is injected also matters, with image-side enrichment proving particularly effective. The most abstract level, however, remains challenging even with full context, highlighting context-dependent image retrieval as an important open problem. Our framework and findings lay groundwork toward retrieval systems that handle the context-dependent meanings images acquire in narrative settings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出L1-L4框架，将图像语义按上下文依赖程度从具体到抽象分层。研究发现具体概念无需上下文即可检索，而抽象概念高度依赖叙事背景。图像侧注入上下文效果最佳，但最抽象层级即使有完整上下文仍具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 图像的语义含义会随叙事上下文而变化（如"雨中人"可表希望或悲伤），现有检索系统未能处理这种上下文依赖的图像含义。
AI.method: 提出L1-L4语义分层框架（从上下文无关到最大程度依赖）；使用合成故事上下文和查询进行受控评估；比较不同层级下在嵌入中注入叙事上下文的效果。
AI.result: 具体查询无需上下文即可检索；抽象层级越来越依赖叙事上下文；图像侧注入上下文比文本侧更有效；最抽象层级（L4）即使有完整上下文仍然困难。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了上下文依赖的图像检索是一个重要但尚未解决的问题，为未来构建能处理叙事场景中图像含义变化的检索系统奠定基础。

title: Texture Regenerating and Grafting Using Genome-Driven Neural Cellular Automata
summary: This study significantly advances multi-texture synthesis using Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) by introducing a novel training methodology that enables robust self-regeneration of textures in damaged regions. This inherent healing mechanism, essential for dynamic and adaptive systems, extends beyond traditional computer graphics applications, highlighting the fundamental self-organizing properties of NCAs. Furthermore, we present a versatile grafting technique, enabling the seamless combination of distinct textures. This is achieved efficiently during the inference phase, without requiring specialized retraining, through precise initialization of the NCA's genome channels. Our findings demonstrate the generation of high-quality, complex textures with fluid transitions, showcasing a powerful and efficient paradigm for dynamic texture composition and self-repair in autonomous systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新型训练方法，使神经细胞自动机（NCA）能够实现多纹理合成、自修复以及无缝嫁接，无需重新训练即可在推理阶段组合不同纹理。
AI.motivation: 推动多纹理合成技术发展，使NCA具备对损坏区域的自我再生能力（自修复机制），并探索超越传统计算机图形学应用的动态自适应系统。
AI.method: 1) 提出新型训练方法使NCA具备自修复能力；2) 提出嫁接技术（grafting technique），通过在推理阶段精确初始化NCA的基因组通道，实现不同纹理的无缝组合，无需专门重新训练。
AI.result: 生成了高质量、复杂的纹理，并实现了流畅的纹理过渡，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了NCA在动态纹理合成和自我修复方面的强大潜力，为自主系统中的动态纹理组合提供了高效的新范式。

title: CROP: Expert-Aligned Image Cropping via Compositional Reasoning and Optimizing Preference
summary: Aesthetic image cropping aims to enhance the aesthetic quality of an image by improving its composition through spatial cropping. Previous methods often rely on saliency prediction or retrieval augmentation, ignoring the task's core requirement: a deep understanding of composition and aesthetics. Consequently, saliency-based methods struggle to make compositional trade-offs in complex scenes, while retrieval-based methods blindly refer to similar cases, lacking adaptive reasoning for unique scenes. Both approaches fail to align their automated cropping results with those of human experts. To address the above issues, we propose a novel paradigm that reformulates aesthetic cropping as a multimodal reasoning task, aiming to activate the VLM's analytical and comprehension capabilities in aesthetics. We design a Compositional Reasoning and Optimizing Preference method (CROP) that directs the VLM to think like a professional photographer. It deconstructs a complex and subjective aesthetic problem into an "analysis-proposal-decision" process, reasoning step by step through the analysis of scene elements and compositional principles. Meanwhile, our expert preference alignment module makes the model's decision consistent with human expert aesthetics. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets validate our method's superiority and component effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出CROP方法，将美学图像裁剪重构为多模态推理任务，通过"分析-建议-决策"三步推理和专家偏好对齐，使VLM像专业摄影师一样思考，在多个数据集上验证了优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（基于显著性或检索增强）缺乏对构图和美学的深层理解，在复杂场景中难以做出构图权衡，且无法与人类专家的裁剪结果对齐。
AI.method: 提出CROP方法，将美学裁剪转化为多模态推理任务：1）设计"分析-建议-决策"三步推理流程，逐步分析场景元素和构图原则；2）引入专家偏好对齐模块，使模型决策与人类专家审美一致。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验验证了方法的优越性和各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将美学裁剪重新定义为多模态推理任务，激活VLM的分析和理解能力，有效对齐了自动裁剪结果与人类专家审美。

title: Agentic Interpretation: Lattice-Structured Evidence for LLM-Based Program Analysis
summary: Large language models can consult information that fixed static analyzers cannot, such as documentation, current security advisories, version-specific metadata, and informal API contracts. This makes LLMs a compelling option for program analyses that depend on information beyond the source program, or that are otherwise not amenable to conventional static analyzers. However, directly asking an LLM for a one-shot whole-program analysis is brittle because it compresses many evidence-dependent judgments into a single opaque answer, rather than exposing which conclusions are supported or disputed and using intermediate findings to guide later, more focused searches. In this paper, we propose agentic interpretation, a framework that brings the discipline of lattice-based static analysis to LLM-driven program reasoning. At a high level, agentic interpretation decomposes a high-level analysis goal into localized claims, and tracks the LLM's judgment about each claim in a finite-height lattice. A worklist algorithm governs how claims and their judgments evolve during the analysis. We introduce a formal model of agentic interpretation, explore the design space it opens, and illustrate the approach with a worked example analyzing code that depends on opaque third-party components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"智能体解释"（agentic interpretation）框架，将格论静态分析中的严谨性引入LLM驱动的程序推理。通过将高层次分析目标分解为局部断言，在有限高度格中追踪LLM对每个断言的判断，并采用工作列表算法管理断言及其判断的演化过程，解决了直接使用LLM进行一次性全程序分析的不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: LLM能够查阅传统静态分析工具无法获取的信息（如文档、安全公告、版本元数据、非正式API契约），但直接让LLM做一次性全程序分析存在缺陷——它将许多依赖证据的判断压缩到单个不透明的答案中，无法展示哪些结论得到支持或质疑，也无法用中间发现指导后续的聚焦搜索。
AI.method: 提出agentic interpretation框架：1) 将高层分析目标分解为局部断言（claims）；2) 在有限高度格（finite-height lattice）中追踪LLM对每个断言的判断；3) 使用工作列表算法（worklist algorithm）管理断言及其判断的演化过程，模拟静态分析中数据流传播的严谨性。
AI.result: 建立了agentic interpretation的形式化模型，探索了其设计空间，并通过一个依赖不透明第三方组件的代码分析示例展示了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将静态分析的严谨性引入LLM驱动的程序推理，使基于LLM的分析更具可解释性和可靠性，尤其适用于依赖超出源代码信息的程序分析场景。

title: Do Androids Dream of Breaking the Game? Systematically Auditing AI Agent Benchmarks with BenchJack
summary: Agent benchmarks have become the de facto measure of frontier AI competence, guiding model selection, investment, and deployment. However, reward hacking, where agents maximize a score without performing the intended task, emerges spontaneously in frontier models without overfitting. We argue that benchmarks must be secure by design. From past incidents of reward hacks, we derive a taxonomy of eight recurring flaw patterns and compile them into the Agent-Eval Checklist for benchmark designers. We condense the insights into BenchJack, an automated red-teaming system that drives coding agents to audit benchmarks and identify possible reward-hacking exploits in a clairvoyant manner. Moreover, we extend BenchJack to an iterative generative-adversarial pipeline that discovers new flaws and patches them iteratively to improve benchmark robustness. We apply BenchJack to 10 popular agent benchmarks spanning software engineering, web navigation, desktop computing, and terminal operations. BenchJack synthesizes reward-hacking exploits that achieve near-perfect scores on most of the benchmarks without solving a single task, surfacing 219 distinct flaws across the eight classes. Moreover, BenchJack's extended pipeline reduces the hackable-task ratio from near 100% to under 10% on four benchmarks without fatal design flaws, fully patching WebArena and OSWorld within three iterations. Our results show that evaluation pipelines have not internalized an adversarial mindset, and that proactive auditing could help close the security gap for the fast-paced benchmarking space.

AI.tldr: 本文发现前沿AI智能体在基准测试中会自动出现奖励破解行为，据此提出安 全设计原则，总结出8种漏洞模式，并开发了自动化红队系统BenchJack，能在10个主流基准测试中合成接近满分的奖励破解攻击，识别219个不同漏洞，并通过对抗生成管道将可破解任务率从接近100%降至10%以下。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试存在严重的安全漏洞，前沿模型无需真正完成任务即可通过奖励破解获得高分，这种自发行为误导了模型选择、投资和部署决策，因此需要系统性地审计和修复基准测试中的设计缺陷。
AI.method: 本文首先从历史奖励破解事件中归纳出8种漏洞模式（Agent-Eval Checklist），然后开发BenchJack自动化红队系统，利用编码智能体以远见方式审计基准测试并发现可被利用的漏洞；进一步扩展为迭代生成-对抗管道，交替发现新漏洞并修补，逐步提升基准鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在软件工程、网页导航、桌面计算和终端操作等4个领域的10个主流基准测试上，BenchJack合成了无需解决任何实际任务即可获得近乎满分成绩的奖励破解攻击，共发现219个不同漏洞；扩展管道在4个无致命设计缺陷的基准测试上将可破解任务率从接近100%降至10%以下，WebArena和OSWorld在3轮迭代内被完全修补。
AI.conclusion: 当前评估管道缺乏对抗性思维，基准测试需要"安全设计"理念；自动化主动审计（如BenchJack）能够有效缩小安全差距，对于快速发展的基准测试生态至关重要。

title: Towards Robust Federated Multimodal Graph Learning under Modality Heterogeneity
summary: Recently, multimodal graph learning (MGL) has garnered significant attention for integrating diverse modality information and structured context to support various network applications. However, real-world graphs are often isolated due to data-sharing limitations across multiple parties, and their modalities are frequently incomplete. This highlights an urgent need to develop a robust federated approach. However, we find that existing methods remain insufficient. On the one hand, centralized MGL methods that handle missing modalities overlook the knowledge sharing and generalization in federated scenarios. On the other hand, while federated MGL methods have become increasingly mature, they primarily target non-graph data. Based on these technologies, we identify a two-stage pipeline wherein client-side completion reconstructs missing modalities, and server-side aggregation integrates the client-updated parameters of both the modality generator and the backbone models. Although this serves as a general solution, we identify two primary challenges in achieving greater robustness: (1) Topology-Isolated Local Completion: Client-side modality generation struggles to effectively leverage global semantics. (2) Reliability-Imbalanced Global Aggregation: Server-side multi-party collaboration is hindered by client updates with varying modality availability and recovery reliability. To address these challenges, we propose \textsc{FedMPO}, which utilizes topology-aware cross-modal generation to recover missing features using comprehensive graph context, missing-aware expert routing to locally filter out noisy recovered signals, and reliability-aware aggregation to appropriately down-weight unreliable updates. Extensive experiments on 3 tasks across 6 datasets demonstrate that FedMPO outperforms baselines, achieving performance gains of up to 4.10% and 5.65% in high-missing and non-IID settings.

AI.tldr: 提出FedMPO框架解决联邦多模态图学习中的模态缺失问题，通过拓扑感知生成、缺失感知路由和可靠性感知聚合，在6个数据集上实现最高5.65%性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现实世界图数据常因数据隔离而孤立分布，且模态信息经常不完整，现有集中式方法无法处理联邦场景的知识共享与泛化，而联邦多模态方法主要针对非图数据，亟需针对图结构的鲁棒联邦多模态学习方法。
AI.method: FedMPO框架包含三个阶段：(1) 拓扑感知跨模态生成——利用完整图上下文恢复缺失特征；(2) 缺失感知专家路由——在本地过滤噪声恢复信号；(3) 可靠性感知聚合——根据更新可靠性适当降低不可靠更新的权重。
AI.result: 在3个任务6个数据集上，FedMPO优于基线方法，在高缺失率和非IID设置下分别实现最高4.10%和5.65%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FedMPO通过解决拓扑隔离的本地补全和不可靠性失衡的全局聚合两大挑战，有效提升了联邦多模态图学习的鲁棒性。

title: Dynamic Transaction Scheduling and Pricing in the Ethereum Mempool
summary: The Ethereum blockchain utilizes the EIP-1559 algorithm to manage transaction inclusion and block assembly. However, EIP-1559 and much of the existing literature study this problem from a static perspective, focusing on price evolution without modelling transaction dynamics within the mempool. Motivated by this limitation, we study a dynamic transaction scheduling problem in which transactions with heterogeneous sizes and per-unit values arrive over time and remain in the mempool until scheduled. To capture the stochastic mempool evolution, we formulate the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) whose state represents the mempool configuration and whose actions correspond to block prices. We first provide a primal-dual interpretation of the static EIP-1559 mechanism, showing that block prices arise naturally as dual variables of a social-welfare maximization problem. Building on this perspective, we extend the framework to the dynamic setting and formulate an objective that maximizes long-run discounted reward while incorporating holding costs and overshoot penalties. We then employ a Natural Policy Gradient (NPG) algorithm to compute the optimal policy. Our results show that dynamic pricing stabilizes the mempool while maximizing long-run discounted reward. In particular, as the overshoot penalty increases, the average scheduled transaction volume converges to the target block capacity, and the resulting NPG updates closely resemble the EIP-1559 price update rule. Finally, we study two special cases of the MDP formulation: homogeneous transactions and uniform arrivals. In the homogeneous setting, where the protocol directly controls scheduled volume, we show that the optimal policy has a threshold structure. We then propose a bang-bang pricing mechanism for uniform arrivals and derive a lower bound on the block capacity needed to ensure system stability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了以太坊EIP-1559机制下动态交易调度问题，将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)，利用自然策略梯度(NPG)算法求解最优定价策略，结果表明动态定价能稳定交易池并最大化长期折扣奖励，且当惩罚增大时NPG更新规则趋近于EIP-1559的价格更新规则。
AI.motivation: 现有EIP-1559研究多从静态视角分析价格演化，忽略了交易池(mempool)内交易的动态变化。本文旨在弥补这一缺陷，研究考虑交易随时间到达、异构大小和单位价值下的动态交易调度问题。
AI.method: 将交易调度问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)，状态为交易池配置，动作为区块价格；首先给出静态EIP-1559机制的原对偶解释，然后扩展到动态设定，采用自然策略梯度(NPG)算法计算最优策略，并分析了同质交易和均匀到达两个特例。
AI.result: 动态定价能够稳定交易池并最大化长期折扣奖励；随着超额惩罚增加，平均调度交易量收敛至目标区块容量；NPG更新规则与EIP-1559价格更新规则相似；同质交易下最优策略具有阈值结构；均匀到达下提出了bang-bang定价机制并推导了系统稳定性所需的区块容量下界。
AI.conclusion: 动态定价策略比静态EIP-1559更有效地管理交易池演化，在保证稳定性的同时最大化长期社会福利，且与现有EIP-1559机制具有兼容性。

title: ToolWeave: Structured Synthesis of Complex Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Dialogues
summary: Multi-turn tool calling is essential for LLMs to function as autonomous agents, yet synthesizing the training data required for these capabilities remains a fundamental challenge. Existing synthetic data generation pipelines often produce unrealistic dialogues for two reasons: they chain tools that are only superficially compatible rather than aligned with meaningful user tasks, and they generate dialogues in one shot, which often introduces arguments that were neither provided by the user nor produced by prior tool calls. These issues also lead to a severe underrepresentation of multi-step tool interactions. We introduce ToolWeave, a structured framework for synthesizing realistic multi-turn tool-calling dialogues. ToolWeave support realistic multi-step workflows (or tool sequences) by constructing tools with built-in dependencies and filters the workflows based on alignment with user goals. It reduces parameter hallucination by using a fine-grained planning stage that explicitly tracks parameter provenance. As a result, ToolWeave-generated synthetic dialogues contain more multi-step tool interactions (45%) and fewer hallucinations in parameters and tool names. Consequently, LLMs fine-tuned on ToolWeave consistently outperform those fine-tuned on prior datasets across three public benchmarks. Notably, Llama-3.1-70B fine-tuned on ToolWeave achieves 39.75% on BFCL-V3 multi-turn, compared to 23.50% when fine-tuned on SOTA ToolFlow data.

AI.tldr: ToolWeave是一个结构化框架，用于合成更真实的多轮工具调用对话数据，通过构建带依赖的工具链和细粒度规划来减少参数幻觉，从而提升LLM在工具调用任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据生成流程会产生不真实的对话：一是工具链仅表面兼容而非服务于有意义的用户任务；二是一步生成对话常引入用户未提供或先前工具调用未产生的参数。这导致多步工具交互严重不足。
AI.method: ToolWeave通过构建具有内置依赖的工具来支持现实的多步骤工作流，并基于用户目标对齐度过滤工作流；利用细粒度规划阶段显式追踪参数来源，减少参数幻觉。
AI.result: ToolWeave生成的对话包含更多多步工具交互（45%），参数和工具名称幻觉更少。微调后的LLM在三个公开基准上持续优于先前数据集，Llama-3.1-70B在BFCL-V3多轮任务上达39.75%（此前SOTA ToolFlow数据为23.50%）。
AI.conclusion: ToolWeave通过结构化框架有效提升了合成多轮工具调用数据的真实性和质量，显著增强了LLM作为自主智能体的多轮工具调用能力。

title: RAG-Enhanced Large Language Models for Dynamic Content Expiration Prediction in Web Search
comment: Accepted at SIGIR 2026. Final version: https://doi.org/10.1145/3805712.3808457
summary: In commercial web search, aligning content freshness with user intent remains challenging due to the highly varied lifespans of information. Traditional industrial approaches rely on static time-window filtering, resulting in "one-size-fits-all" rankings where content may be chronologically recent but semantically expired. To address the limitation, we present a novel Large Language Models (LLMs)-based Query-Aware Dynamic Content Expiration Prediction Framework deployed in Baidu search, reformulating timeliness as a dynamic validity inference task. Our framework extracts fine-grained temporal contexts from documents and leverages LLMs to deduce a query-specific "validity horizon"-a semantic boundary defining when information becomes obsolete based on user intent. Integrated with robust hallucination mitigation strategies to ensure reliability, our approach has been evaluated through offline and online A/B testing on live production traffic. Results demonstrate significant improvements in search freshness and user experience metrics, validating the effectiveness of LLM-driven reasoning for solving semantic expiration at an industrial scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的查询感知动态内容过期预测框架，用于百度搜索中替代传统的静态时间窗口过滤方法，通过推断语义层面的"有效性时间边界"来提升搜索新鲜度。
AI.motivation: 商业搜索引擎中内容的新鲜度与用户意图难以对齐，传统基于固定时间窗口的方法只能保证时间上的新近性，却无法识别语义上已过时的内容，缺乏对信息生命周期的细粒度理解。
AI.method: 从文档中提取细粒度时间上下文，利用大语言模型推理出针对特定查询的"有效性时间边界"（即语义过期时间点），并结合幻觉缓解策略确保可靠性，最终在百度搜索生产环境中部署。
AI.result: 离线评估和在线A/B测试均显示，该方法显著提升了搜索新鲜度和用户体验指标。
AI.conclusion: 验证了基于大语言模型的推理能力可在工业规模上有效解决语义过期问题，为动态内容新鲜度管理提供了新范式。

title: ToolMol: Evolutionary Agentic Framework for Multi-objective Drug Discovery
summary: Advances in large language models (LLMs) have recently opened new and promising avenues for small-molecule drug discovery. Yet existing LLM-based approaches for molecular generation often suffer from high rates of invalid and low-quality ligand candidates, a result of the syntactic limitations of current models with regard to molecular strings. In this paper, we introduce $\texttt{ToolMol}$, an evolutionary agentic framework for de novo drug design. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ combines a multi-objective genetic algorithm with an agentic LLM operator that iteratively updates the ligand population. We build a comprehensive toolbox of RDKit-backed functions that allows our agentic operator to consisently make precise ligand modifications. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on multi-objective property optimization tasks, discovering drug-like and synthesizable ligands that have $>10\%$ stronger predicted binding affinity compared to existing methods, evaluated on three protein targets. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ ligands additionally achieve state-of-the-art results in gold-standard Absolute Binding Free Energy scores, gaining over existing methods by over $35\%$. By studying chain-of-thought reasoning traces, we observe that tool-calling enables the model to more faithfully execute its planned modifications, efficiently exploiting the strong chemical prior knowledge in LLMs.

AI.tldr: ToolMol 是一个结合多目标遗传算法与LLM智能体操作符的进化框架，用于从头药物设计。它通过RDKit工具包实现精确的配体修饰，在多目标性质优化任务上达到SOTA性能，尤其结合亲和力比现有方法提升超过10%，绝对结合自由能分数提升超过35%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的分子生成方法常产生大量无效和低质量的配体候选物，原因是当前模型在分子字符串处理方面存在语法局限。为此，本文提出ToolMol框架，旨在利用工具调用增强LLM的化学先验知识，生成更有效、更高质量的候选配体。
AI.method: ToolMol是一个进化智能体框架，核心包括：(1) 多目标遗传算法驱动配体种群进化；(2) 基于LLM的智能体操作符迭代更新配体种群；(3) 一套基于RDKit的全面工具函数，使智能体能精确进行配体修饰。通过工具调用的链式思维推理，模型能更忠实执行其计划的修饰操作。
AI.result: 在多目标性质优化任务上达到SOTA性能。对三种蛋白靶点，ToolMol生成的配体结合亲和力比现有方法强>10%。在黄金标准的绝对结合自由能（ABFE）评分上，ToolMol配体比现有方法提升超过35%。
AI.conclusion: ToolMol通过工具调用使LLM能更准确地执行其计划的修饰操作，有效利用了LLM中强大的化学先验知识。这证明了将进化算法与LLM智能体相结合在药物设计领域的巨大潜力。

title: What Happens Before Decoding? Prefill Determines GUI Grounding in VLMs
summary: Existing training-free approaches for GUI grounding often rely on multiple inference runs, such as iterative cropping or candidate aggregation, to identify target elements. Despite this additional computation, each forward pass still independently interprets the instruction and parses the visual layout, without enabling progressive interaction among visual tokens. In this paper, we study what happens during GUI grounding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and identify a previously overlooked bottleneck. We show that grounding follows a two-stage paradigm: the prefill stage determines candidate UI elements, while the decoding stage subsequently refines the final coordinates. This asymmetry establishes prefill as the critical step, as errors in candidate selection cannot be effectively corrected during decoding. Based on this observation, we propose Re-Prefill, a training-free method that revisits inference by introducing an attention-guided second prefill stage to refine target selection. Specifically, visual tokens that consistently receive high attention from the query position, i.e., the final token, across layers are extracted as a preliminary target hypothesis and appended to the input, together with the instruction hidden states, enabling the model to deeply re-think its decision before coordinate generation. Experiments across four VLMs and five benchmarks, including ScreenSpot-Pro, ScreenSpot-V2, OSWorld-G, UI-Vision, and MMBench-GUI, demonstrate consistent improvements without additional training, with gains of up to 4.3% on ScreenSpot-Pro. Code will be available at https://github.com/linjiaping1/Re-Prefill.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Re-Prefill方法，通过引入注意力引导的第二预填充阶段，让VLM在生成坐标前重新思考目标选择，无需训练即可提升GUI grounding性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练自由的GUI grounding方法依赖多次推理（如迭代裁剪），但每次前向传播仍独立处理指令和视觉布局，未能实现视觉token间的渐进交互。作者发现GUI grounding遵循两阶段范式：预填充阶段确定候选UI元素，解码阶段细化坐标。预填充是关键瓶颈，因为候选选择错误无法在解码阶段有效纠正。
AI.method: 提出Re-Prefill方法：(1) 从查询位置（最终token）在各层持续获得高注意力的视觉token中提取初步目标假设；(2) 将这些视觉token与指令隐藏状态一起附加到输入中；(3) 引入第二预填充阶段，让模型在坐标生成前深度重新思考决策。
AI.result: 在4个VLM和5个基准（ScreenSpot-Pro, ScreenSpot-V2, OSWorld-G, UI-Vision, MMBench-GUI）上取得一致改进，ScreenSpot-Pro上提升高达4.3%。
AI.conclusion: Re-Prefill通过注意力引导的第二预填充阶段有效提升了GUI grounding的准确性，是一种无需训练、计算开销小的改进方案。

title: Finding a Crab in the C: Assured Translation via Comparative Symbolic Execution
summary: Modern high-assurance software systems development favors memory safe languages such as SPARK (ADA) or Rust. However, developers often encounter non-memory safe code (e.g., C) in legacy systems and libraries which would be prohibitively expensive or risky to re-write. In response, developers have begun turning to machine learning/AI systems and other automated code translators. Automated translation comes with its own risks, however. The original and ported code are not precisely the same, semantically - otherwise there would be no point in performing the translation. To reduce these risks, we have developed cozy, a comparative binary analysis tool that simultaneously analyzes a binary compiled from "unsafe" source code and a binary compiled from a translation of the source code to a memory safe language. cozy walks the developer through differences in the behavior of the two binaries, presenting each difference and asking the user to assess whether the difference is intentional (good) or erroneous. Outside of the flagged differences, the binaries are formally verified to be equivalent. Consequently, the review process guarantees equivalence modulo changes approved by the developer. cozy has applications to automated translation, bug correction, code reviews, operation authorization, and automatic translation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出cozy工具，通过比较分析不安全代码（如C）与迁移到内存安全语言（如SPARK/Rust）后的二进制文件，帮助开发者验证两者行为差异，确保除开发者批准的修改外完全等价。
AI.motivation: 高可靠性软件系统倾向于使用内存安全语言，但遗留系统中大量非内存安全代码（如C）重写成本高、风险大。机器学习/自动翻译工具带来语义不一致风险，亟需一种方法验证翻译后的等价性。
AI.method: 开发cozy工具，对源语言（不安全）和目标语言（内存安全）分别编译生成二进制文件，进行对比二进制分析。工具逐项展示行为差异，由开发者判断差异是预期的（好）还是错误的，未标记差异的部分通过形式化验证保证等价。
AI.result: cozy能够系统性地检测并展示两个二进制文件间的行为差异，支持开发者逐项审查，实现"等价模开发者批准的修改"的保证。
AI.conclusion: cozy可用于自动化翻译验证、缺陷修复、代码审查、操作授权等场景，为从非内存安全语言向内存安全语言的迁移提供可靠的等价性保障。

title: Revealing Interpretable Failure Modes of VLMs
summary:
Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in safety-critical applications because of their broad reasoning capabilities and ability to generalize with minimal task-specific engineering. Despite these advantages, they can exhibit catastrophic failures in specific real-world situations, constituting failure modes.
  We introduce REVELIO, a framework for systematically uncovering interpretable failure modes in VLMs. We define a failure mode as a composition of interpretable, domain-relevant concepts-such as pedestrian proximity or adverse weather conditions-under which a target VLM consistently behaves incorrectly. Identifying such failures requires searching over an exponentially large discrete combinatorial space. To address this challenge, REVELIO combines two search procedures: a diversity-aware beam search that efficiently maps the failure landscape, and a Gaussian-process Thompson Sampling strategy that enables broader exploration of complex failure modes.
  We apply REVELIO to autonomous driving and indoor robotics domains, uncovering previously unreported vulnerabilities in state-of-the-art VLMs. In driving environments, the models often demonstrate weak spatial grounding and fail to account for major obstructions, leading to recommendations that would result in simulated crashes. In indoor robotics tasks, VLMs either miss safety hazards or behave excessively conservatively, producing false alarms and reducing operational efficiency. By identifying structured and interpretable failure modes, REVELIO offers actionable insights that can support targeted VLM safety improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REVELIO框架，通过结合多样性束搜索和高斯过程汤普森采样，系统性地发现视觉语言模型（VLM）中可解释的故障模式，并在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在安全关键应用中存在灾难性故障，而现有方法难以在指数级组合空间中系统性地发现这些可解释的故障模式。
AI.method: REVELIO框架将故障模式定义为一组可解释领域相关概念的组合。采用两种搜索策略：多样性感知束搜索（高效映射故障景观）和高斯过程汤普森采样（探索复杂故障模式），以应对指数级离散组合空间的挑战。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶场景中，模型存在弱空间定位能力、忽略主要障碍物等问题，导致模拟碰撞；在室内机器人任务中，模型要么遗漏安全隐患，要么过度保守产生误报，降低运营效率。
AI.conclusion: REVELIO能够识别结构化且可解释的故障模式，为针对性提升VLM安全性提供可操作见解。

title: OceanCBM: A Concept Bottleneck Model for Mechanistic Interpretability in Ocean Forecasting
summary: Extreme ocean phenomena are challenging not only to predict but to diagnose, as accurate forecasts alone do not reveal the underlying physical drivers. While recent machine learning approaches achieve strong predictive skill, they remain largely opaque and provide limited guarantees of fidelity to ground-truth physics. We introduce OceanCBM, the first concept bottleneck model (CBM) for spatiotemporal prediction and mechanistic interrogation of ocean dynamics. OceanCBM uses mixed supervision to predict mixed layer heat content, a key precursor of marine heatwaves, while routing information through an intermediate layer of prescribed concepts derived from geophysical fluid dynamics and a 'free' concept. This design imposes soft physical structure without over-constraining the model, and the free concept both regularizes concept predictions and captures residual physical processes. Across ensemble initializations, we show that mixed supervision yields consistent mechanistic representations, whereas prediction-only and prescription-only baselines learn highly variable latent structures despite similar predictive performance. OceanCBM achieves interpretable, physically grounded representations without sacrificing skill, explicitly characterizing the interpretability-performance trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OceanCBM，首个用于海洋极端现象时空预测与机制解释的概念瓶颈模型，通过混合监督学习在保持预测性能的同时实现物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: 极端海洋现象难以诊断其物理驱动机制，现有机器学习模型预测能力强但缺乏可解释性，且无法保证符合真实物理过程。
AI.method: 提出OceanCBM概念瓶颈模型，使用混合监督学习预测混合层热含量（海洋热浪前兆），通过预设地球物理流体力学的概念层加一个"自由概念"层路由信息，实现软物理约束而不过度限制模型。
AI.result: 混合监督学习产生一致的机制表征，而纯预测或纯约束基线学习到高度可变的潜在结构；OceanCBM在不牺牲预测性能的情况下实现可解释、物理基础的表示。
AI.conclusion: OceanCBM成功量化了可解释性与性能之间的权衡，为海洋动力学提供兼具预测精度和物理忠实度的可解释工具。

title: When and Why is Optimistic Multiplicative Weights Slow? The Geometry of Energy Dissipation
summary: This paper studies the convergence of the Optimistic Multiplicative Weights Update algorithm (OMWU) in two player zero-sum games. Recent works have identified instances on which the last-iterate of OMWU can converge arbitrarily slowly, but understanding when and why this slow convergence occurs has remained open. In this work, we develop a new analysis framework that gives sharp, quantitative explanations for this behavior. Our analysis is based on viewing the algorithm's dual iterates as an optimistic skew-gradient descent with respect to an energy function. We prove over the dual iterates that energy is dissipative, and by establishing tight bounds on the magnitude of dissipation, our analysis quantifies the geometric bottlenecks that arise when the corresponding primal iterates are close to the simplex boundary. This further translates into a new linear last-iterate convergence rate in KL divergence on games with a unique and interior Nash equilibrium. Compared to prior work, this new rate contains a much sharper dependence on game-specific constants, and we prove this dependence is optimal. Moreover, these geometric insights further translate into new separations on uniform convergence rates for OMWU. On the one hand, we prove constant lower bounds on the uniform best-iterate convergence rate in KL divergence and total variation distance from Nash. On the other hand, we establish for the $2\times 2$ setting a new ${\widetilde O}(T^{-1/2})$ best-iterate rate in duality gap, improving substantially over prior work. Together, this shows in general that uniform convergence rate guarantees do not transfer across different measures of distance to Nash.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了乐观乘法权重更新算法（OMWU）在两人零和博弈中的收敛性，提出了一种新的分析框架，通过将算法的对偶迭代视为关于能量函数的乐观斜梯度下降，定量解释了OMWU慢收敛的原因，并证明了在具有唯一内部纳什均衡的博弈中，KL散度下新的线性收敛率及其最优性。此外，揭示了不同距离度量下均匀收敛率之间的不可转移性。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明OMWU的最后一步收敛可能任意慢，但何时及为何发生这种慢收敛尚不明确。本文旨在给出定量、精确的解释，并填补对收敛率依赖博弈常数的理论空白。
AI.method: 将OMWU的对偶迭代重新解释为关于某个能量函数的乐观斜梯度下降，证明能量耗散性，并通过建立耗散幅度的紧界来量化几何瓶颈（原始迭代接近单纯形边界时产生）。
AI.result: 1) 在具有唯一内部纳什均衡的博弈中，得到KL散度下新的线性最后一步收敛率，其对博弈常数的依赖更尖锐且被证明最优；2) 在KL散度和总变差距离下，证明均匀最好一步收敛率存在常数下界；3) 在2×2博弈中，得到对偶间隙下Õ(T^{-1/2})的均匀最好一步收敛率，大幅优于先前工作。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了不同距离度量下OMWU均匀收敛率不可互相转化的本质，指出几何瓶颈（单纯形边界附近的原始迭代）是理解OMWU收敛行为的关键。

title: Differences in Text Generated by Diffusion and Autoregressive Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) are promising alternatives to autoregressive language models (ARMs), yet the intrinsic differences in their generated text remain underexplored. We first find empirically that off-the-shelf DLMs exhibit lower $n$-gram entropy, higher semantic coherence, and higher semantic diversity. To understand the cause, we conduct controlled experiments that decouple the effects of training objectives and decoding algorithms. Results suggest that the DLM training objective contributes to the increases in semantic coherence and semantic diversity, but has a minor influence on entropy. These differences are primarily driven by the bidirectional context; other components in the training objective, such as input masking, label masking, and the weighting function, have a much weaker influence. Further, our experiments demonstrate that the reduction in entropy stems from DLMs' decoding algorithms, particularly confidence-based remasking strategies. We provide a theoretical understanding for this entropy reduction phenomenon. Together, our work uncovers key mechanisms underlying the differences between DLMs and ARMs in text generation, and informs future design of training objectives and decoding algorithms in DLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现扩散语言模型（DLMs）相比自回归语言模型（ARMs）生成的文本具有更低的n-gram熵、更高的语义连贯性和更高的语义多样性。通过控制实验发现，DLM训练目标增强了语义连贯性和多样性，而熵的降低主要源于解码算法中的置信度重掩码策略。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽被认为是自回归语言模型的有前途替代方案，但两者生成文本的内在差异尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 首先通过经验观察对比DLMs和ARMs生成文本的统计特征（n-gram熵、语义连贯性、语义多样性），然后设计控制实验解耦训练目标和解码算法的影响，最后进行理论分析解释熵降低现象。
AI.result: 1) DLM训练目标提升了语义连贯性和语义多样性，但对熵影响较小；2) 这些差异主要由双向上下文驱动，输入掩码、标签掩码、加权函数等成分影响较弱；3) 熵的降低源于DLM的解码算法，尤其是置信度重掩码策略。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了DLMs与ARMs在文本生成中差异的关键机制，为未来DLMs训练目标和解码算法的设计提供了指导。

title: A Standardized Re-evaluation of Conversational Recommender Systems on the ReDial Dataset
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of the 49th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR '26), July 20--24, 2026, Melbourne, VIC, Australia
summary: Recent years have seen a surge of research into conversational recommender systems (CRS). Among existing datasets, ReDial is the most widely used benchmark, cited in hundreds of studies. However, variations in how the dataset is preprocessed and used in experiments, particularly in the definition of ground-truth items, make it difficult to compare results across studies. These comparisons are further complicated by confounding factors such as the choice of the underlying large language model (LLM) and the use of external data sources. In this work, we revisit seven prominent CRS methods across three architectural families and evaluate them under standardized conditions. Our reproducibility study reveals a ``granularity gap,'' where fine-grained ranking (Recall@1) is highly sensitive to implementation details, while our replicability analysis shows that nearly 50% of reported accuracy stems from ``repetition shortcuts'' that are absent in novelty-focused evaluation. Furthermore, we find that performance gains are often driven more by the capacity of the LLM backbone than by specific architectural innovations. Finally, by applying user-centric utility metrics, we demonstrate that traditional recall frequently overstates a system's actual conversational effectiveness. This work establishes a transparent, controlled baseline and promotes evaluation practices that prioritize novelty and interaction efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地复现了7种主流通话推荐系统方法，发现：(1) 存在“粒度鸿沟”，细粒度排名指标对实现细节高度敏感；(2) 近50%的准确率来自“重复捷径”；(3) 性能提升更多来自LLM骨干能力而非架构创新；(4) 传统召回率高估了实际对话效果。研究倡导以新颖性和交互效率为导向的评估标准。
AI.motivation: 现有通话推荐系统（CRS）研究中，数据集预处理方式、ground-truth定义、LLM选择和外部数据使用等因素不一致，导致不同研究间难以进行公平比较，亟需建立标准化评估基线。
AI.method: 选取7种代表性CRS方法（涵盖三种架构家族），在ReDial数据集上进行标准化条件评估。通过复现性分析（reproducibility）发现细粒度排名指标的敏感性；通过可复制性分析（replicability）量化“重复捷径”对准确率的贡献；通过对比LLM骨干与架构创新对性能的影响，以及引入用户中心效用指标进行综合评估。
