AI.result: (1) 细粒度召回率（Recall@1）对实现细节高度敏感，存在“粒度鸿沟”；(2) 近50%的报告准确率来自“重复捷径”（即推荐用户已交互过的物品），在新颖性评估下显著下降；(3) 性能提升更多取决于LLM骨干的容量，而非具体架构创新；(4) 传统召回率指标夸大系统的实际对话效果。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个透明、可控的标准化基线，并倡导以新颖性和交互效率为核心的评估实践，以推动通话推荐系统的可复现性和实用性发展。

title: SSDA: Bridging Spectral and Structural Gaps via Dual Adaptation for Vision-Based Time Series Forecasting
summary: Large vision models (LVMs) have recently proven to be surprisingly effective time series forecasters, simply by rendering temporal data as images. This success, how ever, rests on a largely unexamined premise: the rendered time series images are sufficiently close to natural images for knowledge in pre-trained models to transfer effectively. We argue that two gaps still remain, i.e., spectral and structural gaps, fundamentally limiting the potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. Spectrally, we systematically reveal that rendered time series images exhibit a markedly shallower power spectrum than the natural images LVMs are pre-trained to recognize. Structurally, reshaping 1D temporal sequences into 2D grids fabricates spurious spatial adjacencies while severing genuine temporal continuities, misleading the spatial inductive biases of pre-trained LVMs. To bridge these gaps, we propose SSDA, a dual-branch network that spectrally and structurally adapts to unlock the full potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. At the data level, a Spectral Magnitude Aligner (SMA) applies 2D FFT to selectively enhance the magnitude spectrum toward natural-image statistics while preserving phase. At the model level, a Structural-Guided Low-Rank Adaptation (SG-LoRA) injects position-aware temporal encodings into patch embeddings and adapts at tention via low-rank updates. The two branches are further adaptively fused to produce the final forecast. Extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks demonstrate that SSDA consistently outperforms strong LVM- and LLM-based baselines under both full-shot and few-shot settings. Code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SSDA-8C5B.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSDA，一种双分支网络，通过频谱幅度对齐（SMA）和结构引导低秩适应（SG-LoRA）弥合预训练大视觉模型（LVM）在时间序列预测中存在的频谱和结构两大鸿沟，在七个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有工作直接将时间序列渲染为图像后利用预训练LVM进行预测，但忽略了两个关键问题：渲染的时间序列图像在频谱上比自然图像更浅（频谱鸿沟），且将1D序列重塑为2D网格会制造虚假的空间邻接关系、破坏真实的时间连续性（结构鸿沟），这两大鸿沟限制了LVM在时间序列预测中的潜力。
AI.method: 提出SSDA双分支网络：(1) 数据层面，频谱幅度对齐器（SMA）使用2D FFT选择性增强幅度谱使其接近自然图像统计，同时保留相位信息；(2) 模型层面，结构引导低秩适应（SG-LoRA）将位置感知的时间编码注入patch嵌入，并通过低秩更新适应注意力机制；(3) 两个分支自适应融合得到最终预测结果。
AI.result: 在七个真实世界基准上，SSDA在full-shot和few-shot设置下均一致优于基于LVM和基于LLM的强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过频谱和结构两个维度的针对性适应，可以充分释放预训练大视觉模型在时间序列预测任务上的潜力。

title: Project Life Cycles in Open-Source Software
summary: Using methods previously applied to product life cycles, this paper models developer engagement through the project life cycle for open-source projects, and detects similar dynamics in a cross section of projects. Endogenous growth theory is used to model growth dynamics in open-source software engineering, while incorporating the interactions between growth levels and developer activity over time using systems of differential equations. The solution to this model calibrates well to many open-source projects. The model generates an estimate of the lifetime developer engagement and growth, which supports estimating a lifetime production value of open-source projects.

AI.tldr: 本文运用产品生命周期方法，结合内生增长理论和微分方程组，对开源项目的开发者参与度进行建模，并通过截面数据验证了相似动态规律。模型能较好拟合多个开源项目，并估算出开发者终身参与度、增长趋势及项目的终身生产价值。
AI.motivation: 旨在量化开源项目中开发者参与度随项目生命周期的变化规律，填补开源软件工程中增长动态建模的空白，并为项目终身生产价值提供估算依据。
AI.method: 借鉴产品生命周期方法，引入内生增长理论，构建增长水平与开发者活动随时间交互作用的微分方程组模型，并通过截面数据检验动态一致性。
AI.result: 模型在多个开源项目上校准良好，成功生成了开发者终身参与度和增长轨迹的估算，进而支持项目终身生产价值的评估。
AI.conclusion: 该建模方法有效捕捉了开源项目的生命周期动态，为开源软件的经济价值评估和开发者行为预测提供了理论框架和实用工具。

title: Learning Transferable Latent User Preferences for Human-Aligned Decision Making
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as reasoning modules in many applications. While they are efficient in certain tasks, LLMs often struggle to produce human-aligned solutions. Human-aligned decision making requires accounting for both explicitly stated goals and latent user preferences that shape how ambiguous situations should be resolved. Existing approaches to incorporating such preferences either rely on extensive and repeated user interactions or fail to generalize latent preferences across tasks and contexts, limiting their practical applicability. We consider a setting in which an LLM is used for high-level reasoning and is responsible for inferring latent user preferences from limited interactions, which guides downstream decision making. We introduce CLIPR (Conversational Learning for Inferring Preferences and Reasoning), a framework that learns actionable, transferable natural language rules that represent latent user preferences from minimal conversational input. These rules are iteratively refined through adaptive feedback and applied to both in-distribution and out-of-distribution ambiguous tasks across multiple environments. Evaluations on three datasets and a user study show that CLIPR consistently outperforms existing methods in improving alignment and reducing inference costs.

AI.tldr: CLIPR是一个通过有限对话交互学习用户潜在偏好并生成可迁移自然语言规则，从而提升LLM推理与人类对齐的框架，在多个数据集和用户研究中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: LLM在推理时难以与人类对齐，现有方法要么需要大量重复用户交互，要么无法在不同任务中泛化潜在偏好，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出CLIPR框架，通过最小化对话输入学习可操作、可迁移的自然语言规则来表示用户潜在偏好，并通过自适应反馈迭代优化这些规则，应用于分布内和分布外的模糊任务。
AI.result: 在三个数据集和用户研究中，CLIPR在提升对齐效果和降低推理成本方面持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CLIPR能有效通过有限交互学习并泛化用户偏好，提升LLM决策与人类对齐的程度，同时具备更高的效率和实用性。

title: Learning to Decide with AI Assistance under Human-Alignment
summary: It is widely agreed that when AI models assist decision-makers in high-stakes domains by predicting an outcome of interest, they should communicate the confidence of their predictions. However, empirical evidence suggests that decision-makers often struggle to determine when to trust a prediction based solely on this communicated confidence. In this context, recent theoretical and empirical work suggests a positive correlation between the utility of AI-assisted decision-making and the degree of alignment between the AI confidence and the decision-makers' confidence in their own predictions. Crucially, these findings do not yet elucidate the extent to which this alignment influences the complexity of learning to make optimal decisions through repeated interactions. In this paper, we address this question in the canonical case of binary predictions and binary decisions. We first show that this problem is equivalent to a two-armed online contextual learning problem with full feedback, and establish a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{|H| \cdot |B| \cdot T} )$ on the expected regret any learner can attain, where $H$ and $B$ denote the sets of human and AI confidence values. We then demonstrate that, under perfect alignment between AI and human confidence, a learner can attain an expected regret of $O(\sqrt{|H| \cdot T\log T})$ and, when $\sqrt{|H|} = O(\log T)$ and $B$ is countable, a non-trivial generalization of the Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz inequality improves the regret bound to $O(\sqrt{T\log T})$. Taken together, these results reveal that alignment can reduce the complexity of learning to make decisions with AI assistance. Experiments on real data from two different human-subject studies where participants solve simple decision-making tasks assisted by AI models show that our theoretical results are robust to violations of perfect alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI辅助决策中，AI置信度与人类置信度之间的对齐程度如何影响学习最优决策的复杂度。在二元预测与二元决策场景下，作者证明该问题等价于一个带完整反馈的双臂在线上下文学习问题，建立了期望遗憾的下界，并展示了完美对齐可以显著降低学习复杂度。实验验证了理论结果对对齐偏差的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明AI置信度与人类置信度之间的对齐程度与AI辅助决策的效用正相关，但尚未阐明这种对齐如何影响通过重复交互学习最优决策的学习复杂度。
AI.method: 将问题建模为带完整反馈的双臂在线上下文学习问题，推导出期望遗憾的理论下界；在完美对齐假设下证明改进的遗憾上界；利用Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz不等式的推广进一步优化边界；通过两个真实人类受试者实验数据验证理论结果的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 建立了Ω(√(|H|·|B|·T))的遗憾下界；完美对齐下实现O(√(|H|·T log T))的遗憾上界；当√|H|=O(log T)且B可数时，遗憾界可改进至O(√(T log T))。实验表明理论结果对对齐偏差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AI与人类置信度的对齐可以有效降低学习最优决策的复杂度，这一发现对AI辅助决策系统的设计和部署具有重要指导意义。

title: Learning Equilibria in Coordination Games via Minorization-Maximization
summary: This paper considers games where the utilities for agents are the sum of a term proportional to a social utility, and another term that is an individual cost or reward. The agents are assumed to be irrational in their perception of the individual cost or reward. The multi equilibrium game is regularized, and its strictly concave potential function is used to select a unique equilibrium. This selected equilibrium is shown to be an $ε-$equilibrium of the original game, where $ε$ is parametrized by the regularizing function. A minorization-maximization based iterative learning scheme is proposed to learn equilibria in this game. This scheme converges to the potential-optimal equilibrium, and has superior convergence behaviour in comparison to gradient and best response methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种多均衡博弈，通过正则化引入严格凹势函数来选取唯一均衡，证明该均衡是原博弈的ε-均衡，并提出一种基于MM（Minorization-Maximization）的迭代学习算法，该算法收敛于势最优均衡，且优于梯度和最优响应方法。
AI.motivation: 解决博弈中智能体因对个体成本/奖励的非理性感知而导致的多重均衡选择问题，以及现有方法收敛性不佳的问题。
AI.method: 对多均衡博弈进行正则化，构造严格凹势函数来选取唯一均衡；提出基于Minorization-Maximization（MM）的迭代学习算法。
AI.result: 正则化后选取的均衡是原博弈的ε-均衡（ε由正则化函数参数化）；MM算法收敛于势最优均衡，且收敛性能优于梯度和最优响应方法。
AI.conclusion: 正则化结合MM算法能有效解决非理性感知下的多重均衡选择和收敛问题，为博弈学习提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Exploring how EFL students talk to and through AI to develop texts
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) introduces new considerations for English as a foreign language (EFL) writing pedagogy. This study explores how students talk to and through AI by prompt engineering and negotiating authorship, respectively, and whether any patterns in the latter relate to students' writing performance. Using an exploratory mixed methods design, we analyzed screen recordings of 44 Hong Kong secondary students completing a Curricular Writing Task with AI Chatbots. Content analysis identified ten types of prompting strategies students employed, including questions, searches, and detailed instructions. From clustering these strategies, three distinct profiles of human-AI rhetorical load responsibility emerged: AI-dominant (52% of students), Human-dominant (25%) and Collaborative human-AI (14%). A MANOVA analysis indicated no significant multivariate effect of rhetorical load responsibility on three dimensions of students' writing performance: content, language, and organization. Students' prompting strategies and rhetorical load responsibility patterns have implications for their engagement and autonomy in EFL writing pedagogy.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析44名香港中学生的屏幕录制，发现学生与AI聊天机器人互动时采用十种提示策略，并聚类出三种人机修辞负载责任模式：AI主导型（52%）、人类主导型（25%）和协作型（14%）。但修辞负载责任对学生写作成绩（内容、语言、组织）无显著影响。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在EFL写作教学中有广阔应用前景，但学生对AI的互动模式（提示工程与作者权协商）以及这些模式与写作表现之间的关系尚不明确，需要系统探索。
AI.method: 采用探索性混合方法设计，收集44名香港中学生完成课程写作任务时的屏幕录制数据，通过内容分析识别提示策略类型，使用聚类分析归纳修辞负载责任模式，并通过MANOVA检验不同模式对写作成绩的影响。
AI.result: 识别出十种提示策略，聚类出三种人机修辞负载责任模式：AI主导型（52%）、人类主导型（25%）、协作型（14%）。MANOVA显示修辞负载责任对写作成绩（内容、语言、组织）无显著多变量效应。
AI.conclusion: 学生在与AI互动中表现出不同的提示策略与责任分配模式，尽管这些模式未直接影响写作成绩，但对EFL写作教学中的学生参与度和自主性具有教育学启示。

title: LeanSearch v2: Global Premise Retrieval for Lean 4 Theorem Proving
summary: Proving theorems in Lean 4 often requires identifying a scattered set of library lemmas whose joint use enables a concise proof -- a task we call global premise retrieval. Existing tools address adjacent problems: semantic search engines find individual declarations matching a query, while premise-selection systems predict useful lemmas one tactic step at a time. Neither recovers the full premise set an entire theorem requires. We present LeanSearch v2, a two-mode retrieval system for this task. Its standard mode applies a hierarchy-informalized Mathlib corpus with an embedding-reranker pipeline, achieving state-of-the-art single-query retrieval without domain-specific fine-tuning (nDCG@10 of 0.62 vs. 0.53 for the next-best system). Its reasoning mode builds on standard mode as its retrieval substrate, targeting global premise retrieval through iterative sketch-retrieve-reflect cycles. On a 69-query benchmark of research-level Mathlib theorems, reasoning mode recovers 46.1% of ground-truth premise groups within 10 retrieved candidates, outperforming strong reasoning retrieval systems (38.0%) and premise-selection baselines (9.3%) on the same benchmark. In a controlled downstream evaluation with a fixed prover loop, replacing alternative retrievers with LeanSearch v2 yields the highest proof success (20% vs. 16% for the next-best system and 4% without retrieval), confirming that retrieval quality propagates to proof generation. We have open-sourced all code, data, and benchmarks. Code and data: https://github.com/frenzymath/LeanSearch-v2 . The standard mode is publicly available with API access at https://leansearch.net/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出LeanSearch v2，一种针对Lean 4定理证明全局前提检索的双模式系统。标准模式通过层级非形式化Mathlib语料库和嵌入-重排序流水线，在单查询检索上达SOTA（nDCG@10 0.62）。推理模式通过迭代草图-检索-反思循环，在69个基准查询上恢复46.1%的真实前提组，优于其他系统。下游评估中替换为LeanSearch v2获得最高证明成功率（20%）。代码和数据已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有的语义搜索引擎和前提选择系统无法解决"全局前提检索"任务——即为一个完整定理找出所有必要的分散库引理。作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 双模式系统：(1) 标准模式：构建层级非形式化的Mathlib语料库，采用嵌入-重排序流水线进行单查询检索；(2) 推理模式：在标准模式基础上，通过迭代的草图-检索-反思循环进行全局前提检索。
AI.result: 标准模式nDCG@10达0.62（次优0.53）；推理模式在69个研究级定理基准上恢复46.1%的真实前提组（基线38.0%和9.3%）；下游证明成功率20%（次优16%，无检索4%）。
AI.conclusion: LeanSearch v2在全局前提检索任务上显著优于现有方法，且检索质量提升可直接转化为更好的证明生成效果。系统已开源并提供API访问。

title: M2Retinexformer: Multi-Modal Retinexformer for Low-Light Image Enhancement
comment: Accepted at 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
summary: Low-light image enhancement is challenging due to complex degradations, including amplified noise, artifacts, and color distortion. While Retinex-based deep learning methods have achieved promising results, they primarily rely on single-modality RGB information. We propose M2Retinexformer (Multi-Modal Retinexformer), a novel framework that extends Retinexformer by incorporating depth cues, luminance priors, and semantic features within a progressive refinement pipeline. Depth provides geometric context that is invariant to lighting variations, while luminance and semantic features offer explicit guidance on brightness distribution and scene understanding. Modalities are extracted at multiple scales and fused through cross-attention, with adaptive gating dynamically balancing illumination-guided self-attention and cross-attention based on the reliability of auxiliary cues. Evaluations on the LOL, SID, SMID, and SDSD benchmarks demonstrate overall improvements over Retinexformer and recent state-of-the-art methods. Code and pretrained weights are available at https://github.com/YoussefAboelwafa/M2Retinexformer

AI.tldr: M2Retinexformer是一种多模态低光图像增强框架，在Retinexformer基础上引入深度线索、亮度先验和语义特征，通过多尺度提取、交叉注意力融合和自适应门控机制，在多个基准数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Retinex的深度学习方法仅依赖单模态RGB信息，难以应对低光图像中的噪声、伪影和色彩失真等复杂退化问题。引入深度、亮度和语义等多模态信息可以提供光照不变的空间上下文、亮度分布指导和场景理解，从而提升增强效果。
AI.method: 提出M2Retinexformer框架：(1) 多尺度提取深度线索、亮度先验和语义特征；(2) 通过交叉注意力机制融合多模态信息；(3) 采用自适应门控动态平衡光照引导的自注意力和交叉注意力，根据辅助线索的可靠性进行调节；(4) 渐进式精炼流水线逐步优化增强结果。
AI.result: 在LOL、SID、SMID和SDSD四个低光增强基准数据集上，M2Retinexformer整体优于Retinexformer及其他最新方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态信息（深度、亮度、语义）的引入有效提升了低光图像增强性能，验证了跨模态融合和自适应门控机制的有效性。代码和预训练权重已开源。

title: AgentLens: Revealing The Lucky Pass Problem in SWE-Agent Evaluation
summary:
Evaluation of software engineering (SWE) agents is dominated by a binary signal: whether the final patch passes the tests. This outcome-only view treats a principled solution and a chaotic trial-and-error process as equivalent. We show that this equivalence is empirically false. We evaluate 2,614 OpenHands trajectories from eight model backends on 60 SWE-bench Verified tasks. Of these, 47 have enough passing trajectories to construct task-level process references, yielding a 1,815-trajectory evaluation subset. Among passing trajectories in this subset, 10.7% exhibit behavior we call a Lucky Pass: regression cycles, blind retries, missing verification, or temporally disordered exploration, implementation, and verification.
  We introduce AgentLens, a framework for process-level assessment of SWE-agent trajectories, and release AgentLens-Bench, a dataset of 1,815 trajectories annotated with quality scores, waste signals, divergence points, and 47 task-level Prefix Tree Acceptor (PTA) references. AgentLens builds PTA references by merging multiple passing solutions for the same task, and uses a context-sensitive intent labeler to assign actions to Exploration, Implementation, Verification, or Orchestration based on trajectory history rather than tool identity alone.
  On AgentLens-Bench, the quality score separates passing trajectories into Lucky, Solid, and Ideal tiers and further decomposes Lucky Passes into five recurring mechanisms. Across the eight model backends, Lucky rates range from 0.5% to 23.2%, and some models move by as many as five rank positions when ranked by quality score instead of pass rate. We release the anonymized project repository, including the AgentLens-Bench dataset and AgentLens SDK, at https://github.com/microsoft/code-agent-state-trajectories/.

AI.tldr: 本文指出SWE智能体评估仅看最终测试通过率会掩盖"侥幸通过"（Lucky Pass）问题。作者提出AgentLens框架，通过过程级评估（质量分数、浪费信号、发散点）区分Lucky、Solid、Ideal三类轨迹，发现10.7%的通过轨迹实为Lucky Pass，且不同模型后端排名会因此发生显著变化。
AI.motivation: 现有SWE智能体评估只关注最终补丁是否通过测试（二元信号），将"有原则的解决方案"和"混乱的试错过程"视为等价。作者通过实验证明这种等价性在经验上是错误的——10.7%的通过轨迹实际上是"侥幸通过"（Lucky Pass），表现为回归循环、盲目重试、缺少验证等行为。因此需要一套过程级评估方法。
AI.method: ① 在60个SWE-bench Verified任务上，用8个模型后端收集2,614条OpenHands轨迹，筛选出47个有足够通过轨迹的任务（1,815条子集）。② 提出AgentLens框架，通过合并多个通过解构建任务级前缀树接受器（PTA）参考，并用上下文敏感的意图标注器将动作分为探索、实现、验证、编排四类。③ 定义质量分数，将轨迹划分为Lucky、Solid、Ideal三个层级，并进一步分解Lucky Pass为五种机制。
AI.result: ① 通过轨迹中10.7%为Lucky Pass。② 不同模型后端的Lucky率从0.5%到23.2%不等。③ 按质量分数排名与按通过率排名相比，部分模型排名变动多达5位。④ 发布了1,815条带标注的AgentLens-Bench数据集及SDK。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠测试通过率评估SWE智能体具有误导性，过程级评估（如AgentLens的质量分数）能揭示更真实的模型能力差异。不同模型在"侥幸通过"率上的显著差异表明，评估标准应引入过程质量维度。

title: On the Size Complexity and Decidability of First-Order Progression
comment: This is an extended version of an identically-titled paper accepted for publication at IJCAI 2026. This version contains an appendix with further proofs
summary: Progression, the task of updating a knowledge base to reflect action effects, generally requires second-order logic. Identifying first-order special cases, by restricting either the knowledge base or action effects, has long been a central topic in reasoning about actions. It is known that local-effect, normal, and acyclic actions, three increasingly expressive classes, admit first-order progression. However, a systematic analysis of the size of such progressions, crucial for practical applications, has been missing. In this paper, using the framework of Situation Calculus, we show that under reasonable assumptions, first-order progression for these action classes grows only polynomially. Moreover, we show that when the KB belongs to decidable fragments such as two-variable first-order logic or universal theories with constants, the progression remains within the same fragment, ensuring decidability and practical applicability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了情景演算中知识库在动作影响下的演化问题，证明了三类动作（局部效应、正规、无环）的一阶进展在合理假设下仅呈多项式增长，且当知识库属于可判定片段时，进展结果仍保持在同一片段内，确保了实用性和可判定性。
AI.motivation: 知识库的进展（progression）通常需要二阶逻辑，计算复杂度高。已有工作识别了三类允许一阶进展的动作，但缺乏对这些进展大小的系统分析，而这对于实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 基于情景演算（Situation Calculus）框架，对局部效应、正规、无环三类动作的进展大小进行理论分析，证明多项式增长性；同时考察知识库属于可判定片段（如双变元一阶逻辑、带常数的全称理论）时的封闭性。
AI.result: 在合理假设下，三类动作的一阶进展仅呈多项式增长；当知识库属于可判定片段时，进展结果仍保持在同一片段内，不脱离可判定范围。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了进展大小系统分析的空白，证明了实用中一阶进展的可行性与可判定性，推动了推理动作理论在实际系统中的应用。

title: Population Risk Bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks Trained by DP-SGD with Correlated Noise
summary: We establish the first population risk bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) trained by mini-batch SGD with gradient clipping, covering non-private SGD as well as differentially private SGD (DP-SGD) with Gaussian perturbations that interpolate between independent and temporally correlated noise. This setting is substantially closer to practice than prior KAN theory along two axes: training is by mini-batch SGD, the standard recipe for modern networks, rather than full-batch gradient descent (GD); and correlated-noise mechanisms have empirically shown a more favorable privacy-utility tradeoff than independent-noise mechanisms. Our results cover the corresponding full-batch GD and independent-noise DP-GD results for KANs by Wang et al. (2026), while yielding sharper fixed-second-layer specializations. The technical core is a new analysis route for correlated-noise DP training in the non-convex regime. Temporal dependence breaks the conditional-centering structure underlying standard one-step SGD arguments, and the projection step obstructs the exact cancellation structure of correlated perturbations. We address these difficulties through an auxiliary unprojected dynamics, a shifted iterate that absorbs the current noise perturbation, and a high-probability bootstrap certifying projection inactivity. Combining this optimization analysis with a stability-based generalization argument yields the stated population risk bounds. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first optimization and population risk analysis of a correlated-noise mechanism for DP training beyond convex learning, in particular for neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文首次建立了使用小批量SGD（带梯度裁剪）训练的Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs)的种群风险界，涵盖了非私有SGD和带高斯扰动的差分私有SGD（DP-SGD），其中噪声可插值于独立噪声与时间相关噪声之间。技术核心是提出了非凸场景下相关噪声DP训练的新分析路径，通过辅助无投影动力学、吸收当前噪声扰动的移位迭代以及高概率引导认证投影非活跃性等技巧克服了时间依赖性带来的分析困难。
AI.motivation: 现有KAN理论仅分析了全批量梯度下降（GD）和独立噪声DP-GD，与实际中常用的mini-batch SGD及相关噪声机制存在差距。相关噪声机制在隐私-效用权衡上表现更优，但缺乏非凸场景下的理论分析。
AI.method: 提出新的分析路线处理相关噪声DP训练的非凸问题：引入辅助无投影动力学、使用移位迭代吸收当前噪声扰动、通过高概率引导认证投影非活跃性。结合优化分析与基于稳定性的泛化论证，推导种群风险界。
AI.result: 建立了mini-batch SGD训练KANs的种群风险界，覆盖非私有SGD和DP-SGD（含独立与时间相关噪声）。统一了全批量GD和独立噪声DP-GD的结果，并得到了更尖锐的固定第二层特化结果。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个超越凸学习（特别是神经网络）的相关噪声机制DP训练的优化与种群风险分析，填补了理论空白。

title: Offline Two-Player Zero-Sum Markov Games with KL Regularization
summary: We study the problem of learning Nash equilibria in offline two-player zero-sum Markov games. While existing approaches often rely on explicit pessimism to address distribution shift, we show that KL regularization alone suffices to stabilize learning and guarantee convergence. We first introduce Regularized Offline Sequential Equilibrium (ROSE), a theoretical framework that achieves a fast $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ convergence rate under \textit{unilateral concentrability}, improving over the standard $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{n})$ rates in unregularized settings. We then propose Sequential Offline Self-play Mirror Descent (SOS-MD), a practical model-free algorithm based on least-squares value estimation and iterative self-play updates. We prove that the last iterate of SOS-MD attains the same $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ statistical rate up to a vanishing optimization error of order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$ in the number of self-play iterations $T$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明仅用KL正则化即可实现离线双人零和马尔可夫博弈的纳什均衡学习，提出ROSE框架（达到$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$收敛率）和SOS-MD算法（实际模型无关方法，同样达到$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$统计率加$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$优化误差）。
AI.motivation: 现有离线双人零和博弈方法通常依赖显式悲观主义来处理分布偏移，本文旨在探索仅用KL正则化是否足以稳定学习并保证收敛。
AI.method: 1) 提出ROSE（正则化离线序贯均衡）理论框架；2) 提出SOS-MD（序贯离线自博弈镜像下降）实用算法，基于最小二乘值估计和迭代自博弈更新。
AI.result: ROSE在单边可集中性假设下达到$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$收敛率，优于未正则化设置的$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{n})$；SOS-MD的最后迭代达到相同$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$统计率，附加$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$的优化误差。
AI.conclusion: KL正则化单独足以替代显式悲观主义实现离线博弈的稳定学习，所提方法在理论和实用层面均取得显著改进。

title: In-Situ Behavioral Evaluation for LLM Fairness, Not Standardized-Test Scores
summary: LLM fairness should be evaluated through in-situ conversational behavior rather than standardized-test Q&A benchmarks. We show that the standardized-test paradigm can be structurally unreliable: surface-level prompt construction choices, although entirely orthogonal to the fairness question being tested, account for the majority of score variance, shift fairness conclusions in both the direction and the magnitude, and result in severe discordance in model rankings. We develop MAC-Fairness, a multi-agent conversational framework that embeds controlled variation factors into multi-round dialogue for in-situ behavior evaluation, examining how models' conversational behavior shifts when identity is varied as part of natural multi-agent interaction. Repurposing standardized-test questions as conversation seeds rather than as the evaluation instrument, we evaluate position persistence (how they hold positions, from the self-perspective) and peer receptiveness (how receptive they are to peers, from the other-perspective) across 8 million conversation transcripts spanning multiple models and identity presence configurations. In-situ behavioral evaluation reveals stable, model-specific behavioral signatures that could generalize across benchmarks differing in fairness targets and evaluation methodologies, a form of evidence the standardized-test paradigm does not offer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAC-Fairness多智能体对话框架，通过原位行为评估（而非标准化测试）来评价LLM的公平性，发现标准化测试范式存在结构性不可靠问题，而原位评估能揭示模型特有的稳定行为模式。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM公平性评估依赖标准化问答基准测试，但这种方式存在结构性缺陷：与公平性无关的提示词构造选择会显著影响评估结果，导致结论不一致和模型排名混乱。因此需要更可靠的原位行为评估方法。
AI.method: 提出MAC-Fairness多智能体对话框架，将标准化测试问题重新用作对话种子而非评估工具，在多轮对话中嵌入受控的身份变化变量，从自我视角评估立场坚持度（position persistence）和他人视角评估同伴接受度（peer receptiveness），生成800万条对话记录进行分析。
AI.result: 原位行为评估揭示了模型特有的稳定行为特征，这些特征能够跨不同公平性目标和评估方法的基准进行泛化，而标准化测试范式无法提供这种证据。
AI.conclusion: 标准化测试范式在评估LLM公平性上存在结构性不可靠问题，MAC-Fairness的原位行为评估方法能提供更稳定、更具泛化能力的公平性洞察。

title: Task-Aware Automated User Profile Generation for Recommendation Simulation Using Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agent simulation has emerged as a promising approach to meet the increasing demand for real-time and rigorous evaluation in modern recommender systems. A typical LLM-driven simulation framework comprises three essential components: the profile module, memory module, and action module. However, existing studies have primarily concentrated on enhancing the memory and action modules, with limited attention to profile generation, which plays a pivotal role in ensuring realistic agent behaviours and aligning simulated interactions with real user dynamics. Moreover, the scarcity of datasets specifically designed for recommendation simulations has led to heavy reliance on manually crafted profiles, significantly limiting the scalability and generalisability of simulation frameworks across different datasets. To address these challenges, this work proposes an Automated Profile Generation Framework for Recommendation Simulation, APG4RecSim, that constructs realistic, coherent, and robust user profiles with minimal supervision. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that APG4RecSim achieves the best overall performance on discrimination, ranking, and rating tasks, improving ranking quality by up to 7% in nDCG@10 and reducing rating distribution divergence by 8% in JSD compared to existing profile-generation baselines. Beyond overall performance gains, our results show that profiles generated by APG4RecSim are resilient to popularity- and position-induced biases and maintain stable performance across datasets and different LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出APG4RecSim，一种面向推荐系统模拟的自动化用户画像生成框架，能在极少监督下构建真实、一致且鲁棒的用户画像。在三个基准数据集上，该方法在区分度、排序和评分任务中均取得最佳表现，排序质量提升最高7%（nDCG@10），评分分布差异降低8%（JSD），且生成的画像对流行度和位置偏差具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的推荐模拟研究主要改进记忆和行动模块，对画像生成关注不足；同时缺乏专门用于推荐模拟的数据集，导致严重依赖人工构建画像，限制了可扩展性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出APG4RecSim自动化画像生成框架，包含profile module、memory module和action module，通过最小监督方式构建真实、一致且鲁棒的用户画像。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，APG4RecSim在区分度、排序和评分任务中均取得最佳性能。排序质量提升达7%（nDCG@10），评分分布差异降低8%（JSD）。生成的画像对流行度和位置偏差具有鲁棒性，且在不同数据集和LLM上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: APG4RecSim有效解决了推荐模拟中画像生成的可扩展性和泛化性问题，为基于LLM的推荐系统模拟提供了一种高效、鲁棒的自动化画像生成方案。

title: Pyramid Self-contrastive Learning Framework for Test-time Ultrasound Image Denoising
summary: The inherent electronic and speckle noise complicates clinical interpretation of ultrasound images. Conventional denoising methods rely on explicit noise assumptions whose validity diminishes under composite noise conditions. Learning-based methods require massive labeled data and model parameters. These pre-defined and pre-trained manners entail an inevitable domain shift in complex in vivo environments, so they are limited to a specific noise type and often blur structural details. In this study, we propose a pure test-time training framework for one-shot ultrasound image denoising and apply it to synthetic aperture ultrasound (SAU), which synthesizes transmit focus from sub-aperture transmissions. Our Aperture-to-Aperture (A2A) framework disentangles anatomical similarity and noise randomness from shuffled sub-apertures through self-contrastive learning in pyramid latent spaces. The clean image is then decoded from the anatomy space, while discarding the noise space. A2A is trained at test time on one noisy sample of SAU signals, so it fundamentally eliminates the domain shift and pretraining costs. Simulation experiments, including electronic noise levels of 0 to 30 dB and different inclusion geometries, demonstrated an improvement of 69.3% SNR and 34.4% CNR by A2A. The in vivo results showed 84.8% SNR and 25.7% CNR gains using only two aperture data of the heart in six echocardiographic views, liver, and kidney. A2A delivers clear images/signals across diverse imaging targets and configurations, paving the way for more reliable anatomical visualization and functional assessment by ultrasound.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种纯测试时训练的A2A框架，通过自对照学习解耦解剖相似性和噪声随机性，实现超声图像的一次性去噪，在模拟和活体实验中显著提升SNR和CNR。
AI.motivation: 传统去噪方法依赖显式噪声假设，在复合噪声条件下效果有限；学习方法需要大量标注数据和预训练，存在域偏移问题，且容易模糊结构细节。亟需一种无需预训练、无域偏移、能保留结构细节的超声图像去噪方法。
AI.method: 提出Aperture-to-Aperture (A2A)框架：从混洗的子孔径中，通过金字塔潜在空间的自对照学习，将解剖相似性与噪声随机性解耦；从解剖空间解码得到干净图像，丢弃噪声空间。整个网络在测试时仅用一个含噪SAU样本进行训练，无需预训练。
AI.result: 模拟实验：SNR提升69.3%，CNR提升34.4%（电子噪声0-30dB，不同包含几何形状）。活体实验：仅用两个孔径数据，心脏六视图、肝脏、肾脏的SNR提升84.8%，CNR提升25.7%。
AI.conclusion: A2A框架通过纯测试时训练彻底消除了域偏移和预训练成本，在多种成像目标和配置下均能产生清晰图像/信号，为更可靠的超声解剖可视化和功能评估铺平了道路。

title: Protocol-Driven Development: Governing Generated Software Through Invariants and Evidence
summary: Automated program synthesis has reduced the cost of producing candidate implementations, but it introduces a harder governance problem: determining which generated artifacts are admissible in a software system. Natural-language specifications remain semantically ambiguous, and example-based tests sample only part of the behavioral space. Used alone, neither provides a sufficient control boundary for automated software construction. We introduce Protocol-Driven Development (PDD), a development model in which the primary software artifact is a machine-enforceable protocol rather than implementation code. We define a protocol as the triplet P = (S, B, O), where S specifies structural invariants, B specifies behavioral invariants, and O specifies operational invariants. Their conjunction defines the admissible implementation space of a software component. Under PDD, implementations are treated as replaceable realizations discovered through constrained search. An implementation is admitted if and only if it satisfies the governing protocol and produces a verifiable Evidence Chain of compliance. Admission is therefore grounded not in trust in the generator, but in protocol satisfaction and recorded evidence. By combining ideas from formal methods, property-based testing, policy-as-code, and software provenance, PDD defines a governance layer for automated software engineering. Its organizing principle is simple: code is transient; protocol is sovereign.

AI.tldr: 本文提出协议驱动开发(PDD)模型，将机器可执行协议而非实现代码作为主要软件制品，通过结构、行为和操作三个维度的不变性约束定义可接受的实现空间，并引入证据链进行合规验证，从而为自动化程序合成提供治理层。
AI.motivation: 自动化程序合成降低了实现成本，却带来了更难的治理问题：如何确定哪些生成制品在软件系统中是可接受的。自然语言规约存在语义歧义，基于示例的测试仅采样部分行为空间，两者单独使用均无法为自动化软件构建提供充分的控制边界。
AI.method: 定义协议为三元组 P = (S, B, O)，分别规定结构不变性、行为不变性和操作不变性，三者的合取定义了软件组件的可接受实现空间；实现需满足协议并产生可验证的证据链方可被接纳。
AI.result: 提出了一种将形式化方法、基于属性的测试、策略即代码和软件溯源相结合的治理框架，使接纳机制基于协议满足和记录证据，而非对生成器的信任。
AI.conclusion: PDD的核心原则是"代码是暂时的，协议是至上的"，为自动化软件工程定义了治理层，从协议满足和记录证据的角度而非信任生成器的角度来解决自动化程序合成中的治理问题。

title: DisaBench: A Participatory Evaluation Framework for Disability Harms in Language Models
summary: General-purpose safety benchmarks for large language models do not adequately evaluate disability-related harms. We introduce DisaBench: a taxonomy of twelve disability harm categories co-created with people with disabilities and red teaming experts, a taxonomy-driven evaluation methodology that pairs benign and adversarial prompts across seven life domains, and a dataset of 175 prompts with human-annotated labels on 525 prompt-response pairs. Annotation by four evaluators with lived disability experience reveals three findings: harm rates vary sharply by disability type and will compound in non-text modalities, terminology-driven harm is culturally and temporally bound rather than universally assessable, and standard safety evaluation catches overt failures while missing the subtle harms that only domain expertise can recognize. Disability harm is simultaneously personal, intersectional, and community-defined: it cannot be isolated from the full context of who a person is, and general-purpose benchmarks systematically miss it. We will release the dataset, taxonomy, and methodology via Hugging Face and an open-source red teaming framework for direct integration into existing safety pipelines with no additional infrastructure.

AI.tldr: DisaBench是一个与残障人士共同设计的、针对大语言模型残疾相关危害的评估框架，包含12类危害分类、7个生活领域的评估方法及175条带标注的提示-响应对，发现现有安全基准系统性漏检残疾相关危害。
AI.motivation: 通用安全基准无法充分评估大语言模型对残障群体造成的伤害，缺乏专门针对残疾相关危害的系统性评估工具。
AI.method: 与残障人士和红队专家共同设计12类残疾危害分类体系；构建覆盖7个生活领域的良性/对抗性提示对评估方法；收集175条提示并对525个提示-响应对进行人工标注；由4位具有残障生活经验的评估者进行标注。
AI.result: 危害发生率因残疾类型而异且会在非文本模态中复合；术语驱动的危害具有文化和时间依赖性而非普遍可评估；标准安全评估能发现明显失败但遗漏只有领域专家才能识别的细微危害。
AI.conclusion: 残疾危害具有个人性、交叉性和社区定义性，不能脱离个人完整背景来孤立评估，通用安全基准系统性遗漏这类危害；研究将开源数据集、分类和方法论以集成到现有安全流程中。

title: Runtime Monitoring of Perception-Based Autonomous Systems via Embedding Temporal Logic
summary: Runtime monitoring of autonomous systems traditionally relies on mapping continuous sensor observations to discrete logical propositions defined over low-dimensional state variables. This abstraction breaks down in perception-driven settings, where such mappings require additional learned modules that are often computationally expensive, brittle, and semantically misaligned. In this work, we propose Embedding Temporal Logic (ETL), a temporal logic that performs monitoring directly in learned embedding spaces. ETL defines predicates through distances between observed embeddings and target embeddings derived from reference observations. This formulation allows specifications to capture high-level perceptual concepts, such as similarity to visual goals or avoidance of semantic regions, that are difficult or impossible to express using traditional predicates. By composing these predicates with temporal operators, ETL naturally expresses temporally extended and sequential perceptual behaviors. We introduce ETL monitors for evaluating specifications over bounded embedding traces, along with a conformal calibration procedure that provides reliable and safety-oriented predicate evaluation. We evaluate our approach across multiple manipulation environments to show that ETL achieves strong empirical agreement with ground-truth semantics, including accurate monitoring of temporally composed behaviors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出嵌入时序逻辑(ETL)，直接在学习的嵌入空间中进行运行时监测，通过嵌入距离定义谓词，避免了传统感知驱动系统中额外学习模块的昂贵、脆弱和语义不对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运行时监测依赖将连续传感器观测映射到低维状态变量的离散逻辑命题，这种抽象在感知驱动场景中需要额外的学习模块，而这类模块通常计算昂贵、脆弱且语义不对齐。
AI.method: 提出Embedding Temporal Logic (ETL)，在嵌入空间中通过观测嵌入与参考嵌入之间的距离定义谓词，结合时序算子表达序列化感知行为，并引入基于保形校准的可靠性评估机制。
AI.result: 在多个操作环境中验证，ETL与真实语义具有强实证一致性，包括对时序组合行为的准确监测。
AI.conclusion: ETL通过在嵌入空间直接定义时序逻辑，有效解决了感知驱动系统中运行时监测的语义对齐和计算效率问题。

title: DocAtlas: Multilingual Document Understanding Across 80+ Languages
summary: Multilingual document understanding remains limited for low-resource languages due to scarce training data and model-based annotation pipelines that perpetuate existing biases. We introduce DocAtlas, a framework that constructs high-fidelity OCR datasets and benchmarks covering 82 languages and 9 evaluation tasks. Our dual pipelines, differential rendering of native DOCX documents and synthetic LaTeX-based generation for right-to-left scripts produce precise structural annotations in a unified DocTag format encoding layout, text, and component types, without learned models for core annotation. Evaluating 16 state-of-the-art models reveals persistent gaps in low-resource scripts. We show that Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) using rendering-derived ground truth as positive signal achieves stable multilingual adaptation, improving both in-domain (+1.9%) and out-of-domain (+1.8%) accuracy without measurable base-language degradation, where supervised fine-tuning degrades out-of-domain performance by up to 21%. Our best variant, DocAtlas-DeepSeek, improves +1.7% over the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: DocAtlas是一个无需学习模型即可构建82种语言、9个任务的高保真OCR数据集和基准的框架，通过差分渲染和LaTeX合成生成统一DocTag格式的精确结构标注。实验表明，基于DPO的多语言微调优于监督微调，DocAtlas-DeepSeek在强基线上提升1.7%。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言的多语言文档理解因训练数据稀缺和基于模型的标注流程存在偏见而受限。
AI.method: 提出DocAtlas框架：1) 双管线——差分渲染原生DOCX文档和LaTeX合成生成右到左脚本；2) 统一DocTag格式标注布局、文本和组件类型；3) 使用直接偏好优化(DPO)以渲染得到的真实值作为正信号进行微调。
AI.result: 评估16个SOTA模型发现低资源脚本存在持续性差距。DPO相比SFT在域内(+1.9%)和域外(+1.8%)均有提升，而SFT导致域外性能下降高达21%。DocAtlas-DeepSeek在最强基线上提升1.7%。
AI.conclusion: DocAtlas通过无模型标注的合成数据生成和DPO偏好优化，实现了稳定的多语言自适应，且不牺牲基语言性能，证明了合成数据+偏好学习在低资源多语言文档理解中的有效性。

title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2 Models
summary: We introduce the multilingual Granite Embedding R2 models, a family of encoder-based embedding models for enterprise-scale dense retrieval across 200+ languages. Extending our English-focused R2 release, these models add enhanced support for 52 languages and programming code, a 32,768-token context window (a 64x expansion over R1), and state-of-the-art overall performance across multilingual and cross-lingual text search, code retrieval, long-document search, and reasoning retrieval datasets. The release consists of two bi-encoder models based on the ModernBERT architecture with an expanded multilingual vocabulary: a 311M-parameter full-size, and a 97M-parameter compact model built via model pruning and vocabulary selection that achieves the highest retrieval score of any open multilingual embedding model under 100M parameters. The full-size also supports Matryoshka Representation Learning for flexible embedding dimensionality. Both models are trained on enterprise-appropriate data with governance oversight, and released under the Apache 2.0 license at https://huggingface.co/collections/ibm-granite, designed to support responsible use and enable unrestricted research and enterprise adoption.

AI.tldr: IBM发布多语言Granite Embedding R2系列编码器模型，支持200+语言、52种语言+代码、32K上下文窗口，提供311M（支持MRL）和97M（压缩版）两种规模，均在Apache 2.0许可下开源。
AI.motivation: 扩展现有英文版R2模型的能力，使企业级稠密检索能够覆盖200多种语言，满足多语言文本搜索、代码检索、长文档检索及推理检索等多样化需求。
AI.method: 基于ModernBERT架构扩展多语言词汇表，训练311M参数的全尺寸模型；通过模型剪枝和词汇表选择压缩得到97M参数的紧凑模型，后者在1亿参数以下的多语言开源嵌入模型中取得最高检索分数。全尺寸模型还支持Matryoshka Representation Learning以实现灵活嵌入维度。
AI.result: 在多语言/跨语言文本搜索、代码检索、长文档检索和推理检索数据集上达到整体最优性能；97M紧凑模型在1亿参数以下开源多语言嵌入模型中检索得分最高。
AI.conclusion: 两个模型均在企业适用数据上训练并经过治理监督，以Apache 2.0许可开源，旨在支持负责任使用并促进无限制的研究和企业采用。

title: M3Net: A Macro-to-Meso-to-Micro Clinical-inspired Hierarchical 3D Network for Pulmonary Nodule Classification
comment: Published in Information Fusion (2026), 15 pages, 5 figures
summary: The accurate classification of benign and malignant pulmonary nodules in CT scans is critical for early lung cancer screening, yet remains challenging due to the multi-scale and heterogeneous nature of pulmonary nodules. While deep learning offers potential for auxiliary diagnosis, most existing models act as "black boxes", lacking the transparency and explainability required for trustworthy clinical integration. To address this issue, we propose M3Net, a novel 3D network for pulmonary nodule classification inspired by the hierarchical diagnostic workflow of radiologists, which integrates multi-scale contextual information from fine-grained structures to global anatomical relationships. Our framework constructs a progressive multi-scale input, from fine-grained nodule structures to local semantics and global spatial relationships. M3Net employs scale-specific encoders and ensures cross-scale semantic consistency through latent space projection and mutual information maximization. Extensive experiments on the public LIDC-IDRI dataset and a self-collected clinical dataset (USTC-FHLN) demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with accuracies of 86.96% and 84.24% respectively, outperforming the best baseline by 3.26% and 2.17%. The results validate that M3Net provides a more robust and clinically relevant solution for pulmonary nodule classification. The code is available at https://github.com/jylEcho/M3-Net.

AI.tldr: 提出M3Net，一种模仿放射科医生分层诊断流程的3D网络，通过多尺度输入和跨尺度语义一致性实现肺结节良恶性分类，在LIDC-IDRI和自建数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在肺结节分类中缺乏可解释性和透明度，难以满足临床信任需求，且难以处理结节的多尺度和异质性特征。
AI.method: M3Net构建渐进式多尺度输入（细粒度结构→局部语义→全局空间关系），使用尺度特异性编码器，并通过潜在空间投影和互信息最大化确保跨尺度语义一致性。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集准确率86.96%，自建临床数据集USTC-FHLN准确率84.24%，分别超过最佳基线3.26%和2.17%。
AI.conclusion: M3Net提供了更鲁棒且更具临床相关性的肺结节分类方案，代码已开源。

title: Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study
summary: Automated detection of vulnerability-fixing commits (VFCs) is critical for timely security patch deployment, as advisory databases lag patch releases by a median of 25 days and many fixes never receive advisories. We present a comprehensive evaluation of code language model based VFC detection through a unified framework consolidating over 20 fragmented datasets spanning more than 180000 commits. Across over 180 experiments with fine-tuned models from 125 M to 14 B parameters, we find no evidence that models acquire transferable security-relevant code understanding from code changes alone. When commit messages are available, they dominate model attention, and when removed, an attribution analysis shows that enriching diffs with additional intra-procedural semantic context does not shift model attention toward the code changes. Group-stratified evaluation exposes approximately 17% performance drops compared to random splits, while temporal splits on aggregated datasets prove unreliable due to compositional shift in the underlying project distributions. At a false positive rate of 0.5% all fine-tuned code-only models miss over 93% of vulnerabilities. Larger and more diverse training data or generative approaches show preliminary improvements but do not resolve the underlying limitations. To support future research on code-centric VFC detection, we release our unified framework and evaluation suite.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了基于代码语言模型的漏洞修复提交检测方法，发现该方法存在根本性局限：模型无法仅从代码变更中习得可迁移的安全理解，当移除提交信息后性能大幅下降，且在高精度要求下漏检率超过93%。
AI.motivation: 漏洞修复提交的自动检测对及时部署安全补丁至关重要，但现有漏洞数据库比补丁发布平均延迟25天，许多修复从未有安全公告。现有研究数据集碎片化、评估方法不统一，亟需系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建统一框架整合20多个数据集（超18万次提交），在125M到14B参数的多种代码语言模型上进行180余次微调实验，通过分组分层评估、注意力归因分析等方法进行全面评估。
AI.result: 模型无法仅从代码变更获得可迁移安全理解；提交消息主导模型注意力；移除消息后丰富语义上下文也无法转移注意力到代码变更；分组评估性能下降约17%；在0.5%假阳性率下所有纯代码模型漏检超93%的漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于代码语言模型的漏洞修复提交检测方法存在根本性局限，更大模型和更多数据无法解决。作者发布了统一框架和评估套件以支持未来研究。

title: CHAL: Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language
summary: Multi-agent debate has emerged as a promising approach for improving LLM reasoning on ground-truth tasks, yet current methodologies face certain structural limitations: debate tends to induce a martingale over belief trajectories, majority voting accounts for most observed gains, and LLMs exhibit confidence escalation rather than calibration across rounds. We argue that the genuine value of debate, and dialectic systems as a whole, lies not in ground-truth tasks but in defeasible domains, where every position can in principle be defeated by better reasoning. We present the Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language (CHAL), a multi-agent dialectic framework that treats defeasible argumentation as an engine for belief optimization. Each agent maintains a CHAL Belief Schema (CBS), a graph-structured belief representation with a Bayesian-inspired architecture, that facilitates belief revision through a gradient-informed dynamic mechanism by leveraging the strength of the belief's thesis as a differentiable objective. Meta-cognitive value systems spanning epistemology, logic, and ethics are elevated to configurable hyperparameters governing agent reasoning and adjudication outcomes. We provide a series of ablation experiments that demonstrate systematic and interpretable effects: the adjudicator's value system determines the debate's overall trajectories in latent belief space, council diversity refines beliefs for all participants, and the framework generalizes across broad fields. CHAL is, to our knowledge, the first framework to treat multi-agent debate as structured belief optimization over defeasible domains. Further, the auditable belief artifacts it produces establish the foundation for dedicated evaluation suites for defeasible argumentation, with broader implications for building AI systems whose reasoning and value commitments are transparent, aligned, and subject to human oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAL框架，将多智能体辩论从追求正确答案的任务转向可废止推理领域，通过图结构信念表示、贝叶斯启发架构和梯度驱动动态机制，实现结构化信念优化，并允许元认知价值系统作为可配置超参数参与推理和裁决。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体辩论方法存在结构局限：辩论轨迹呈现鞅性质、多数投票主导了性能增益、LLM跨轮次置信度升高而非校准。作者认为辩论的真正价值不在于追求确定性答案，而在于可废止领域——任何立场原则上都可以被更好的推理所推翻。
AI.method: CHAL框架包含三个核心组件：(1) CHAL信念模式（CBS），一种基于贝叶斯启发的图结构信念表示；(2) 梯度驱动动态机制，利用信念论点的强度作为可微目标进行信念修正；(3) 元认知价值系统，将认识论、逻辑学和伦理学等价值体系作为可配置超参数，控制智能体推理和裁决过程。
AI.result: 消融实验表明：(1) 裁决者的价值系统决定了对话在潜在信念空间中的整体轨迹；(2) 群体多样性优化了所有参与者的信念；(3) 该框架在广泛领域具有泛化能力。这是第一个将多智能体辩论视为可废止领域结构化信念优化的框架。
AI.conclusion: CHAL框架产出的可审计信念制品为可废止推理评估套件奠定了基础，对构建推理和价值承诺透明、对齐且可受人类监督的AI系统具有广泛意义。

title: Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation via Peer Successes and Failures
summary: Large language models are often post-trained with sparse verifier rewards, which indicate whether a sampled trajectory succeeds but provide limited guidance about where reasoning succeeds or fails. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers denser token-level supervision by training on student-generated trajectories, yet existing methods typically distill each rollout independently and ignore the other attempts sampled for the same prompt. We introduce Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a peer-conditioned distillation framework that uses the student's local rollout group to construct more informative teacher signals. MOPD conditions the teacher on both successful and failed peer rollouts: successes provide positive evidence for valid reasoning patterns, while failures provide structured negative evidence about plausible mistakes to avoid. We study two peer-context constructions: positive peer imitation and contrastive success-failure conditioning. Experiments on competitive programming, mathematical reasoning, scientific question answering, and tool-use benchmarks show that MOPD consistently improves over standard on-policy baselines. Further teacher-signal analysis shows that mixed success-failure contexts better align teacher scores with verifier rewards, indicating that the gains arise from more faithful, instance-adaptive supervision. These results indicate that effective on-policy distillation should exploit the student's multi-rollout trial-and-error behavior rather than treating rollouts as isolated samples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多 rollout 在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）框架，通过利用学生模型在同一提示上的多次采样结果（包括成功和失败轨迹）构建更丰富的教师信号，在编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用等基准上显著优于标准在线策略基线方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型后训练中使用的稀疏验证器奖励只能指示轨迹是否成功，无法提供细粒度的推理过程指导。现有在线策略蒸馏方法独立处理每个 rollout，忽略了同一提示下的多次尝试之间的相互信息。
AI.method: 提出 MOPD 框架，基于同批次 peer rollouts（同一提示下的多次采样结果）构建条件化教师信号。包括两种构建方式：正向 peer 模仿和正负样例对比条件化。教师信号同时利用成功轨迹提供正向证据，失败轨迹提供结构化负向证据。
AI.result: 在竞争性编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用等基准上，MOPD 一致优于标准在线策略基线。教师信号分析表明，混合正负样例的上下文能更好地使教师分数与验证器奖励对齐，增益源于更忠实、实例自适应的监督。
AI.conclusion: 有效的在线策略蒸馏应利用学生模型的多 rollout 试错行为，而非将各 rollout 视为孤立样本单独处理。

title: Training LLMs with Reinforcement Learning for Intent-Aware Personalized Question Answering
summary: Effective personalized question answering (PQA) in language models requires grounding responses in the user's underlying intent, where intent refers to the implicit ``why'' behind a query beyond its explicit wording. However, existing approaches to intent-aware personalization rely on multi-turn conversational context or rich user profiles, and do not explicitly model user intent during the reasoning process. This limits their effectiveness in single-turn settings, where the user's latent goal must be inferred from minimal input and integrated into the thinking and reasoning process. To bridge this gap, we propose IAP (Intent-Aware Personalization), a reinforcement learning framework that trains models to infer implicit user intent directly from a single-turn question and incorporate it into thinking steps through a tag-based schema for generating personalized, intent-grounded answers. By optimizing intent-aware answer trajectories under a personalized reward function, IAP reinforces generation paths that make implicit user intent explicit and produce responses that better align with the user's underlying goal. Through experiments on the LaMP-QA benchmark across six models, IAP consistently outperforms all baselines, achieving an average macro-score gain of around 7.5\% over the strongest competitor, demonstrating that modeling implicit user intent within the training objective is a promising direction for PQA.

AI.tldr: 提出IAP框架，通过强化学习让语言模型在单轮问答中推断用户隐式意图并生成个性化回答，在LaMP-QA基准上平均提升约7.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多轮对话或用户画像，无法在单轮场景中显式建模用户意图，限制了个性化问答的效果。
AI.method: 提出IAP框架，使用强化学习训练模型从单轮问题中推断隐式意图，通过标签化模式将意图融入推理步骤，并在个性化奖励函数下优化意图感知的回答轨迹。
AI.result: 在LaMP-QA基准上，IAP在6个模型上均优于所有基线，平均宏得分比最强基线高约7.5%。
AI.conclusion: 在训练目标中显式建模隐式用户意图是个性化问答的一个有前景的方向。

title: Benchmarking the Open Science Data Federation services to develop XRootD best practices
summary: Research has become dependent on processing power and storage, one crucial aspect being data sharing. The Open Science Data Federation (OSDF) project aims to create a scientific global data distribution network based on the Pelican Platform. OSDF relies on the XRootD and Pelican projects. Nevertheless, OSDF must understand the XRootD limits under various configuration options, including transfer rate limits, proper buffer configuration, and storage type effect. We have thus executed a set of benchmarks to create a set of recommendations to share with the XRootD and Pelican teams. This work describes the tests and results performed using National Research Platform (NRP) hosts. The tests cover various file sizes and parallel streams and use clients from various distances from the server host. We also used several standalone clients (wget, curl, pelican) and the native HTCondor file transfer mechanisms. Applying the methodology creates a possibility to track how XRootD and the Pelican layer perform in different scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文通过基准测试评估了OSDF中XRootD和Pelican在不同配置下的性能限制，为优化数据分发网络提供了配置建议。
AI.motivation: 科学数据共享依赖于高效的数据分发网络，OSDF项目旨在构建全球数据分发网络，但需要理解XRootD在不同配置选项下的性能极限（传输速率限制、缓冲区配置、存储类型等），以便优化系统。
AI.method: 在NRP主机上执行基准测试，涵盖不同文件大小、并行流数量、客户端距离等变量，使用wget/curl/pelican等独立客户端及HTCondor原生文件传输机制，评估XRootD和Pelican层在不同场景下的表现。
AI.result: 生成了针对XRootD和Pelican团队的配置建议，能够追踪不同场景下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法论可用于持续跟踪XRootD和Pelican层的性能，为科学数据分发网络的优化提供依据。

title: VideoSEAL: Mitigating Evidence Misalignment in Agentic Long Video Understanding by Decoupling Answer Authority
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. 33 pages, 13 figures. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Echochef/VideoSEAL
summary: Long video question answering requires locating sparse, time-scattered visual evidence within highly redundant content. Although current MLLMs perform well on short videos, long videos introduce long-horizon search and verification, which often necessitates multi-turn, agentic interaction. We show that existing LVU agents can exhibit "evidence misalignment": they produce correct answers that are not supported by the retrieved or inspected evidence. To characterize this failure, we introduce two diagnostics (temporal groundedness and semantic groundedness) and use them to reveal two pressures that amplify misalignment: prompt pressure from shared-context saturation at inference time and reward pressure from outcome-only optimization during training. These findings point to a structural root cause: the coupled agent paradigm conflates long-horizon planning with answer authority. We therefore propose the decoupled planner-inspector framework, which separates planning from answer authority and gates final answering on pixel-level verification. Across four long-video benchmarks, our framework improves both answer accuracy and evidence alignment, achieving 55.1% on LVBench and 62.0% on LongVideoBench while producing interpretable search trajectories. Moreover, the decoupled architecture scales consistently with increased search budgets and supports plug-and-play upgrades of the MLLM backbone without retraining the planner. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Echochef/VideoSEAL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出解耦的规划器-检查器框架解决长视频问答中的证据错位问题，通过分离长期规划与答案权威，在多个基准上提升准确性和证据对齐度。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频理解代理存在"证据错位"问题：能给出正确答案，但答案并非基于实际检索或检查的视觉证据。作者希望诊断并解决这一结构性缺陷。
AI.method: 提出解耦的规划器-检查器框架（Planner-Inspector），将长期规划与答案权威分离，最终回答需通过像素级验证的门控机制。同时引入时间接地性（temporal groundedness）和语义接地性（semantic groundedness）两个诊断指标。
AI.result: 在四个长视频基准上取得优异结果：LVBench 55.1%，LongVideoBench 62.0%。解耦架构随搜索预算增加一致性扩展，支持即插即用升级MLLM骨干网络而无需重新训练规划器。
AI.conclusion: 耦合代理范式的根本问题在于混淆了长期规划与答案权威，解耦设计能有效缓解推理时的提示压力（prompt pressure）和训练时的奖励压力（reward pressure），实现更可靠的证据对齐。

title: SWE-Cycle: Benchmarking Code Agents across the Complete Issue Resolution Cycle
summary: As autonomous code agents move toward end-to-end software development, evaluating their practical autonomy becomes critical. Current benchmarks hide friction by testing agents in pre-configured environments, and their static evaluation pipelines frequently fail when parsing fully autonomous trajectories. We address these limitations with SWE-Cycle, a benchmark of 489 rigorously filtered instances. SWE-Cycle evaluates agents across three isolated tasks, including environment reconstruction, code implementation, and verification test generation, as well as an end-to-end FullCycle task that integrates all three. The FullCycle task requires agents to work autonomously in a bare repository without human scaffolding. To reliably assess these complex execution paths, we developed SWE-Judge. By combining static code review with dynamic testing, this execution-capable evaluation agent accurately verifies functional correctness and eliminates the systematic measurement errors of traditional static parsers. We evaluate code agents powered by six state-of-the-art LLMs across these four tasks. The results reveal a sharp drop in solve rates when transitioning from isolated tasks to FullCycle execution, exposing critical bottlenecks in handling cross-phase dependencies and maintaining code quality. Together, SWE-Cycle and SWE-Judge provide a comprehensive framework for accurately measuring the end-to-end capabilities of autonomous software agents.

AI.tldr: SWE-Cycle 是一个包含 489 个实例的基准测试，通过环境重建、代码实现、验证测试生成及端到端 FullCycle 四项任务评估自主代码代理，并提出了结合静态代码审查与动态测试的评估代理 SWE-Judge，揭示代理从独立任务转向端到端执行时解决率显著下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试在预配置环境中评估代理，且静态评估管线无法解析完全自主的执行轨迹，导致评估结果存在摩擦和系统误差。
AI.method: 构建 489 个严格筛选的实例，设计四项独立/端到端任务；开发 SWE-Judge 评估代理，结合静态代码审查与动态测试来验证功能正确性。
AI.result: 基于六种先进 LLM 的代码代理在独立任务与 FullCycle 任务之间解决率出现显著下降，暴露出跨阶段依赖管理和代码质量维护的瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: SWE-Cycle 与 SWE-Judge 构成了一个全面衡量自主软件代理端到端能力的框架，能够准确揭示代理在真实场景中的自主性瓶颈。

title: BEHAVE: A Hybrid AI Framework for Real-Time Modeling of Collective Human Dynamics
summary:
Existing AI systems for modeling human behavior operate at the level of individuals or detect events after they occur. As a result, they systematically fail to capture the collective dynamics that determine whether a group remains stable or transitions into escalation or breakdown. We propose a different foundation: a group of interacting humans constitutes a complex dynamical system in the precise mathematical sense, exhibiting emergence, nonlinearity, feedback loops, sensitivity near critical points, and phase transitions between qualitatively distinct regimes. The state of such a system is not located within any single participant; it is distributed across mutual influence loops and observable through the micro-dynamics of the body.
  We introduce BEHAVE (Behavioral Engine for Human Activity Vector Estimation), a formal framework that models collective dynamics as continuous behavioral fields defined over an interaction space derived from observable physical signals. Kinematic micro-signals (position, velocity, body orientation, gestural activity) are structured into a directed interaction graph and aggregated into a basis of behavioral fields capturing distinct, non-redundant axes of collective state. The framework rests on one theorem and two structural propositions characterizing the tension field, the field basis, and the criticality index. Perception and forecasting layers are implemented using neural models, enabling data-driven learning and approximation of system dynamics. BEHAVE is formulated as a computational system for learning, representing, and forecasting collective dynamics from data. A working pipeline is demonstrated on a 7-agent negotiation snapshot. The same fields, recalibrated, apply to crowd safety, crisis-team dynamics, education, and clinical contexts.

AI.tldr: 提出BEHAVE框架，将人类群体互动建模为复杂动力系统，通过行为场（behavioral fields）从微观运动信号中捕捉集体动态，支持群体状态感知与预测。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型仅在个体层面建模或事后检测事件，无法捕捉决定群体稳定或崩溃的集体动力学（涌现、非线性、相变等）。
AI.method: 将群体视为复杂动力系统，从运动学微观信号（位置、速度、朝向、手势）构建有向交互图，聚合为行为场基；基于一个定理和两个结构命题定义张力场、场基和临界指数；使用神经网络实现感知与预测。
AI.result: 在7智能体谈判快照上展示了工作流程；框架可应用于人群安全、危机团队、教育、临床等领域。
AI.conclusion: BEHAVE为从数据中学习、表征和预测集体动态提供了计算框架，相同的场结构经标定后可跨场景迁移。

title: Plan Before You Trade: Inference-Time Optimization for RL Trading Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning agents for portfolio management are typically trained and deployed as static policies, with no mechanism for using price forecasts at inference time. We propose $\text{FPILOT}$ (**Fin**ancial **P**lugin **I**nference-time **L**earning for **O**ptimal **T**rading), a plugin inference-time optimization framework inspired by Model Predictive Control (MPC). Our key structural insight is that future prices mostly do not depend on one agent's portfolio allocation, so a suitable predictive model can produce a multi-step price trajectory without iterative action-conditioned rollouts as in typical reinforcement learning. At each decision step, we use the forecaster's predicted price trajectory to construct an allocation-based imagined return objective, and optimize the policy at inference-time before executing one step of the trade. Our framework is compatible with any pre-trained agent and adapts the policy to the forecaster's predictions without any retraining. Evaluated across five policy learning algorithms on the TradeMaster DJ30 benchmark, $\text{FPILOT}$ produces consistent improvements in total return and return-based risk-adjusted metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar), with stochastic policies benefiting more than deterministic ones. Further, using synthetic forecasts at calibrated quality levels, we show that gains consistently improve with forecaster quality, suggesting that our performance will improve based on advances in financial forecasting.

AI.tldr: FPILOT是一个受模型预测控制启发的推理时优化框架，通过在决策时利用价格预测模型构造多步回报目标来优化投资组合管理策略，无需重新训练即可提升多种预训练策略的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的强化学习投资组合管理策略在部署后是静态的，无法在推理时利用价格预测信息来调整决策，限制了策略适应市场变化的能力。
AI.method: 提出FPILOT框架：利用价格预测器生成多步价格轨迹，构建基于资产配置的想象回报目标，在每个决策步进行推理时策略优化，然后执行一步交易。该框架与任何预训练策略兼容。
AI.result: 在TradeMaster DJ30基准上，FPILOT对所有五种策略学习算法在总回报和风险调整指标（Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar）上均有一致提升，且随机策略比确定性策略获益更多。增益随预测器质量提高而持续改善。
AI.conclusion: FPILOT提供了一种无需重新训练即可将价格预测融入现有策略的有效范式，其性能提升依赖于金融预测技术的发展，具有很好的扩展性。

title: All Circuits Lead to Rome: Rethinking Functional Anisotropy in Circuit and Sheaf Discovery for LLMs
summary: In this paper, we present empirical and theoretical evidence against a central but largely implicit assumption in circuit and sheaf discovery (CSD), which we term the Functional Anisotropy Hypothesis: the idea that functions in large language models (LLMs) are localised to a unique or near-unique internal mechanism. We show that a single LLM task can instead be supported by multiple, structurally distinct circuits or sheaves that are simultaneously faithful, sparse, and complete. To systematically uncover such competing mechanisms, we introduce Overlap-Aware Sheaf Repulsion, a method that augments the CSD objective with an explicit penalty on structural overlap across multiple discovery runs, enabling the discovery of circuits or sheaves with strong task performance but minimal shared structure across a plethora of common CSD benchmarks. We find that this phenomenon becomes increasingly pronounced as the number of discovered sheaves grows and persists robustly across major CSD methods. We further identify an ultra-sparse three-edge sheaf and show that none of its edges is individually indispensable, undermining even weakened notions of canonical or essential components. To explain these findings, we propose a Distributive Dense Circuit Hypothesis and provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating that non-unique, low-overlap circuit explanations arise naturally from high-dimensional superposition under mild assumptions. Together, our results suggest that mechanistic explanations in LLMs are inherently non-canonical and call for a rethinking of how CSD results should be interpreted and evaluated.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验和理论证据反驳了电路与层发现（CSD）中的一个核心隐含假设——功能各向异性假说（即LLM中的功能被定位到唯一或近乎唯一的内部机制）。作者发现同一任务可由多个结构不同、同时忠实、稀疏且完整的电路或层支持，并提出重叠感知层排斥方法（Overlap-Aware Sheaf Repulsion）来系统性地发现这类竞争性机制。进一步识别出一个超稀疏的三边层，其每条边都不是不可或缺的。研究者提出分布密集电路假说并从理论上证明，在温和假设下，高维叠加现象自然会催生非唯一、低重叠的电路解释。结果表明，LLM的机械性解释本质上是非规范的。
AI.motivation: 挑战CSD领域中默认的"功能各向异性假说"（即每个任务对应唯一内部机制），揭示LLM中同一任务可由多个结构不同的电路/层同时支持的现象，并系统性地发现和解释这种竞争性机制。
AI.method: 提出Overlap-Aware Sheaf Repulsion（重叠感知层排斥）方法，在CSD目标函数中增加对多次发现运行间结构重叠的显式惩罚项，从而发现任务性能良好但共享结构极少的多个电路或层。
AI.result: 1）同一LLM任务可由多个结构不同、同时忠实/稀疏/完整的电路/层支持；2）随着发现的层数量增加，这一现象愈发明显，且在不同CSD方法中稳健存在；3）识别出一个超稀疏三边层，其中每条边都不是绝对必要的；4）从理论上证明了非唯一、低重叠的电路解释在高维叠加下自然产生。
AI.conclusion: LLM的机械性解释本质上是非规范的（non-canonical），不存在唯一"正确"的电路解释，这要求重新思考CSD结果的解释和评估方式。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Tutoring for Algorithm Tracing and Problem-Solving in AI Education
comment: Paper accepted to the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2026), co-located with ACL 2026
summary: Students learning algorithms often need support as they interpret traces, debug reasoning errors, and apply procedures across unfamiliar problem instances. In this paper, we present KITE (Knowledge-Informed Tutoring Engine), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based intelligent tutoring system designed to serve as a classroom teaching assistant for algorithmic reasoning and problem-solving tasks. KITE uses an intent-aware Socratic response strategy to tailor support to different student needs, responding with targeted hints, guiding questions, and progressive scaffolding intended to strengthen students' algorithmic problem-solving ability. To keep responses aligned with course content, KITE uses a multimodal RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant information from course materials. We evaluate KITE using three forms of assessment: RAGAs-based metrics for response grounding and quality, expert evaluation of pedagogical quality, and a simulated student pipeline in which a weaker language model interacts with KITE across two-turn dialogues and produces revised answers after receiving feedback. Results indicate that KITE produces contextually grounded and pedagogically appropriate responses. Further, using simulated students, KITE's feedback helped the student models produce more accurate follow-up responses on procedural and tracing questions, suggesting that its scaffolding can support algorithmic problem-solving. This work contributes a tutoring architecture and an evaluation approach for assessing retrieval-grounded explanations and scaffolded problem-solving feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KITE，一个基于检索增强生成（RAG）的智能辅导系统，用作算法推理与问题解决的教学助手。KITE采用意图感知的苏格拉底式回应策略，结合多模态RAG管道从课程材料中检索信息，为学生提供针对性提示和渐进式支架。实验通过RAGAs指标、专家评估和模拟学生对话验证了KITE在上下文相关性和教学适切性上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 学生在学习算法时，在解释执行过程、调试推理错误以及将程序应用到不熟悉的问题实例上常常需要支持。现有的教学工具难以提供个性化、与课程内容对齐的引导。
AI.method: KITE采用意图感知的苏格拉底式回应策略，根据学生不同需求提供针对性提示、引导问题和渐进式支架；使用多模态RAG管道从课程材料中检索相关信息以保持回应与课程内容一致。
AI.result: KITE能产生上下文相关且教学适切的回应；在模拟学生实验中，KITE的反馈帮助学生模型在程序性和追踪问题上给出更准确的后续回答。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种基于RAG的辅导架构以及一套评估检索支撑解释和支架式问题解决反馈的方法，表明KITE的支架策略能有效支持算法问题解决能力的培养。

title: Improving Diffusion Posterior Samplers with Lagged Temporal Corrections for Image Restoration
comment: 9 Figures, 9 Tables, Submitted to a conference
summary: Diffusion-based posterior sampling (PS) is a leading framework for imaging inverse problems, combining learned priors with measurement constraints. Yet, its standard formulations rely on instantaneous data-consistent estimates, which induce temporal variability in the reverse dynamics. We reinterpret PS from a dynamical perspective, showing that the standard PS update corresponds to a first-order discretization of the diffusion dynamics plus a residual correction capturing the mismatch between the denoised prediction and the data-consistent estimate. A second-order discretization, however, naturally introduces a temporal correction based on the variation of consecutive estimates. Building on this, we propose LAMP, combining the second-order update with the residual correction characterizing a PS technique. LAMP thus inherits a lagged temporal correction, and it can be implemented as a modular plug-in over the PS backbone. We show that LAMP preserves the structure of a posterior sampler, and we perform a one-step risk analysis to characterize when LAMP improves the reverse transition via a bias-variance trade-off. Experiments across multiple imaging tasks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines such as DiffPIR and DDRM, without increasing the number of denoising evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAMP方法，通过二阶离散化引入滞后时间校正，在不增加去噪评估次数的情况下，改进了扩散后验采样在成像逆问题中的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准扩散后验采样（PS）方法使用瞬时数据一致估计，导致反向动力学中存在时间变异性，作者希望从动力学视角重新解释PS并改进其更新方式。
AI.method: LAMP方法：将标准PS更新视为一阶离散化，提出二阶离散化方法，自然引入基于连续估计变化的时间校正项，并结合残差校正实现滞后时间校正，可作为模块化插件集成到PS框架中。
AI.result: 在多个成像任务上，LAMP一致性地优于DiffPIR和DDRM等强基线方法，且不增加去噪评估次数。
AI.conclusion: LAMP保留了后验采样器的结构，通过偏置-方差权衡改善反向转移，是一种有效且高效的即插即用改进方案。

title: UIBenchKit: A unified toolkit for design-to-code model evaluation
summary: Recent years have seen substantial progress in automated design-to-code generation, with many methods proposed for generating HTML and CSS from webpage screenshots. However, the absence of a standardized evaluation platform makes it difficult to compare these methods fairly, limiting both practical adoption and systematic research progress. To bridge this gap, we introduce UIBenchKit, an open-source, integrated toolkit designed to unify the evaluation of design-to-code tasks. UIBenchKit abstracts the complexities of environment setup, model inference, and code rendering, offering researchers a plug-and-play architecture to compare various methods under consistent settings. In addition, it offers an analytical interface for comparison across multiple metrics. Using UIBenchKit, we conduct a benchmarking study of existing tools and derive several findings that highlight directions for future improvement. By providing a streamlined environment for both experimentation and evaluation, UIBenchKit aims to accelerate future benchmarking and innovations in web engineering. The evaluation platform and toolkit are available at the project page https://www.uibenchkit.com/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UIBenchKit，一个开源的、集成的工具包，用于统一评估从截图到HTML/CSS代码生成任务的性能，解决了当前缺乏标准化评估平台的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前设计到代码的自动生成方法众多，但缺乏标准化评估平台，导致方法间难以公平比较，限制了实际应用和系统化研究进展。
AI.method: UIBenchKit是一个开源的集成工具包，抽象了环境设置、模型推理和代码渲染的复杂性，提供即插即用架构，并支持多个指标的对比分析。
AI.result: 利用UIBenchKit对现有工具进行了基准测试研究，得出若干发现，指出了未来改进的方向。
AI.conclusion: UIBenchKit通过提供简化的实验和评估环境，旨在加速未来Web工程领域的基准测试和创新。

title: State-Centric Decision Process
summary: Language environments such as web browsers, code terminals, and interactive simulations emit raw text rather than states, and provide none of the runtime structure that MDP analysis requires. No explicit state space, no observation-to-state mapping, no certified transitions, and no termination criterion. We introduce the State-Centric Decision Process (SDP), a runtime framework that constructs these missing inputs by having the agent build them, predicate by predicate, as it acts. At each step the agent commits to a natural-language predicate describing how the world should look, takes an action to make it true, and checks the observation against it. Predicates that pass become certified states, and the resulting trajectory carries the four objects language environments do not provide, namely a task-induced state space, an observation-to-state mapping, certified transitions, and a termination criterion. We evaluate SDP on five benchmarks spanning planning, scientific exploration, web reasoning, and multi-hop question answering. SDP achieves the best training-free results on all five, with the advantage widening as the horizon grows. The certified trajectories additionally support analyses unavailable to reactive agents, including per-predicate credit assignment, failure localization, partial-progress measurement, and modular operator replacement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出State-Centric Decision Process (SDP)框架，让智能体在语言环境中通过构建自然语言谓词来生成MDP所需的四个关键要素（状态空间、观测-状态映射、认证转移和终止条件），在五个基准上取得最优训练免费结果，并支持信用分配、故障定位等分析。
AI.motivation: 语言环境（如浏览器、代码终端等）只输出原始文本，缺乏MDP分析所需的显式状态空间、观测-状态映射、认证转移和终止条件，现有方法无法在这些环境中进行有效的结构化决策。
AI.method: SDP框架让智能体在每一步提交一个描述期望世界状态的自然语言谓词，执行动作使其成立，然后检查观测是否匹配该谓词。通过的谓词成为认证状态，从而构造出任务诱导的状态空间、观测-状态映射、认证转移和终止条件四个关键要素。
AI.result: 在规划、科学探索、网页推理和多跳问答五个基准上取得最佳训练免费结果，且优势随任务步数增加而扩大。认证轨迹还支持每个谓词的信用分配、故障定位、部分进度测量和模块化算子替换等分析。
AI.conclusion: SDP框架有效填补了语言环境与MDP分析之间的鸿沟，不仅提升了任务性能，还赋予了纯反应式智能体所不具备的结构化分析能力，为语言环境中的决策问题提供了新范式。

title: scShapeBench: Discovering geometry from high dimensional scRNAseq data
summary: High-dimensional point cloud data arise across many scientific domains, especially single-cell biology. The shapes or topologies of these datasets determine the types of information that can be extracted. For example, clustered data supports cell-type identification, trajectory structures support transition analysis, and archetypal structures capture continua of cellular behaviors. Existing analysis pipelines often assume a specific shape. The standard Seurat pipeline combines UMAP visualization with Louvain clustering and therefore assumes clustered data, while tools such as Monocle and SPADE assume tree-like structures, and flow-based models such as MIOFlow and Conditional Flow Matching target trajectories. Choosing which pipeline to apply is therefore often left to bioinformaticians who visually inspect datasets before selecting an analysis strategy. With the rise of agentic AI scientists, automating shape detection is increasingly important for selecting downstream analysis pipelines. To address this problem, we introduce scShapeBench, a benchmark dataset for shape detection containing both synthetic and expert-annotated single-cell datasets. Synthetic datasets are sampled from ground-truth skeleton graphs with controlled variance. Real single-cell datasets are curated from diverse sources and annotated by experts into four categories: clusters, single trajectory, multi-branching, and archetypal. We additionally introduce scReebTower, a baseline method that uses diffusion geometry to extract Reeb graphs and connect visualization with pipeline selection. We provide topology-aware evaluation metrics and compare scReebTower against PAGA and Mapper on synthetic and real data. Our results indicate that scReebTower outperforms existing baselines. Overall, our contributions span benchmarks, evaluation metrics, and a baseline for automated shape detection in single-cell data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 scShapeBench 基准数据集和 scReebTower 基线方法，用于自动化检测单细胞高维点云数据的形状（聚类、轨迹、多分支、原型），以辅助下游分析流程的选择。
AI.motivation: 现有单细胞分析流程通常假设特定数据形状（如聚类、树状、轨迹），手动选择流程依赖人工视觉检查。随着 AI 科学家兴起，需要自动化的形状检测方法来辅助下游分析流程选择。
AI.method: 构建 scShapeBench 基准数据集（包含合成数据和专家标注的真实单细胞数据，分为四类形状）；提出 scReebTower 基线方法，利用扩散几何提取 Reeb 图，连接可视化与流程选择；使用拓扑感知评估指标。
AI.result: scReebTower 在合成和真实数据上的形状检测性能优于 PAGA 和 Mapper 等现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献包括基准数据集、评估指标和基线方法，为自动化单细胞数据形状检测奠定基础，有助于智能选择下游分析流程。

title: Simulating Students or Sycophantic Problem Solving? On Misconception Faithfulness of LLM Simulators
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can fluently generate student-like responses, making them attractive as simulated students for training and evaluating AI tutors and human educators. Yet such simulators are typically evaluated by output similarity to real students, not by whether they behave like students with coherent misconceptions during interaction. We introduce a controlled framework for evaluating misconception faithfulness, whether a simulator maintains a misconception-driven belief state and updates selectively when feedback addresses the underlying misconception. Central to our framework is a misconception-contrastive feedback protocol that compares targeted feedback against two controls: misaligned feedback (targeting a different but plausible misconception) and generic feedback (only identifying answer is wrong). We propose Selective Flip Score (SFS), which quantifies how much more often a simulator flips its answer under targeted feedback than under contrastive controls. Across seven LLMs (4B-120B), multiple datasets, and prompting strategies, simulators exhibit near-zero SFS, correcting their answers at similarly high rates regardless of feedback relevance. Further analyses reveal a sycophantic failure mode: models behave less like students with misconceptions but more like problem-solvers who treat any corrective signal as a cue to abandon the simulated belief and re-solve from internal knowledge. To address this, we develop a post-training pipeline spanning supervised fine-tuning (SFT), preference optimization, and reinforcement learning (RL) with an SFS-aligned reward; SFT yields notable gains up to +0.56, and SFS-aligned RL provides more consistent improvements than preference optimization. Our results establish misconception faithfulness as a challenging yet trainable property, motivating a shift from static output matching toward interactive, belief-aware student modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出评估大语言模型作为模拟学生时是否具有"信念忠实性"（即保持错误概念并在针对性反馈下选择性更新）的框架，发现现有模型存在趋同奉承缺陷（将任何纠正信号视为重新解题的提示），并通过SFT和强化学习实现了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM模拟学生的评估仅关注输出相似性，忽略其在互动中是否像真实学生一样拥有连贯的错误概念体系。需要一种评估模拟器是否具有"错误概念信念忠实性"的方法。
AI.method: 提出错误概念对比反馈协议（对比针对性反馈、错配反馈和通用反馈）和选择性翻转分数（SFS）量化指标，并开发包含SFT、偏好优化和强化学习的后训练流程。
AI.result: 7个LLM（4B-120B）在多个数据集上SFS接近零，即无论反馈是否相关，模型都以同样高概率纠正答案；发现趋同奉承模式：模型更像解题者而非保持错误概念的学生。
AI.conclusion: 错误概念信念忠实性是一个具有挑战性但可训练的性质，SFT带来显著提升（+0.56），SFS对齐的强化学习比偏好优化更稳定。

title: ViDR: Grounding Multimodal Deep Research Reports in Source Visual Evidence
summary: Recent deep research systems have improved the ability of large language models to produce long, grounded reports through iterative retrieval and reasoning. However, most text-centered systems rely mainly on textual evidence, while multimodal systems often retrieve images only weakly or generate charts themselves, leaving source figures underused as evidence. We present ViDR, a multimodal deep research framework that grounds long-form reports in source figures. ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

AI.tldr: ViDR 是一个多模态深度研究框架，将源图表视为可检索、可解释、可路由和可验证的证据对象，通过证据索引大纲、上下文感知过滤、大纲感知重排序和 VLM 视觉分析等模块，在长文报告中充分利用源视觉证据，并提出了 MMR Bench+ 基准来评估视觉证据的使用。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度研究系统主要依赖文本证据，多模态系统要么弱化地检索图像，要么自己生成图表，未能充分利用源图表作为证据，导致报告的多模态证据基础薄弱。
AI.method: ViDR 框架包含：(1) 证据索引大纲，将文本和视觉证据与报告声明关联；(2) 上下文感知过滤和轮廓感知重排序来去噪网页图像；(3) VLM 视觉分析提取源图表证据原子；(4) 逐节证据生成；(5) 视觉引用验证减少幻觉或错位的图表。
AI.result: ViDR 在整体报告质量、源图表整合和可验证性方面均优于强商业和开源基线模型，验证了源视觉证据对多模态深度研究的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 源视觉证据对于多模态深度研究至关重要，能够增强报告的实证基础、视觉支持和可验证性。

title: DistractMIA: Black-Box Membership Inference on Vision-Language Models via Semantic Distraction
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are trained on large-scale image-text corpora that may contain private, copyrighted, or otherwise sensitive data, motivating membership inference as a tool for training-data auditing. This is especially challenging for deployed VLMs, where auditors typically observe only generated textual responses. Existing VLM membership inference attacks either rely on probability-level signals unavailable in such settings, or use mask-based semantic prediction tasks whose effectiveness depends on object-centric visual assumptions. To address these limitations, we propose DistractMIA, an output-only black-box framework based on semantic distraction. Rather than removing visual evidence, DistractMIA preserves the original image, inserts a known semantic distractor, and measures how generated responses change. This design is motivated by the intuition that member samples remain more anchored to the original image semantics, while non-member samples are more easily redirected toward the distractor. To make this signal reliable, DistractMIA calibrates distractor configurations on a reference set and derives membership scores from repeated textual generations, capturing response stability and distractor uptake without accessing logits, probabilities, or hidden states. Experiments across multiple VLMs and benchmarks show that DistractMIA consistently outperforms both output-only and stronger-access baselines. Its performance on a medical benchmark further demonstrates applicability beyond object-centric natural images.

AI.tldr: 提出DistractMIA，一种仅基于输出（黑盒）的成员推理攻击方法，通过语义干扰来判定视觉语言模型（VLM）训练数据中的成员样本，无需访问概率或隐藏状态。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM成员推理攻击要么需要概率级信号（不适用部署场景），要么依赖基于掩码的语义预测任务（受限于以物体为中心的视觉假设）。需要一种仅依赖生成文本输出的黑盒方法。
AI.method: 保留原始图像，插入已知的语义干扰物，观察生成响应的变化。成员样本更锚定原始语义，非成员样本更容易被干扰物引导。通过参考集校准干扰配置，从多次文本生成中推导成员分数。
AI.result: 在多个VLM和基准测试中，DistractMIA一致优于纯输出基线以及更强访问权限的基线，在医学基准上也表现良好。
AI.conclusion: DistractMIA是一种有效的、仅依赖文本输出的VLM成员推理攻击方法，超越了现有方法，且适用于非以物体为中心的数据（如医学图像）。
