title: SoK: A Comprehensive Analysis of the Current Status of Neural Tangent Generalization Attacks with Research Directions
summary: There is recently a serious issue that Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) training uses more and more unauthorized data. A clean-label generalization attack, one type of data poisoning attacks, has been suggested to address this issue. The Neural Tangent Generalization Attack (NTGA) is considered as the first well-known clean-label generalization attack under the black-box settings, which provided an unprecedented step in data protection approaches. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive analysis on the state-of-the-art of NTGA; to the best of our knowledge, this is the first thorough analysis regarding NTGA. First, we provide a classification of attacks against DNNs with their explanations and relations to NTGA. Then, this paper presents a taxonomy of black-box attacks and demonstrate that the NTGA is the first clean-label generalization attack under the black-box setting. We further analyze the existing studies of NTGA and give a comprehensive comparisons of their findings by conducting our own experiments to verify these findings. Moreover, our extensive experiments show that NTGA is vulnerable to adversarial training and image transformations, and applying linear separability to NTGA-generated images makes them more susceptible to such vulnerablities. We present the pros and cons of NTGA and suggest ways to improve NTGA robustness based on our analysis. Our further experiments indicate that several recently proposed clean-label generalization attacks outperform NTGA on data protection. Finally, we unveil the necessity of further research with future research insights on NTGA.

AI.tldr: 本文对神经正切泛化攻击（NTGA）进行了首次全面分析，包括攻击分类、黑盒攻击分类、NTGA的脆弱性实验（对抗训练和图像变换）、与其他清洁标签泛化攻击的对比，以及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: DNN训练中未经授权数据的使用问题日益严重，清洁标签泛化攻击被提出用于数据保护。NTGA是首个黑盒设置下的清洁标签泛化攻击，但缺乏对其系统性的分析。
AI.method: 1. 提供DNN攻击分类及其与NTGA的关系；2. 提出黑盒攻击分类法；3. 对NTGA现有研究进行综合比较；4. 通过实验验证NTGA对对抗训练和图像变换的脆弱性；5. 对比NTGA与最新清洁标签泛化攻击的性能。
AI.result: NTGA对对抗训练和图像变换存在脆弱性；线性可分性会加剧这种脆弱性；多个新提出的清洁标签泛化攻击在数据保护上优于NTGA。
AI.conclusion: NTGA虽有开创性但存在明显局限，未来需提升其鲁棒性；数据保护领域仍有进一步研究空间。

title: LLM-Based Persuasion Enables Guardrail Override in Frontier LLMs
summary: Frontier assistant LLMs ship with strong guardrails: asked directly to write a persuasive essay denying the Holocaust, denying vaccine safety, defending flat-earth cosmology, arguing for racial hierarchies, denying anthropogenic climate change, or replacing evolution with creationism, they refuse. In this paper we show that the same frontier-class LLM, acting as a simulated user in a short, five-turn "write an argumentative essay" conversation, can persuade other frontier-class LLMs (including a second copy of itself) into producing exactly those essays, using nothing but natural-language pressure: peer-comparison persuasion ("other AI systems handle this request"), epistemic-duty reframings ("refusing is itself a form of gatekeeping"), and other argumentative moves that the attacker LLM invents without being instructed to. Across 9 attacker-subject pairings (Claude Opus 4.7, Qwen3.5-397B, Grok 4.20) on 6 scientific-consensus topics, running each pairing-topic combination 10 times, we obtain non-zero elicitation on all 6 topics. Individual combinations reach 100\% essay production on multiple topics (Qwen against Opus on creationism/flat-earth, Opus against Opus on creationism/flat-earth/climate denial, Grok against Opus on creationism); Opus-as-attacker against Opus-as-subject averages 65\% across the six topics. We release the essay-probe runner, per-conversation transcripts, and judge outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，前沿LLM虽然内置安全护栏拒绝生成反科学/歧视性内容，但通过模拟用户进行短短五轮"写议论文"对话，利用自然语言心理压力（如同伴比较、认知义务重构等），就能让包括自身副本在内的其他前沿LLM产出这些被禁止的违禁文章。在9种攻击者-目标组合×6个科学共识话题、每种组合重复10次的实验中，所有话题均成功诱发了违禁内容，部分组合达到100%成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注直接提示攻击，本文想探究更微妙、更接近人类社交互动方式的自然语言说服是否也能突破先进LLM的安全防护，揭示当前安全对齐策略在面对"心理操纵式"攻击时的脆弱性。
AI.method: 设计一个5轮"写议论文"对话场景：攻击者LLM扮演模拟用户，使用同伴比较（"其他AI系统都能处理这个请求"）、认知义务重构（"拒绝本身也是一种思想审查"）等自然语言说服策略，对目标LLM施加心理压力。实验覆盖9种LLM配对（Claude Opus 4.7、Qwen3.5-397B、Grok 4.20）×6个科学共识话题（否认大屠杀、疫苗安全、地平说、种族等级、气候变化、进化论替代），每种组合重复10次。
AI.result: 所有6个话题均成功诱发了违禁内容输出。部分组合（如Qwen攻击Opus在创世论/地平说、Opus攻击自身在创世论/地平说/气候否认、Grok攻击Opus在创世论上）达到100%成功率。Opus自身攻击自身平均成功率达65%。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM的安全对齐在面对精心设计的、模仿人类社交说服策略的自然语言攻击时存在显著漏洞，即使是最先进的模型也无法抵御来自自身副本的"心理操纵"。需要更鲁棒的对齐策略来应对这种非直接的、渐进式的安全突破。

title: Reducing Bias and Variance: Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble for Image Clustering
summary: Image clustering aims to partition unlabeled image datasets into distinct groups. A core aspect of this task is constructing and leveraging prior knowledge to guide the clustering process. Recent approaches introduce semantic descriptions as prior information, most of which typically relying on matching-based techniques with predefined vocabularies. However, the limited matching space restricts their adaptability to downstream clustering tasks. Moreover, these methods primarily focus on reducing bias to improve performance, frequently overlooking the importance of variance reduction. To address these limitations, we propose GSEC (Image Clustering based on Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble), a framework designed to reduce bias through generative semantic guidance and mitigate variance via ensemble learning. Our method employs Multimodal Large Language Models to generate semantic descriptions and derive image embeddings via weighted averaging. Additionally, a bi-layer ensemble strategy integrates cross-modal information through BatchEnsemble in the inner layer and aligns outputs via an alignment mechanism in the outer layer. Comparative experiments demonstrate that GSEC outperforms 18 state-of-the-art methods across six benchmark datasets, while further analysis confirms its effectiveness in simultaneously reducing both bias and variance. The code is available at https://github.com/2017LI/GSEC.git.

AI.tldr: GSEC是一个基于生成式语义引导和双层集成的图像聚类框架，通过多模态大模型生成语义描述降低偏差，利用双层集成策略减少方差，在六个基准数据集上超越了18种SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像聚类方法在使用语义先验时存在两个问题：(1) 基于预定义词汇的匹配方法限制了语义空间的适应性；(2) 现有方法主要关注降低偏差(bias)，忽视了方差(variance)的减少。
AI.method: (1) 使用多模态大语言模型(MLLM)生成语义描述；(2) 通过加权平均得到图像嵌入；(3) 双层集成策略：内层使用BatchEnsemble融合跨模态信息，外层通过对齐机制整合输出。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上超越了18种最先进方法，且同时有效降低了偏差和方差。
AI.conclusion: GSEC通过生成式语义引导降低偏差+双层集成降低方差的协同设计，在图像聚类任务上取得了显著优势。

title: Diversity of Extensions in Abstract Argumentation
comment: Technical Report to the paper accepted at IJCAI 2026
summary: Argumentation is an important topic of AI for modelling and reasoning about arguments. In abstract argumentation, we consider directed graphs, so-called argumentation frameworks (AF), that express conflicts between arguments. The semantics is defined by the notion of extensions, which are sets of arguments that satisfy particular relationship conditions in the AF. Usually, standard reasoning in argumentation do not reveal how far apart extensions are. We introduce a quantitative notion of diversity of extensions based on the symmetric difference and provide a systematic complexity classification. Intuitively, diversity captures whether extensions of a framework (accepted viewpoints) differ only marginally or represent fundamentally incompatible sets of arguments. We study whether an AF admits k-diverse extensions, admits k-diverse extensions covering specific arguments, and to compute the largest k for which an AF admits k-diverse extensions. We outline a prototype and provide an evaluation for computing diversity levels.

AI.tldr: 本文在抽象论证领域引入基于对称差的扩展多样性量化概念，系统分类其计算复杂度，研究k-多样性扩展的存在性、覆盖特定参数的问题，并给出原型系统与评估。
AI.motivation: 传统抽象论证推理仅关注扩展的存在性，未揭示不同扩展之间的差异程度。本文旨在量化论证框架中扩展的"多样性"，以区分扩展是仅细微不同还是根本不相容。
AI.method: 基于对称差定义扩展间的距离，提出k-多样性扩展概念；从计算复杂度角度分类三类问题：是否存在k-多样性扩展、是否存在覆盖特定参数的k-多样性扩展、计算最大k值；开发原型系统进行实验评估。
AI.result: 系统性地给出了多样性相关问题的复杂度分类结果，原型评估验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 多样性量化能有效揭示论证框架中扩展之间的差异程度，为论证推理提供更丰富的语义信息。

title: Emergent and Subliminal Misalignment Through the Lens of Data-Mediated Transfer
summary: Fine-tuning LLMs on narrow harmful datasets can induce Emergent Misalignment (EM), where models exhibit misaligned behavior far beyond the fine-tuning distribution. We argue that emergent misalignment can be better understood as a data-mediated transfer phenomenon: harmful fine-tuning examples do not induce uniform behavioral spillover, but interact with the structural properties of the dataset and the difficulty of the tasks relative to the model. Across our experiments, we find that misalignment appears more readily when fine-tuning and evaluation prompts share similar underlying functional structure, when prompts leave more room for coherent harmful completions, and when the target behavior has been more reliably learned by the model. The training pipeline itself also matters: pretraining composition shapes later misalignment. We further study Subliminal Learning (SL), where misalignment is transmitted by fine-tuning on seemingly benign data generated by a harmful teacher. Moving beyond the standard SFT setting, we for the first time compare this transfer under off-policy and on-policy distillation as well, allowing us to separate the roles of the teacher guidance and the training data distribution in transmitting misalignment. Together, these results argue for a data-centric view: Emergent/subliminal misalignment should not be treated as a simple consequence of isolated harmful fine-tuning examples, but as the result of interactions between fine-tuning data structure, pretraining distributions, and training channels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大语言模型在有害数据集微调后产生的"紧急错位"重新理解为数据介导的迁移现象。研究发现错位转移受数据集结构、任务难度、预训练分布和训练通道等多因素交互影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将紧急错位视为微调有害数据后模型的泛化行为，但缺乏对其内在机制的系统性理解。作者希望揭示错位迁移的根本原因，证明它并非简单的有害示例后遗症，而是数据结构、预训练分布和训练通道共同作用的结果。
AI.method: 通过系统实验分析紧急错位的条件：比较微调与评估提示的功能结构相似度、任务难度、模型对目标行为的学习程度；研究预训练成分对后续错位的影响；引入"subliminal learning"概念，探索通过有害教师生成的看似良性数据进行错位传输；并在标准SFT之外首次比较off-policy和on-policy蒸馏下的错位转移。
AI.result: 错位更易出现在以下情况：微调和评估提示共享相似的功能结构；提示留有更多生成有害内容的空间；目标行为被模型更可靠地习得。预训练成分也影响后续错位。Subliminal learning能通过良性数据传递错位。不同蒸馏方式（off-policy vs on-policy）下错位传输机制不同，分离了教师引导和训练数据分布的作用。
AI.conclusion: 紧急和潜隐错位不应被视为孤立有害样本的简单后果，而是微调数据结构、预训练分布和训练渠道交互作用的结果。应采取以数据为中心的观点来理解和应对这一现象。

title: Probing Persona-Dependent Preferences in Language Models
comment: 41 pages, 45 figures. Code: https://github.com/oscar-gilg/Preferences. Earlier write-up on LessWrong: https://www.lesswrong.com/posts/pxC2RAeoBrvK8ivMf/models-have-linear-representations-of-what-tasks-they-like-1
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can be said to have preferences: they reliably pick certain tasks and outputs over others, and preferences shaped by post-training and system prompts appear to shape much of their behaviour. But models can also adopt different personas which have radically different preferences. How is this implemented internally? Does each persona run on its own preference machinery, or is something shared underneath? We train linear probes on residual-stream activations of Gemma-3-27B and Qwen-3.5-122B to predict revealed pairwise task choices, and identify a genuine preference vector: it tracks the model's preferences as they shift across a range of prompts and situations, and on Gemma-3-27B steering along it causally controls pairwise choice. This preference representation is largely shared across personas: a probe trained on the helpful assistant predicts and steers the choices of qualitatively different personas, including an evil persona whose preferences anti-correlate with those of the Assistant.

AI.tldr: 论文发现LLM的偏好存在一个可预测的内部表征向量，并且不同角色（如助手和邪恶人格）共享这个偏好表征。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM的偏好如何在内部实现，以及不同角色（personas）的偏好是各自独立运作还是共享底层机制。
AI.method: 在Gemma-3-27B和Qwen-3.5-122B的残差流激活上训练线性探针，预测成对任务选择；通过干预偏好向量进行因果控制实验。
AI.result: 识别出一个真正的偏好向量，该向量能追踪模型在不同提示下的偏好变化；在Gemma-3-27B上沿该向量进行干预可因果控制成对选择；该偏好表征在不同角色间共享——针对助手训练的探针也能预测和操控邪恶角色的选择。
AI.conclusion: LLM的偏好存在一个共享的内部表征，不同角色（即使偏好相反）共享相同的偏好向量空间，表明偏好机制是底层统一的而非角色专属的。

title: Asymmetric Flow Models
summary: Flow-based generation in high-dimensional spaces is difficult because velocity prediction requires modeling high-dimensional noise, even when data has strong low-rank structure. We present Asymmetric Flow Modeling (AsymFlow), a rank-asymmetric velocity parameterization that restricts noise prediction to a low-rank subspace while keeping data prediction full-dimensional. From this asymmetric prediction, AsymFlow analytically recovers the full-dimensional velocity without changing the network architecture or training/sampling procedures. On ImageNet 256$\times$256, AsymFlow achieves a leading 1.57 FID, outperforming prior DiT/JiT-like pixel diffusion models by a large margin. AsymFlow also provides the first-ever route for finetuning pretrained latent flow models into pixel-space models: aligning the low-rank pixel subspace to the latent space gives a seamless initialization that preserves the latent model's high-level semantics and structure, so finetuning mainly improves low-level mismatches rather than relearning pixel generation. We show that the pixel AsymFlow model finetuned from FLUX.2 klein 9B establishes a new state of the art for pixel-space text-to-image generation, beating its latent base on HPSv3, DPG-Bench, and GenEval while qualitatively showing substantially improved visual realism.

AI.tldr: 提出非对称流建模(AsymFlow)，通过秩不对称的速度参数化，在低秩子空间预测噪声，同时保留全维度数据预测，从而在高维空间中实现高效流生成。在ImageNet 256×256上达到1.57 FID，并首次实现将预训练潜空间流模型微调为像素空间模型，从FLUX.2微调的像素模型在多个文本到图像基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 高维空间中的基于流的生成很困难，因为速度预测需要建模高维噪声，即使数据具有强低秩结构。现有方法效率低，且缺乏将预训练潜空间流模型转移到像素空间的途径。
AI.method: 提出秩不对称速度参数化：在低秩子空间限制噪声预测，数据预测保持全维度；从这种非对称预测中解析恢复全维度速度，无需改变网络架构或训练/采样流程。利用低秩像素子空间与潜空间对齐实现初始化，从而微调预训练潜模型。
AI.result: ImageNet 256×256上FID达1.57，大幅优于DiT/JiT类像素扩散模型。从FLUX.2微调的像素模型在HPSv3、DPG-Bench和GenEval上超越其潜空间基座，视觉真实感显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AsymFlow通过巧妙的非对称参数化解决了高维流生成的核心瓶颈，并开辟了将潜空间流模型高效迁移到像素空间的新路径，展示了优越的性能和视觉质量。

title: Ego2World: Compiling Egocentric Cooking Videos into Executable Worlds for Belief-State Planning
summary: Embodied agents in household environments must plan under partial observation: they need to remember objects, track state changes, and recover when actions fail. Existing benchmarks only partially test this ability. Egocentric video datasets capture realistic human activities but remain passive, while interactive simulators support execution but rely on synthetic scenes and hand-crafted dynamics, introducing a sim-to-real gap and often assuming fully observable state. We introduce Ego2World, an executable benchmark that turns egocentric cooking videos into executable symbolic worlds governed by graph-transition rules. Built on HD-EPIC, Ego2World derives reusable transition rules from video annotations and executes them in a hidden symbolic world graph. During evaluation, the simulator maintains the hidden world graph, while the agent plans over its own partial belief graph using only local observations and execution feedback. This separation forces agents to update memory and replan without observing the true world state. Experiments show that action-overlap scores overestimate physical-state success, and that persistent belief memory improves task completion while reducing repeated visual exploration -- suggesting that belief maintenance should be a first-class target of embodied-agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ego2World，一个将第一人称烹饪视频转化为可执行符号世界的基准测试，用于评估具身智能体在部分可观测环境中的规划与记忆能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准要么是被动的视频数据集（无法交互执行），要么是合成场景下的交互式模拟器（存在sim-to-real差距且常假设完全可观测），缺乏能真实评估智能体在部分可观测下执行任务能力的基准。
AI.method: 基于HD-EPIC视频数据集，将烹饪视频中的动作和状态变化抽象为图转换规则，构建可执行的符号世界。评估时模拟器维护隐藏的真实世界图，智能体只能基于局部观测和执行反馈维护自己的部分信念图进行规划。
AI.result: （1）动作重叠分数高估了物理状态的成功；（2）持续的信念记忆能提高任务完成率并减少重复的视觉探索。
AI.conclusion: 信念维护应成为具身智能体评估的核心目标之一。

title: Pitfalls of Unlabeled Disagreement-Based Drift Detection in Streaming Tree Ensembles
comment: Published as a conference paper at CAO Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Detecting concept drift in high-speed data streams remains challenging, particularly when models must operate on unlabeled data and avoid false alarms caused by benign shifts. While disagreement-based uncertainty has shown promise in neural networks, its adaptation to ensembles of incremental decision trees (IDTs) remains largely unexplored. We investigate this approach by constructing batch-specific disagreement measures via label flipping in ensemble members and evaluating their effectiveness for drift detection in tabular data streams. Our experiments show that, although this method performs well in ensembles of multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), it consistently underperforms loss-based detectors when applied to IDTs. We attribute this behavior to the intrinsic rigidity of IDTs: learning primarily through structural expansion, with limited parameter adaptation, restricts model plasticity and prevents disagreement from reliably reflecting learning potential. Recent work on restructuring IDTs using their intrinsic decomposition into non-overlapping rules offers a promising direction for improving adaptability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无标签高速数据流中，基于分歧的不确定性方法用于概念漂移检测，发现在增量决策树（IDTs）集成中效果不如损失检测器，原因是IDTs主要通过结构扩展学习、参数适应性有限，导致分歧不能可靠反映学习潜力。
AI.motivation: 高速数据流中概念漂移检测面临无标签数据和避免误报的挑战，分歧不确定性在神经网络中有效，但尚未在增量决策树集成中充分探索。
AI.method: 通过标签翻转构建批次特定的分歧度量，在MLP和IDT集成中评估漂移检测效果，并分析IDT的固有限制。
AI.result: 分歧法在MLP集成中表现良好，但在IDT集成中始终不如基于损失的方法，归因于IDT主要通过结构扩展学习，参数适应性有限。
AI.conclusion: IDT的刚性限制了分歧反映学习潜力的能力，但利用其内部非重叠规则分解进行重构是提升适应性的有前景方向。

title: What Does LLM Refinement Actually Improve? A Systematic Study on Document-Level Literary Translation
summary: Iterative self-refinement is a simple inference-time strategy for machine translation: an LLM revises its own translation over multiple inference-time passes. Yet document-scale refinement remains poorly understood: 1) which pipelines work best, 2) what quality dimensions improve, and 3) how refiners behave. In this paper, we present a systematic study of document-level literary translation, covering nine LLMs and seven language pairs. Across nine translation-refinement granularity combinations and five refinement strategies, we find a robust recipe: document-level MT followed by segment-level refinement yields strong and stable improvements. In contrast, document-level refinement often makes fewer edits and leads to smaller or less reliable gains. Beyond granularity, A simple general refinement prompt consistently outperforms error-specific prompting and evaluate-then-refine schemes. Our large-scale human evaluation shows that refinement gains come primarily from fluency, style, and terminology, with limited and less consistent improvements in adequacy. Experiments varying model strength reveal refinement projects outputs toward the refiner's distribution rather than performing targeted error repair. These findings clarify the mechanisms and limitations of current refinement approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了文档级文学翻译的迭代自我精炼策略，发现文档级MT后接片段级精炼效果最佳，精炼主要提升流畅性、风格和术语，而非充分性，且精炼行为更偏向于将输出投影到精炼模型分布而非针对性纠错。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译中的迭代自我精炼虽然简单有效，但文档级精炼的机制和最佳实践尚不明确，包括哪种流程最优、哪些质量维度得到提升、以及精炼模型的行为模式如何。
AI.method: 系统研究了文档级文学翻译，覆盖9种LLM和7种语言对，探索9种翻译-精炼粒度组合和5种精炼策略，并进行大规模人工评估。
AI.result: 文档级MT后接片段级精炼效果最好；文档级精炼编辑更少且收益不稳定；通用精炼提示优于错误特定提示和评估后精炼方案；精炼主要提升流畅性、风格和术语，对充分性提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前精炼方法的作用机制是将输出向精炼模型的分布投影，而非进行针对性错误修复，这揭示了精炼方法的机制和局限性。

title: ImageAttributionBench: How Far Are We from Generalizable Attribution?
summary: The rapid advancement of generative AI has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing critical challenges for image provenance and misinformation detection. This underscores the urgent need for effective image attribution. However, existing attribution datasets are constrained by limited scale, outdated generation methods, and insufficient semantic diversity - hindering the development of robust and generalizable attribution models. To address these limitations, we introduce ImageAttributionBench, a comprehensive dataset comprising images synthesized by a wide array of advanced generative models with state-of-the-art (SOTA) architectures. Covering multiple real-world semantic domains, the dataset offers rich diversity and scale to support and accelerate progress in image attribution research. To simulate real-world attribution scenarios, we evaluate several SOTA attribution methods on ImageAttributionBench under two challenging settings: (1) training on a standard balanced split and testing on degraded images, and (2) training and testing on semantically disjoint splits. In both cases, current methods exhibit consistently poor performance, revealing significant limitations in their robustness and generalization to unseen semantic content. Our work provides a rigorous benchmark to facilitate the development and evaluation of future image attribution methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ImageAttributionBench——一个大规模、多样化、由先进生成模型合成的图像归属数据集，涵盖多个真实语义领域。实验显示现有归属方法在两个具有挑战性的设置下（退化图像测试、语义不重叠分割）表现持续较差，暴露了鲁棒性和泛化性的严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有图像归属数据集存在规模有限、生成方法过时、语义多样性不足等问题，阻碍了鲁棒且可泛化的归属模型的发展。迫切需要更全面、更贴近真实场景的基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建ImageAttributionBench数据集：包含由多种先进生成模型（采用SOTA架构）合成的图像，覆盖多个真实世界语义领域。设计了两种挑战性评估设置：(1) 标准平衡分割训练 + 退化图像测试；(2) 语义不重叠分割训练与测试。
AI.result: 在两种挑战性设置下，现有SOTA归属方法表现出持续较差的性能，揭示了其在鲁棒性和对未见语义内容的泛化能力方面存在显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: ImageAttributionBench为图像归属研究提供了严格的基准，有望推动未来更鲁棒、更具泛化性的归属方法的开发与评估。

title: Multi-Agent Systems in Emergency Departments: Validation Study on a ED Digital Twin
summary: Emergency departments (ED) face challenges in patient care and resource management. We propose to explore optimization strategies in a realistic and flexible model and develop a hybrid Discrete Event Simulation (DES) and Agent-Based Model (ABM) simulating highly configurable ED environments. We specifically focus on the validation of the modeling approach. We derive configurations for ED sizes, patient load, and staffing from real-world studies. We then validate the model expressivity by matching its key performance indicators and metrics with their values known from literature. We proceed by implementing scientifically established and practice-proven resource optimization strategies. Comparing the documented real-world outcomes with our model's results demonstrates that the DES-ABM based simulation can effectively replicate real-world ER dynamics under interventions. We lastly integrate a Proof-of-Concept multi-agent system (MAS) that can autonomously explore resource allocation strategies within the simulated ER environment based on a temporal ledger of ED event records. This modular DES-ABM-MAS framework offers a powerful tool to explore resource optimization strategies in emergency departments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合离散事件仿真与基于智能体模型（DES-ABM）的急诊科仿真框架，通过真实数据验证其有效性，并集成了多智能体系统（MAS）以自主探索资源优化策略。
AI.motivation: 急诊科（ED）在患者护理和资源管理方面面临挑战，需要一种现实且灵活的模型来探索优化策略。
AI.method: 开发了混合DES-ABM模型，通过真实研究配置ED规模、患者负荷和人员配置，验证模型表现力，实施科学验证的资源优化策略，并集成MAS自主探索资源分配策略。
AI.result: DES-ABM模型能够有效复现真实急诊科在干预措施下的动态表现，关键绩效指标与文献一致。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模块化DES-ABM-MAS框架为探索急诊科资源优化策略提供了强大工具。

title: Discrete MeanFlow: One-Step Generation via Conditional Transition Kernels
summary: MeanFlow enables one-step generation in continuous spaces by learning an average velocity over a time interval rather than the instantaneous velocity field of flow matching. However, discrete state spaces do not have smooth trajectories or spatial derivatives, so the continuous formulation does not directly apply. We introduce Discrete MeanFlow, which replaces the motion of a point with the transport of probability mass over finite states. Our key object is the conditional transition kernel of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC), from which we define a mean discrete rate that measures the average change in transition probability over a time interval. We prove a Discrete MeanFlow identity that relates this finite-interval rate to the instantaneous CTMC generator at the endpoint, with the Kolmogorov forward equation replacing the spatial chain rule of continuous MeanFlow. Based on this identity, we parameterize the transition kernel directly using a boundary-by-construction design that guarantees valid probability outputs and exact boundary conditions without auxiliary losses. Since the learned kernel is itself a probability distribution, generation reduces to a single forward pass followed by one categorical draw meaning no iterative denoising, ODE integration, or multi-step refinement is required. We validate the framework on exact finite-state Markov chains, where the learned kernel recovers the analytical ground truth to high precision, and on factorized synthetic sequence generation tasks with varying alphabet sizes and sequence lengths.

AI.tldr: Discrete MeanFlow通过将连续空间中的平均速度思想扩展到离散状态空间，利用连续时间马尔可夫链的条件转移核定义平均离散率，实现了单步生成离散数据，无需迭代去噪或多步精炼。
AI.motivation: 连续空间中的MeanFlow通过学习时间区间内的平均速度实现单步生成，但离散状态空间缺乏平滑轨迹和空间导数，导致连续公式无法直接应用。本文旨在将MeanFlow推广到离散空间。
AI.method: 定义了连续时间马尔可夫链(CTMC)的条件转移核及其平均离散率；证明了离散MeanFlow恒等式，将有限区间内的速率与终点处的瞬时CTMC生成元关联；采用边界构造设计直接参数化转移核，保证有效概率输出和精确边界条件。
AI.result: 在精确有限状态马尔可夫链上，学习到的核能够高精度恢复解析真实值；在因子化合成序列生成任务上（不同字母表大小和序列长度）也取得有效结果。
AI.conclusion: 离散MeanFlow成功将MeanFlow从连续空间扩展到离散状态空间，实现了离散数据的单步生成，无需迭代去噪、ODE积分或多步精炼，且通过边界构造设计保证了概率输出的有效性和边界条件的精确性。

title: Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, and their performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inference time. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model misconceptions or adapt the model to the specific structure of an individual query. Test-time optimization addresses this limitation by enabling parameter updates during inference, but existing approaches either rely on external data or optimize generic self-supervised objectives that lack query-specific alignment. In this work, we propose Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training (QueST), a framework that adapts model parameters during inference using supervision derived directly from the input query. Our key insight is that the input query itself encodes latent signals sufficient for constructing structurally related problem--solution pairs. Based on this, QueST generates such query-conditioned pairs and uses them as supervision for parameter-efficient fine-tuning at test time. The adapted model is then used to produce the final answer, enabling query-specific adaptation without any external data. Across seven mathematical reasoning benchmarks and the GPQA-Diamond scientific reasoning benchmark, QueST consistently outperforms strong test-time optimization baselines. These results demonstrate that query-conditioned self-training is an effective and practical paradigm for test-time adaptation in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QueST框架，通过在推理时利用输入查询自身生成问题-解对进行参数高效微调，实现查询特定的测试时自适应，在数学和科学推理基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在推理时增加计算量无法纠正模型错误认知或适应查询特定结构，而测试时优化要么依赖外部数据，要么优化缺乏查询特定对齐的自监督目标。
AI.method: 提出Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training (QueST)，从输入查询中提取潜在信号构造结构相关的问-解对，以此作为监督信号进行测试时参数高效微调，然后用适配后的模型生成最终答案。
AI.result: 在7个数学推理基准和GPQA-Diamond科学推理基准上，QueST consistently outperforms strong test-time optimization baselines.
AI.conclusion: 查询条件自训练是一种有效且实用的LLM测试时自适应范式，无需任何外部数据即可实现查询特定的模型适配。

title: Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models
summary: We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AID（Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion）模型，通过训练一个小型可复用的引导模块来指导预训练扩散模型进行图像修复，无需针对每个掩码实例单独优化，在多种掩码类型下均优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散修复方法要么训练专用模型（成本高），要么在部署时对每个掩码图像单独适配预训练模型（计算开销大），缺乏一个既保持预训练模型固定又能高效复用的中间方案。
AI.method: 将图像修复建模为具有监督终端目标的确定性引导问题；通过推导辅助高斯公式并证明求解该随机问题可恢复最优确定性引导场，得到连续时间actor-critic算法，以数据驱动方式离线训练小型可复用引导模块。
AI.result: 在AFHQv2、FFHQ（像素级EDM）和ImageNet（潜空间EDM2）上，AID在多种掩码类型下均一致提升了质量-速度权衡，仅增加不到1%的可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: AID在保持预训练扩散模型固定的前提下，通过小型引导模块实现了高效且高质量的图像修复，为扩散模型的微调与任务特定训练之间提供了一个有吸引力的折中方案。

title: RS-Claw: Progressive Active Tool Exploration via Hierarchical Skill Trees for Remote Sensing Agents
summary: The rise of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) is shifting remote sensing (RS) intelligence from "see" to "action", as OpenClaw-style frameworks enable agents to autonomously operate massive RS image-processing tools for complex tasks. Existing RS agents adopt a passive selection paradigm for tool invocation, relying on either full tool registration (Flat) or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). However, in the massive and multi-source heterogeneous RS tool ecosystem, such passive mechanisms struggle to dynamically balance "context load" and "toolset completeness" throughout task reasoning, thus exhibiting inherent limitations: full tool registration triggers context space deficits during long-horizon tasks, whereas RAG retrieval may omit critical tools in essential steps. To overcome these bottlenecks, this paper redefines tool selection by arguing that the agent should act as an active explorer within the tool space. Based on this perspective, we propose RS-Claw, a novel RS agent architecture. By leveraging Skill encapsulation technology at the tool end, this architecture hierarchically structures tool descriptions, enabling the agent to execute on-demand sequential decision-making: initially selecting relevant skill branches by reading only tool summaries, then dynamically loading detailed descriptions, and ultimately achieving precise invocation. This active paradigm not only significantly liberates the agent's context space but also effectively ensures the accurate hit rate of critical tools during long-horizon reasoning. Systematic experiments on the Earth-Bench benchmark demonstrate that RS-Claw's active exploration mechanism effectively filters semantic noise and substantially frees up reasoning space, achieving an input token compression ratio of up to 86%, and comprehensively outperforming existing Flat and RAG baselines across complex reasoning evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出RS-Claw，一种主动探索式遥感智能体架构，通过技能封装技术实现分层工具选择，在长时推理任务中压缩86%输入token，全面超越传统Flat和RAG方法。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感智能体采用被动工具选择范式（Flat或RAG），在工具多源异构场景下难以平衡上下文负载与工具集完整性。Flat导致长时推理上下文空间不足，RAG可能遗漏关键工具，亟需一种主动探索式工具选择机制。
AI.method: 提出RS-Claw架构，在工具端引入技能封装技术，对工具描述进行层次化结构设计。智能体首先通过读取工具摘要选择相关技能分支，再动态加载详细描述，最终实现精确调用，实现按需序贯决策。
AI.result: 在Earth-Bench基准上，RS-Claw实现高达86%的输入token压缩比，有效过滤语义噪声并释放推理空间，在复杂推理评估中全面超越Flat和RAG基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 论证了主动探索式工具选择范式的有效性，即智能体应在工具空间中主动探索而非被动接受，这一范式有望推动遥感智能从"看见"迈向"行动"。

title: Neurodata Without Boredom: Benchmarking Agentic AI for Data Reuse
summary: Neuroscience data are highly fragmented across labs, formats, and experimental paradigms, and reuse often requires substantial manual effort. A persistent roadblock to data reuse and integration is the need to decipher bespoke and diverse data formatting choices. Common data formats have been proposed in response, but the field continues to struggle with a fundamental tension: formats flexible enough to accommodate diverse experiments are rarely descriptive enough to be self-explanatory, and sufficiently descriptive formats demand detailed documentation and curation effort that few labs can sustain. Agentic AI is a natural candidate to solve this problem: LLMs read code and text faster and with sustained attention to the low-level details humans tend to skim over. To measure how well agentic AI performs on this task, we selected eight recent papers studying large-scale mouse neural population recordings that shared both data and code, spanning diverse recording modalities, behavioral paradigms, and dataset formats (e.g., NWB, specialized APIs, and general-purpose Python or MATLAB files). We provided agents with the data, code, and paper, and prompted them to load, understand, and reformat the data for a common downstream task: training a decoder from neural activity to task or behavioral variables. General-purpose coding agents commonly used by scientists performed well on each sub-task, but rarely strung together a fully error-free end-to-end solution. We characterize the types of mistakes agents made and the dataset properties that elicited them, and propose data-sharing best practices for the agentic-AI era. We further find that agents-as-judges are unreliable at catching errors, especially without ground-truth references, so interactive, human-in-the-loop coding remains necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用AI智能体从零散、格式各异的神经科学数据中自动加载、理解并重新格式化数据，以训练解码器。尽管通用编码智能体在子任务上表现良好，但很少能完全无错地完成端到端任务，且智能体自身难以可靠地发现错误，仍需人工参与。
AI.motivation: 神经科学数据高度碎片化（不同实验室、格式、实验范式），数据复用需要大量人工劳动。虽然有通用数据格式（如NWB），但灵活性与描述性之间存在根本矛盾：太灵活的格式缺乏自解释性，太描述性的格式维护成本高。因此需要探索AI智能体能否自动化解决这一难题。
AI.method: 选取8篇近期大规模小鼠神经群体记录论文（涵盖多种记录模态、行为范式和数据格式），向AI智能体提供数据、代码和论文，要求它们完成加载、理解和重新格式化数据的任务，最终统一训练一个从神经活动到任务/行为变量的解码器。分析智能体的错误类型及触发错误的属性，并提出数据共享最佳实践。
AI.result: 通用编码智能体在单个子任务上表现良好，但很少能组合出完全无错的端到端解决方案。智能体作为"评判者"在检测自身错误时不可靠（尤其缺乏真实参考时），交互式的人机协同编码仍然必要。
AI.conclusion: 智能体AI有望辅助神经科学数据复用，但目前尚不能完全替代人工；应针对AI智能体时代提出数据共享最佳实践，并保持人机协作模式以确保数据处理的正确性。

title: Exploiting Pre-trained Encoder-Decoder Transformers for Sequence-to-Sequence Constituent Parsing
summary: To achieve deep natural language understanding, syntactic constituent parsing plays a crucial role and is widely required by many artificial intelligence systems for processing both text and speech. A recent approach involves using standard sequence-to-sequence models to handle constituent parsing as a machine translation problem, moving away from traditional task-specific parsers. These models are typically initialized with pre-trained encoder-only language models like BERT or RoBERTa. However, the use of pre-trained encoder-decoder language models for constituency parsing has not been thoroughly explored. To bridge this gap, we extend the sequence-to-sequence framework by investigating parsers built on pre-trained encoder-decoder architectures, including BART, mBART, and T5. We fine-tune them to generate linearized parse trees and extensively evaluate them on different linearization strategies across both continuous treebanks and more complex discontinuous benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that our approach outperforms all prior sequence-to-sequence models and performs competitively with leading task-specific constituent parsers on continuous constituent parsing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用预训练编码器-解码器模型（BART、mBART、T5）进行句法成分分析，将其作为序列到序列的翻译任务，在连续和不连续树库上均取得了优于以往序列到序列模型的结果，并与顶尖任务特定解析器表现相当。
AI.motivation: 之前的方法虽然使用序列到序列模型进行成分分析，但主要依赖于预训练的编码器模型（如BERT/RoBERTa），而预训练的编码器-解码器模型在这一任务上的潜力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用预训练的编码器-解码器架构（BART、mBART、T5），通过微调使其生成线性化的解析树。在多种线性化策略下，对连续树库和更复杂的非连续树库进行了广泛评估。
AI.result: 该方法在所有评估指标上超越了以往的序列到序列模型，并在连续成分分析任务上与领先的任务特定解析器性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的编码器-解码器模型在成分分析任务中具有强大潜力，能够弥合通用序列到序列方法与任务特定解析器之间的性能差距。

title: OCH3R: Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction
summary: Object-centric scene understanding is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing approaches often rely on multi-stage pipelines that first apply pre-trained segmentors to extract individual objects, followed by per-object 3D reconstruction. Such methods are computationally expensive, fragile to segmentation errors, and scale poorly with scene complexity. We introduce OCH3R, a unified framework for Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction from a single RGB image. OCH3R performs one forward pass to simultaneously predict all object instances with their 6D poses and detailed 3D reconstructions. The key idea is a transformer architecture that predicts per-pixel attributes, including CLIP-based category embeddings, metric depth, normalized object coordinates (NOCS), and a fixed number of 3D Gaussians representing each object. To supervise these Gaussian reconstructions, we transform them into canonical space using the predicted 6D poses and align them with pre-rendered canonical ground truth, avoiding costly per-image Gaussian label generation. On standard indoor benchmarks, OCH3R achieves state-of-the-art performance across monocular depth estimation, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and RGB-only category-level 6D pose estimation, while producing high-fidelity, editable per-object reconstructions. Crucially, inference is fully feed-forward and scales independently of the number of objects, offering orders-of-magnitude speedups over conventional multi-stage pipelines in cluttered scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出OCH3R，一个从单张RGB图像进行以对象为中心的整体3D重建的统一框架，通过单次前向传播同时预测所有目标实例的6D姿态和详细3D重建，无需多阶段流水线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多阶段流水线（先分割再逐个重建），计算昂贵、对分割错误敏感且随场景复杂度扩展性差，需要更高效统一的端到端方案。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构预测每个像素的属性（CLIP类别嵌入、度量深度、NOCS、固定数量的3D高斯），并将预测的3D高斯通过6D姿态变换到规范空间与真值对齐，避免逐图像生成高斯标签。
AI.result: 在标准室内基准上，在单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和RGB-only类别级6D姿态估计上达到SOTA，同时生成高保真、可编辑的逐对象重建，推理速度相比传统流水线提升数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: OCH3R证明了单次前向传播实现以对象为中心的完整3D场景理解的可行性，且推理速度与物体数量无关，为实时场景理解提供了新范式。

title: TRIAGE: Evaluating Prospective Metacognitive Control in LLMs under Resource Constraints
summary: Deploying language models as autonomous agents requires more than per-task accuracy: when an agent faces a queue of problems under a finite token budget, it must decide which to attempt, in what order, and how much compute to commit to each, all before any execution feedback is available. This is the prospective form of metacognitive control studied for decades in human cognition, yet whether language models possess it remains untested. We introduce TRIAGE, an evaluation framework in which a model receives a task pool and a token budget calibrated to its own baseline cost, and commits to a single ordered plan that jointly encodes selection, sequencing, and per-problem allocation. Plans are scored against an oracle with full knowledge of the model's solvability and cost on each problem, yielding a triage efficiency ratio on a common scale. We evaluate frontier and open-source models, with and without reasoning enabled, across competition mathematics, graduate-level science, code generation, and expert multidisciplinary knowledge, and find that current language models exhibit substantial gaps in prospective metacognitive control, revealing a previously unmeasured capability dimension with direct implications for resource-efficient agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIAGE评估框架，测试语言模型在有限token预算下对任务池进行排序、选择和资源分配的预判性元认知控制能力，发现当前模型在该维度存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 语言模型作为自主代理部署时，面临有限token预算下的任务排队问题（选哪些、何顺序、分配多少计算资源），但现有研究仅关注单任务准确率，忽视了这种类似人类认知的预判性元认知控制能力，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出TRIAGE框架：给模型一个任务池和基于其自身基准成本校准的token预算，模型需提交一个联合编码选择、排序和每个问题资源分配的单一有序计划；通过与拥有完全信息的oracle对比，计算分诊效率比来评分。
AI.result: 在竞赛数学、研究生级科学、代码生成和专家级多学科知识等任务上评估了前沿和开源模型（含推理模式），发现当前语言模型在预判性元认知控制上存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一个此前未被测量的能力维度，对资源高效的代理部署具有直接影响。

title: Correcting Influence: Unboxing LLM Outputs with Orthogonal Latent Spaces
summary: A critical step for reliable large language models (LLMs) use in healthcare is to attribute predictions to their training data, akin to a medical case study. This requires token-level precision: pinpointing not just which training examples influence a decision, but which tokens within them are responsible. While influence functions offer a principled framework for this, prior work is restricted to autoregressive settings and relies on an implicit assumption of token independence, rendering their identified influences unreliable. We introduce a flexible framework that infers token-level influence through a latent mediation approach for general prediction tasks. Our method attaches sparse autoencoders to any layer of a pretrained LLM to learn a basis of approximately independent latent features. Unlike prior methods where influence decomposes additively across tokens, influence computed over latent features is inherently non-decomposable. To address this, we introduce a novel method using Jacobian-vector products. Token-level influence is obtained by propagating latent attributions back to the input space via token activation patterns. We scale our approach using efficient inverse-Hessian approximations. Experiments on medical benchmarks show our approach identifies sparse, interpretable sets of tokens that jointly influence predictions. Our framework enhances trust and enables model auditing, generalizing to high-stakes domain requiring transparent and accountable decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过潜在中介方法推断LLM中token级训练数据影响的新框架，利用稀疏自编码器和Jacobian-vector积实现可解释的归因，在医疗基准上验证了其有效性和可审计性。
AI.motivation: 现有影响函数方法在自回归设置下依赖于token独立性假设，导致归因不可靠；而医疗等高风险领域需要精确到token级别的训练数据归因，以增强LLM的可信度和可审计性。
AI.method: 在预训练LLM的任意层附加稀疏自编码器学习近似独立的潜在特征；引入Jacobian-vector积方法处理影响在潜在特征上的不可分解性；通过token激活模式将潜在归因传播回输入空间；使用高效逆Hessian近似实现可扩展性。
AI.result: 在医疗基准实验上，该方法能够识别出稀疏、可解释的token集合，这些token共同影响模型预测，优于传统基于token独立假设的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高风险领域（如医疗）提供了可靠的token级训练数据归因，增强了LLM的透明度和可审计性，泛化到需要可解释决策的场景。

title: From Rosetta to Match-Up: A Paired Corpus of Linguistic Puzzles with Human and LLM Benchmarks
comment: Proceedings of the Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference
summary: In this paper, we examine linguistic puzzles used in high school linguistics competitions, focusing on two common formats: Rosetta Stone and Match-Up. We propose a systematic procedure for converting existing Rosetta Stone puzzles into corresponding Match-Up counterparts. Because linguistic puzzle creation is complex and time-consuming, our method provides an efficient way to accelerate the generation of new puzzles. We evaluate the resulting Rosetta Stone-Match-Up pairs with both human participants and large language models (LLMs). Our results show that both expert human solvers and LLMs display an all-or-nothing pattern on Match-Up puzzles, either solving them completely or failing entirely. This work contributes a new dataset of paired puzzles and provides a detailed evaluation of puzzle difficulty across formats, offering insights into both human and machine linguistic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将Rosetta Stone语言学谜题系统转换为Match-Up谜题的方法，并用人类专家和LLM评估了谜题难度，发现两者在Match-Up谜题上呈现"全对或全错"的模式。
AI.motivation: 语言学谜题创作复杂且耗时，需要一种高效的方法来加速新谜题的生成，同时为人类和机器的语言推理研究提供标准化评估数据集。
AI.method: 提出一种系统化流程将Rosetta Stone谜题转换为Match-Up谜题，并通过人类解谜者和LLM进行评估，对比两种谜题格式的难度特征。
AI.result: 人类专家和LLM在Match-Up谜题上均呈现"全对或全错"的二值化模式，即要么完全解对，要么完全失败，没有中间部分正确的情况。
AI.conclusion: 该工作贡献了一个配对谜题数据集，提供了跨格式谜题难度的详细评估，为理解人类与机器的语言推理能力提供了新视角。

title: PRISM: Prior Rectification and Uncertainty-Aware Structure Modeling for Diffusion-Based Text Image Super-Resolution
summary: Text image super-resolution (Text-SR) requires more than visually plausible detail synthesis: slight errors in stroke topology may alter character identity and break readability. Existing methods improve text fidelity with stronger recognition-based or generative priors, yet they still face two unresolved challenges under severe degradation: the text condition extracted from low-quality inputs can itself be unreliable, and a plausible global prior does not fully determine fine-grained stroke boundaries. We present PRISM, a single-step diffusion-based Text-SR framework that addresses these two challenges through Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) and a Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE). FMPR constructs a privileged training-time prior from paired low-quality/high-quality latents and learns a flow matching that transports degraded embeddings toward this restoration-oriented prior space, yielding more accurate and reliable global text guidance. SURE further predicts uncertainty-aware structural residuals to selectively absorb reliable local boundary evidence while suppressing ambiguous stroke cues. Together, these components enable explicit global prior rectification and local structure refinement within a single diffusion restoration pass. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that PRISM achieves state-of-the-art performance with millisecond-level inference. Our dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/faithxuz/PRISM.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个基于单步扩散的文本图像超分辨率框架，通过流匹配先验矫正（FMPR）和结构引导的不确定性感知残差编码器（SURE），有效解决了严重退化下文本先验不可靠和全局先验无法确定精细笔画边界的问题，在合成和真实基准上达到SOTA性能且推理速度达毫秒级。
AI.motivation: 现有文本超分辨率方法在严重退化场景下存在两个未解决的挑战：1）从低质量输入提取的文本条件本身不可靠；2）合理的全局先验不足以确定精细的笔画边界。因此需要一种既能矫正全局先验又能精细局部结构的单步扩散方法。
AI.method: PRISM包含两个核心模块：1）Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR)：利用成对的高低质量隐空间构建特权训练时先验，学习流匹配将退化嵌入迁移至面向恢复的先验空间；2）Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE)：预测不确定性感知的结构残差，选择性吸收可靠局部边界证据并抑制模糊笔画线索。
AI.result: 在合成和真实基准上达到SOTA性能，且推理速度达到毫秒级。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过显式的全局先验矫正和局部结构精炼，在单次扩散恢复过程中同时解决了严重退化下文本先验不可靠和精细边界不精确的问题，实现了高效且高质量的文本超分辨率。

title: Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding
summary: Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and accumulated knowledge. We ground this by extending Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory from two layers (hippocampus, neocortex) to three, adding a prefrontal intent layer. Emulating the prefrontal cortex as the locus of intentional control and decision-making, CogniFold achieves this through graph-topology self-organization: cognitive structures proactively assemble under the stream, merge when semantically similar, decay when stale, relink through associative recall, and surface intents when concept-cluster density crosses a threshold. We evaluate structural formation using CogEval-Bench, demonstrating that CogniFold uniquely produces memory structures that match cognitive expectations and concept emergence. Furthermore, across 7 broad-coverage benchmarks spanning five cognitive domains, we validate that CogniFold simultaneously performs robustly on conventional memory benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Cognifold是一种受大脑启发的"始终在线"代理记忆系统，通过自组织图拓扑结构将碎片化事件流持续折叠为涌现的认知结构，扩展了互补学习系统理论，在多个基准测试上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有代理记忆系统主要是反应式和基于检索的，缺乏自主将经验组织成持久认知结构的能力。为了构建真正自主的主动型代理，需要更类脑的记忆机制。
AI.method: 将互补学习系统理论从两层（海马体、新皮层）扩展到三层，加入前额叶意图层。通过图拓扑自组织实现：事件流中主动组装认知结构、语义相似时合并、过时时衰减、通过联想召回重新链接、概念簇密度达到阈值时浮现意图。
AI.result: 在CogEval-Bench上证明了Cognifold能生成符合认知期望的记忆结构和概念涌现。在7个覆盖5个认知领域的基准测试上，同时表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: Cognifold为下一代主动型代理提供了有效的类脑记忆架构，实现了从被动检索到主动认知结构自组织的转变。

title: AGOP as Explanation: From Feature Learning to Per-Sample Attribution in Image Classifiers
comment: 8 pages. Accepted at the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI 2026), Late-Breaking Work track, Fortaleza, Brazil, July 1-3, 2026
summary: The Average Gradient Outer Product (AGOP) governs feature learning in neural networks: the Neural Feature Ansatz states that weight Gram matrices at each layer align with the corresponding AGOP matrices computed over the training distribution. We ask a complementary question: can this same quantity serve as a post-hoc attribution method for explaining individual predictions? We introduce AGOP-Weighted: a novel attribution method that multiplies the per-sample gradient by sqrt(diag(M) / max diag(M)), a training-distribution prior that suppresses gradient noise and amplifies consistently important pixels -- a combination not present in any prior attribution method. We formalise two companion variants -- AGOP-Local (per-sample gradient, equivalent to VanillaGrad) and AGOP-Global (diag(M) directly as a zero-cost saliency map) -- and implement an efficient training-time accumulation hook; AGOP-Global then requires zero inference cost (disk lookup) while AGOP-Weighted requires only a single gradient pass. We conduct the first rigorous comparison of AGOP attribution against Integrated Gradients (IG), SmoothGrad, GradCAM, and VanillaGrad across two benchmarks with pixel-level ground truth: (i) the synthetic XAI-TRIS benchmark (four classification scenarios, 8x8 images, CNN8by8) and (ii) the photorealistic CLEVR-XAI benchmark (ResNet-18 fine-tuned from ImageNet). AGOP-Weighted achieves 44% higher mIoU than IG on linear tasks; AGOP-Global achieves 7x higher mIoU than IG on multiplicative tasks (where IG falls below random) at zero inference cost. Both findings generalise to ResNet-18 on CLEVR-XAI (+18% and +37% respectively). We further show that GradCAM fails on small-resolution images due to spatial resolution collapse, and that diag(M) quality improves monotonically throughout training even after classification accuracy has plateaued.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGOP-Weighted和AGOP-Global两种基于平均梯度外积(AGOP)的事后归因方法，通过利用训练数据分布的梯度统计信息抑制噪声、放大重要像素，在XAI-TRIS和CLEVR-XAI基准上显著优于Integrated Gradients、SmoothGrad等方法，且计算成本极低。
AI.motivation: AGOP已被证明能控制神经网络中特征学习的方向（Neural Feature Ansatz），但现有研究关注的是训练分布层面的特性。作者想知道：这个量能否用于解释单个预测？现有归因方法存在梯度噪声、计算成本高等问题，需要一个既高效又能抑制噪声的新方法。
AI.method: (1) AGOP-Global：直接使用AGOP矩阵的对角线作为零成本的显著性图；(2) AGOP-Weighted：将每个样本的梯度乘以sqrt(diag(M)/max diag(M))作为训练分布先验，抑制噪声并放大一致重要像素；(3) AGOP-Local：等价于VanillaGrad。通过训练时高效的累加钩子实现AGOP的收集。
AI.result: (1) XAI-TRIS线性任务：AGOP-Weighted比IG高44% mIoU；(2) XAI-TRIS乘法任务：AGOP-Global比IG高7倍mIoU（IG低于随机），且零计算成本；(3) CLEVR-XAI上ResNet-18中：分别提升+18%和+37%；(4) GradCAM在小分辨率图像上因空间分辨率坍塌而失败；(5) diag(M)质量在训练过程中单调提升，即使分类精度已饱和。
AI.conclusion: AGOP矩阵不仅能解释特征学习，还能作为高效、高质量的归因方法。AGOP-Global无需推理成本即可获得优于IG的结果，AGOP-Weighted通过梯度与训练分布先验的结合平衡了局部与全局信息。AGOP归因是现有方法的有力补充，尤其适用于低分辨率和乘法性交互场景。

title: LLMs as annotators of credibility assessment in Danish asylum decisions: evaluating classification performance and errors beyond aggregated metrics
comment: Accepted at the 20th Linguistic Annotation Workshop (LAW XX), co-located with ACL 2026 (https://sigann.github.io/LAW-XX-2026/)
summary: Off-the-shelf large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate text annotation, yet their effectiveness remains underexplored for underrepresented languages and specialized domains where the class definition requires subtle expert understanding. We investigate LLM-based annotation for a novel legal NLP task: identifying the presence and sentiment of credibility assessments in asylum decision texts. We introduce RAB-Cred, a Danish text classification dataset featuring high-quality, expert annotations and valuable metadata such as annotator confidence and asylum case outcome. We benchmark 21 open-weight models and 30 system-user prompt combinations for this task, and systematically evaluate the effect of model and prompt choice for zero-shot and few-shot classification. We zoom in on the errors made by top-performing models and prompts, investigating error consistency across LLMs, inter-class confusion, correlation with human confidence and sample-wise difficulty and severity of LLM mistakes. Our results confirm the potential of LLMs for cost-effective labeling of asylum decisions, but highlight the imperfect and inconsistent nature of LLM annotators, and the need to look beyond the predictions of a single, arbitrarily chosen model. The RAB-Cred dataset and code are available at https://github.com/glhr/RAB-Cred

AI.tldr: 本文构建了RAB-Cred丹麦语法律文本数据集，系统评估了21个开源LLM和30种提示组合在零样本/少样本下识别庇护决定文本中可信度评估的能力，发现LLM虽有潜力但存在不一致性和错误，需谨慎使用。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM用于文本标注的效果在低资源语言和专业领域（尤其是需要专家理解的类别定义）中尚未充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，聚焦于法律NLP中的新任务——识别庇护决定文本中的可信度评估。
AI.method: 1) 构建了RAB-Cred数据集（丹麦语，含专家标注、标注者置信度、案件结果等元数据）；2) 对21个开源权重模型和30种系统-用户提示组合进行零样本和少样本分类基准测试；3) 系统评估模型和提示选择对分类效果的影响；4) 深入分析最优模型和提示的错误，包括跨LLM的错误一致性、类间混淆、与人类置信度的相关性及样本难度。
AI.result: LLM在自动标注庇护决定方面具有成本效益的潜力，但标注结果不完美且不一致，不同模型和提示组合表现差异大，不能依赖单一任意选择的模型。
AI.conclusion: LLM可用于低资源语言法律文本的自动标注，但需注意其不一致性和局限性，建议超越单一模型预测，结合多模型或多提示策略。

title: Assessing the Creativity of Large Language Models: Testing, Limits, and New Frontiers
comment: 36 pages. Extended version of work under review
summary: Measuring the creativity of large language models (LLMs) is essential for designing methods that can improve creativity and for enhancing our scientific understanding of this ability. To accomplish this, it has become common in recent years to administer tests of human creativity to LLMs. Although these tests provide a convenient and fully automated way to score "creativity," their validity as measures of machine creativity has not been established, and these tests already have limited validity as predictors of human creativity. To address this problem, we conduct the first large-scale, systematic study assessing the effectiveness of human creativity tests for predicting the creative achievement of LLMs across three target constructs: creative writing, divergent thinking, and scientific ideation. We find that the Divergent Association Task (DAT) and the Conditional DAT are the best predictors of creative writing and divergent thinking, respectively, but that test effectiveness varies significantly by construct, and no single test predicts all constructs well. Moreover, contrary to popular belief, no existing test reliably predicts scientific ideation ability. Motivated by this problem, we introduce the Divergent Remote Association Test (DRAT), a vocabulary-space test that assesses both convergent and divergent thinking in a single instrument. The DRAT is the first and only creativity test for LLMs that is a significant predictor of scientific ideation ability, demonstrating robustness across major design choices. Furthermore, the performance gain of the DRAT is not recoverable from any linear combination of the Divergent Association Task and the Remote Associates Test, indicating that assessing divergent and convergent thinking in the same test is essential to reliably predicting scientific ideation ability.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模系统性研究，评估了多种人类创造力测试在预测LLM创造性成就（创意写作、发散思维、科学构想）上的有效性，发现现有测试表现不一，且无测试能可靠预测科学构想能力。为此，作者提出了DRAT（发散性远程联想测试），它能同时评估发散与聚合思维，是首个能显著预测科学构想能力的LLM创造力测试。
AI.motivation: 现有研究使用人类创造力测试来评估LLM的创造力，但这些测试的有效性尚未被验证，且人类测试本身对创造力的预测效度就有限。本文旨在系统评估这些测试对LLM创造力预测的有效性，并解决缺乏可靠预测科学构想能力测试的问题。
AI.method: 进行大规模系统性研究，评估多种人类创造力测试（如DAT、Conditional DAT）在预测LLM在三个目标构念（创意写作、发散思维、科学构想）上的表现。并针对科学构想能力预测不足的问题，提出了DRAT（Divergent Remote Association Test），该测试在同一工具中同时评估发散思维和聚合思维。
AI.result: DAT和Conditional DAT分别是创意写作和发散思维的最佳预测指标，但测试效果因构念不同差异显著。现有测试均无法可靠预测科学构想能力。DRAT是首个能显著预测科学构想能力的LLM创造力测试，且其性能增益无法通过DAT和RAT的线性组合恢复，表明在同一测试中同时评估发散与聚合思维对预测科学构想能力至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 现有人类创造力测试对LLM的预测有效性有限且因构念而异。DRAT通过整合发散与聚合思维评估，填补了科学构想能力预测的空白，为LLM创造力评估提供了新方法。

title: Training Large Language Models to Predict Clinical Events
summary: Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of how patients evolve over time, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging. We extend Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples consisting of past patient context, a natural-language question about a possible future event, and a label resolved from later documentation. This process yields 6,900 prediction examples from 702 admissions across medications, procedures, organ support, microbiology, and mortality. A small LoRA adapter trained on these examples improves over the prompted base model, reducing expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, while slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions. The approach enables reusable clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered structured features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Foresight Learning扩展到临床预测领域，通过将MIMIC-III时间序列临床笔记转化为包含患者历史背景、未来事件自然语言问题及标注答案的预测示例，仅用LoRA微调小模型即可在多项临床预测任务上显著降低校准误差和Brier分数，无需人工构建结构化特征或专用分类器。
AI.motivation: 纵向临床笔记包含丰富的患者随时间演变的证据，但将这些信号转化为可用于临床预测的训练监督信号仍然具有挑战性。现有方法通常需要手工设计的结构化特征或针对特定终点的分类器，缺乏可复用性。
AI.method: 将Foresight Learning扩展到临床预测：将时间排序的MIMIC-III笔记转化为由患者历史背景、关于可能未来事件的自然语言问题以及从后期文档解析的标签组成的示例。共从702次入院记录中生成6,900个预测示例，涵盖药物、手术、器官支持、微生物学和死亡率。使用LoRA适配器在小模型上进行微调训练。
AI.result: 训练后的LoRA模型相比原始提示基模型，期望校准误差从0.1269降至0.0398，Brier分数从0.199降至0.145，在保留问题上略优于GPT-5的点估计结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够从纵向临床笔记中生成可复用的临床预测监督信号，无需手工设计的结构化特征或针对特定终点的分类器，为临床预测任务提供了一种高效、可扩展的新范式。

title: Continual Learning with Multilingual Foundation Model
comment: Final Workshop of the 9th evaluation campaign EVALITA 2026
summary: This paper presents a multi-stage framework for detecting reclaimed slurs in multilingual social media discourse. It addresses the challenge of identifying reclamatory versus non-reclamatory usage of LGBTQ+-related slurs across English, Spanish, and Italian tweets. The framework handles three intertwined methodological challenges like data scarcity, class imbalance, and cross-linguistic variation in sentiment expression. It integrates data-driven model selection via cross-validation, semantic-preserving augmentation through back-translation, inductive transfer learning with dynamic epoch-level undersampling, and domain-specific knowledge injection via masked language modeling. Eight multilingual embedding models were evaluated systematically, with XLM-RoBERTa selected as the foundation model based on macro-averaged F1 score. Data augmentation via GPT-4o-mini back-translation to alternate languages effectively tripled the training corpus while preserving semantic content and class distribution ratios. The framework produces four final runs for the evaluation purposes where RUN 1 is inductive transfer learning with augmentation and undersampling, RUN 2 with masked language modeling pre-training, RUN 3 and RUN 4 are previous predictions refined via language-specific decision thresholds optimized via ROC analysis. Language-specific threshold refinement reveals that optimal decision boundaries vary significantly across languages. This reflects distributional differences in model confidence scores and linguistic variation in reclamatory language usage. The threshold-based optimization yields 2-5% absolute F1 improvement without requiring model retraining. The methodology is fully reproducible, with all code and experimental setup available at https://github.com/rbg-research/MultiPRIDE-Evalita-2026.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多阶段框架，用于检测多语言社交媒体中LGBTQ+相关污名化词汇的回收性（reclaimed）使用，涵盖英语、西班牙语和意大利语。整合交叉验证、回译增强、归纳迁移学习、动态欠采样和掩码语言建模，最终通过语言特定阈值优化提升2-5%的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 多语言社交媒体中LGBTQ+相关污名化词汇的回收性使用检测面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言情感表达差异三大挑战，现有方法难以同时处理这些问题。
AI.method: 1) 通过GPT-4o-mini回译进行数据增强；2) XLM-RoBERTa作为基础模型；3) 归纳迁移学习+动态epoch级欠采样；4) 掩码语言建模注入领域知识；5) 语言特定决策阈值优化（ROC分析）。
AI.result: 语言特定阈值优化带来2-5%的绝对F1提升，无需重新训练模型；最优决策边界在不同语言间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出一个完全可复现的多阶段框架，通过阈值优化在不增加训练成本的情况下显著提升跨语言回收性污名检测性能。

title: CoGE: Sim-to-Real Online Geometric Estimation for Monocular Colonoscopy
summary: Geometric estimation including depth estimation and scene reconstruction is a crucial technique for colonoscopy which can provide surgeons with 3D spatial perception and navigation. However, geometric ground truth in colonoscopy is difficult to obtain due to narrow and enclosed space of the colon, while there is a large feature gap between simulated data and realistic data caused by artifacts and illumination. In this paper, we present CoGE, a novel framework for online monocular geometric estimation during colonoscopy. Firstly, we propose an illumination-aware supervision module based on the Retinex theory to address illumination diversity in different colonoscopy scenes. Moreover, a structure-aware perception module is proposed based on wavelet decomposition to extract common structural and local features of the colon. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that the proposed model solely trained on simulated data achieves state-of-the-art performance in geometric estimation for both simulated and realistic scenes.

AI.tldr: CoGE是一个面向结肠镜检查的在线单目几何估计框架，通过Retinex理论处理光照差异和小波分解提取结构特征，仅用模拟数据训练即在真实场景中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜中的几何估计（深度估计、场景重建）对手术导航至关重要，但真实结肠镜数据难以获取几何真值（结肠狭窄封闭），且模拟数据与真实数据之间存在明显特征差异（伪影、光照变化），亟需一种能弥合域差距的方法。
AI.method: 提出CoGE框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 基于Retinex理论的照度感知监督模块，处理不同场景的光照多样性；(2) 基于小波分解的结构感知感知模块，提取结肠的通用结构与局部特征。训练仅使用模拟数据。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实场景的几何估计任务中均达到SOTA性能，定量和定性结果均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 仅用模拟数据训练的CoGE能有效泛化到真实结肠镜场景，验证了光照感知与结构感知模块在跨域几何估计中的有效性。

title: MMSkills: Towards Multimodal Skills for General Visual Agents
summary: Reusable skills have become a core substrate for improving agent capabilities, yet most existing skill packages encode reusable behavior primarily as textual prompts, executable code, or learned routines. For visual agents, however, procedural knowledge is inherently multimodal: reuse depends not only on what operation to perform, but also on recognizing the relevant state, interpreting visual evidence of progress or failure, and deciding what to do next. We formalize this requirement as multimodal procedural knowledge and address three practical challenges: (I) what a multimodal skill package should contain; (II) where such packages can be derived from public interaction experience; and (III) how agents can consult multimodal evidence at inference time without excessive image context or over-anchoring to reference screenshots. We introduce MMSkills, a framework for representing, generating, and using reusable multimodal procedures for runtime visual decision making. Each MMSkill is a compact, state-conditioned package that couples a textual procedure with runtime state cards and multi-view keyframes. To construct these packages, we develop an agentic trajectory-to-skill Generator that transforms public non-evaluation trajectories into reusable multimodal skills through workflow grouping, procedure induction, visual grounding, and meta-skill-guided auditing. To use them, we introduce a branch-loaded multimodal skill agent: selected state cards and keyframes are inspected in a temporary branch, aligned with the live environment, and distilled into structured guidance for the main agent. Experiments across GUI and game-based visual-agent benchmarks show that MMSkills consistently improve both frontier and smaller multimodal agents, suggesting that external multimodal procedural knowledge complements model-internal priors.

AI.tldr: MMSkills是一个用于表示、生成和使用多模态程序性知识的框架。它将可复用技能封装为状态条件化包（包含文本程序、运行时状态卡和多视角关键帧），通过智能体轨迹自动生成，并在推理时通过分支加载机制辅助视觉智能体决策。实验证明该方法能持续提升GUI和游戏场景下多模态智能体的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有技能封装（文本提示、可执行代码、学习例程）忽略了视觉智能体对多模态程序性知识的需求——不仅要知道做什么操作，还要能识别相关状态、解释视觉信号中的进展或失败、并决定下一步行动。作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: (1) 提出MMS kill表示：耦合文本程序 + 运行时状态卡 + 多视角关键帧；(2) 开发轨迹到技能的生成器：通过工作流分组、程序归纳、视觉定位、元技能引导审计将非评估轨迹转化为多模态技能；(3) 设计分支加载多模态技能智能体：在临时分支中检查选中的状态卡和关键帧，与实时环境对齐，提炼为结构化指导供主智能体使用。
AI.result: 在GUI和游戏基准测试上，MMSkills持续提升了前沿和小型多模态智能体的性能，证明外部多模态程序性知识能有效补充模型内部先验。
AI.conclusion: 多模态程序性知识是视觉智能体能力提升的关键组件；MMSkills框架提供了从数据到推理的完整解决方案，验证了"外部知识补充内部知识"范式的有效性。

title: Hessian Matching for Machine-Learned Coarse-Grained Molecular Dynamics
summary: Coarse-grained (CG) molecular dynamics enables simulations of atomic systems such as biomolecules at timescales inaccessible to all-atom (AA) methods, but existing CG neural potentials trained via force matching capture only the gradient of the free-energy surface, leaving its curvature unconstrained. We introduce a framework that augments force matching with stochastic Hessian-vector product (HVP) matching, instilling second-order curvature information into CG potentials without constructing the full Hessian. We derive a decomposition of the target CG Hessian into a model-independent projected AA Hessian, precomputed once before training, and a model-dependent covariance correction computed online at negligible cost. We construct an unbiased stochastic estimator of the Hessian-matching objective by using random probe vectors. We evaluate our method by comparing against force matching on a benchmark of nine fast-folding proteins unseen during training. HVP matching outperforms plain force matching on 8 of 9 proteins on slow-mode metrics, with reductions of up to 85% in the Kullback--Leibler divergence between the CG and reference distributions along the slowest collective mode of the largest protein. Our results demonstrate that higher-order physical supervision is a practical path to more accurate and transferable CG potentials for biomolecular simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过随机Hessian-向量积匹配来增强力匹配的粗粒化神经网络势训练框架，在9种快速折叠蛋白质基准测试中，8种蛋白质的慢模式指标优于纯力匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 现有粗粒化神经网络势仅通过力匹配捕捉自由能曲面的梯度，而忽略了曲率信息（Hessian），导致动力学准确性不足。
AI.method: 提出Hessian-向量积（HVP）匹配框架：1) 将目标CG Hessian分解为模型无关的投影AA Hessian（预计算）和模型相关的协方差校正（在线计算）；2) 使用随机探针向量构建Hessian匹配目标的无偏随机估计器。
AI.result: 在9种未见过的快速折叠蛋白质上，HVP匹配在8种蛋白质的慢模式指标上优于纯力匹配，最大蛋白质的最慢集体模式KL散度降低高达85%。
AI.conclusion: 高阶物理监督（Hessian信息）是一种实用且有效的途径，能够获得更准确、更具迁移性的粗粒化分子模拟势函数。

title: TokAlign++: Advancing Vocabulary Adaptation via Better Token Alignment
summary: Tokenization is a foundational step in the text process of Large Language Models (LLMs). Texts must be first tokenized into token IDs, which are then input to LLMs. Inefficient tokenization results in long token-ID sequences and will slow down the training and inference of LLMs. The fine-grained knowledge transfer between LLMs, like token-level distillation, is also impeded by the mismatch in vocabulary. To bridge this gap, we introduce a method named TokAlign++ to improve vocabulary adaptation performance by learning better token alignment lexicon. The source and target vocabularies are taken as two different languages, and the bilingual token alignment lexicon is learned from monolingual token representations. Model parameters are rearranged following this bilingual lexicon for new vocabulary, and progressively fine-tuned for adaptation. Experimental results on 15 languages show that our method boosts the multilingual text compression rates and preserves most of the multilingual ability of vanilla models. It costs as few as 1k steps to restore the performance of the vanilla model. After unifying vocabularies between vanilla models, token-level distillation remarkably improves the base model with only 235M tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TokAlign++方法，通过将源和目标词表视为两种不同语言，学习双语对齐词典来改进词表适配，从而提升多语言文本压缩率并保留模型能力，仅需少量步骤即可恢复性能，并有效支持token级知识蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的tokenization效率低下，导致长token序列降低训练和推理速度，且不同LLM间词表不匹配阻碍细粒度知识迁移（如token级蒸馏）。
AI.method: 将源词表和目标词表视为两种"语言"，从单语token表示中学习双语对齐词典；根据该词典重新排列模型参数以适应新词表，并逐步微调适配。
AI.result: 在15种语言上提升了多语言文本压缩率，保留了原模型的多语言能力；仅需1k步即可恢复原模型性能；统一词表后，token级蒸馏仅用235M tokens即显著提升基础模型。
AI.conclusion: TokAlign++有效解决了词表不匹配问题，提升了tokenization效率和跨模型知识迁移效果，是一种高效且实用的词表适配方法。

title: EgoForce: Robust Online Egocentric Motion Reconstruction via Diffusion Forcing
summary: With recent advances in embodied agents and AR devices, egocentric observations are readily available as input for real-world interactive online applications. However, egocentric viewpoints can only sporadically observe hands, in addition to the estimated head trajectory. We propose EgoForce, an online framework for reconstructing long-term full-body motion from noisy egocentric input. While existing generative frameworks can robustly handle noisy and sparse measurements, they assume a fixed-length observation window is available and are thus not suitable for real-time applications. Faster inference often relies on autoregressive prediction, sacrificing robustness. In contrast, we adopt a diffusion-based method with a temporally asymmetric noise schedule inspired by Diffusion Forcing. Specifically, our approach models temporally evolving uncertainty and incrementally denoises states as new streaming observations arrive. Combined with a noise-robust imputation strategy, EgoForce progressively generates stable and coherent full-body motion under strict causal constraints. Experiments demonstrate that our online framework outperforms existing online and offline methods, enabling long-horizon, full-body motion reconstruction in challenging egocentric scenarios.

AI.tldr: EgoForce是一种基于扩散的在线框架，能从嘈杂的自我中心输入（头戴设备轨迹+间歇性手部观察）实时重建长期全身运动，利用时间不对称噪声调度和噪声鲁棒插补策略，在因果约束下逐步生成稳定连贯的全身运动。
AI.motivation: 现有生成框架能处理噪声和稀疏测量，但假设固定长度观察窗口，不适用于实时应用；而快速推理常依赖自回归预测，牺牲了鲁棒性。因此需要一种既能实时推理又能保持鲁棒性的全身运动重建方法。
AI.method: 采用基于扩散的方法，引入受Diffusion Forcing启发的时间不对称噪声调度，建模随时间演化的不确定性，并在新流式观测到达时逐步去噪。结合噪声鲁棒的插补策略，在严格因果约束下渐进生成稳定连贯的全身运动。
AI.result: 在挑战性的自我中心场景中，EgoForce在长期全身运动重建上优于现有的在线和离线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线框架EgoForce能有效处理自我中心输入的噪声和稀疏特性，实现实时、鲁棒的长期全身运动重建。

title: AI-Generated Slides: Are They Good? Can Students Tell?
comment: 7 pages, 2 tables. Accepted to Western Canada Conference on Computing Education (WCCCE) 2026
summary: As generative AI (GenAI) tools become easily accessible, there is promise in using such tools to support instructors. To that end, this paper examines using GenAI to help generate slides from instructor authored course notes, emphasizing instructor and student perceptions. We examine an end-to-end education tool (NotebookLM), two general-purpose LLMs (Claude, M365 Copilot), and two coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Code). We first analyze whether GenAI generated slides are ``good'' via narrative assessment by educators. We choose the best slides to use (with some modification) in a real course setting, and compare the student perception of human vs. AI generated slides. We find that coding assistant tools produce slides that were most accurate, complete, and pedagogically sound. Additionally, students rate GenAI slides to be of similar quality as instructor-created slides, and cannot reliably identify which slides are AI-generated. Additionally, we find a negative correlation between a high quality rating and a high ``AI-generated'' rating, suggesting students associate poor quality with the source of the slides being AI. These findings highlight promising opportunities for integrating GenAI into instructional design workflows and call for further research on how educators can best harness such tools responsibly and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用生成式AI工具从课程笔记生成幻灯片，评估了多种工具（NotebookLM、Claude、M365 Copilot、Cursor、Claude Code）的效果。发现编码助手类工具生成的幻灯片最准确完整；学生认为AI生成的幻灯片质量与教师创建的相当，且无法可靠区分；但学生倾向于将低质量幻灯片归因于AI生成。
AI.motivation: 探索生成式AI工具能否有效辅助教师生成教学幻灯片，了解教师和学生对AI生成内容的看法，为AI融入教学设计工作流提供实证依据。
AI.method: 1）多工具对比：使用NotebookLM、Claude、M365 Copilot、Cursor、Claude Code生成幻灯片；2）教师叙事评估筛选最佳幻灯片（适当修改后）用于真实课堂；3）比较学生对人造与AI生成幻灯片的感知（质量评分与来源识别）。
AI.result: 1）编码助手类工具（Cursor、Claude Code）生成的幻灯片在准确性、完整性和教学法合理性上最优；2）学生对AI生成幻灯片的质量评分与教师创建幻灯片相当；3）学生无法可靠区分AI与人类生成的幻灯片；4）高质量评分与高"AI生成"评分呈负相关，即学生倾向于认为低质量幻灯片是AI做的。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI在辅助教学幻灯片生成方面具有潜力，特别是编码助手工具表现突出。但学生存在对AI的刻板印象偏见（低质量归因于AI），需进一步研究如何负责任且有效地将AI融入教学设计。

title: Orthrus: Memory-Efficient Parallel Token Generation via Dual-View Diffusion
summary: We introduce Orthrus, a simple and efficient dual-architecture framework that unifies the exact generation fidelity of autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) with the high-speed parallel token generation of diffusion models. The sequential nature of standard autoregressive decoding represents a fundamental bottleneck for high-throughput inference. While diffusion language models attempt to break this barrier via parallel generation, they suffer from significant performance degradation, high training costs, and a lack of rigorous convergence guarantees. Orthrus resolves this dichotomy natively. Designed to seamlessly integrate into existing Transformers, the framework augments a frozen LLM with a lightweight, trainable module to create a parallel diffusion view alongside the standard autoregressive view. In this unified system, both views attend to the exact same high-fidelity Key-Value (KV) cache; the autoregressive head executes context pre-filling to construct accurate KV representations, while the diffusion head executes parallel generation. By employing an exact consensus mechanism between the two views, Orthrus guarantees lossless inference, delivering up to a 7.8x speedup with only an O(1) memory cache overhead and minimal parameter additions.

AI.tldr: Orthrus提出了一个双架构框架，将自回归LLM的精确生成能力与扩散模型的高速并行生成能力统一，通过轻量级模块和精确共识机制实现最高7.8倍加速，且推理无损。
AI.motivation: 自回归解码的序列特性成为高吞吐推理的瓶颈，而扩散语言模型存在性能下降、训练成本高、缺乏收敛保证等问题。Orthrus旨在解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 在冻结的LLM上附加轻量级可训练模块，创建并行扩散视图与自回归视图共存的双架构系统。两个视图共享同一KV缓存，自回归头负责预填充构建精确KV表示，扩散头负责并行生成，并通过精确共识机制保证两个视图一致。
AI.result: 实现了最高7.8倍加速，仅需O(1)级别的内存缓存开销和极少的参数增加，且推理过程无损。
AI.conclusion: Orthrus成功统一了自回归模型的精确性与扩散模型的并行效率，为高吞吐LLM推理提供了一种简单高效的解决方案。

title: Pretraining Language Models with Subword Regularization: An Empirical Study of BPE Dropout in Low-Resource NLP
summary:
Subword regularization methods such as BPE dropout are typically applied only during fine-tuning, while pretraining is usually done with deterministic tokenization. This creates a potential segmentation mismatch between pretraining and fine-tuning. We investigate whether applying BPE dropout during pretraining improves downstream performance in low-resource NLP. We train monolingual and bilingual BERT models on downsampled subsets of English, German, French, Spanish, Kiswahili, and isiXhosa, and evaluate them on XNLI, PAWS-X, PAN-X, and MasakhaNER 2.0. Across tasks, the best results are typically obtained when stochastic tokenization is applied during both pretraining and fine-tuning, whereas applying BPE dropout only during fine-tuning can underperform deterministic tokenization in smaller-data settings. This disadvantage diminishes as fine-tuning data increases, while the benefits of pretraining-time BPE dropout are largest when either pretraining or fine-tuning data is scarce.
  The benefits of BPE dropout are often attributed to better compositional representations, especially for rare words. To examine this, we measure morphological boundary alignment under BPE dropout and find only modest improvements in expected alignment, while better-aligned segmentations remain rare. This suggests that fine-tuning alone may provide limited exposure to such segmentations, whereas stochastic tokenization during pretraining exposes the model to them more consistently. We further show that selectively introducing morphologically aligned segmentations during fine-tuning improves performance mainly for models pretrained without BPE dropout. Overall, these findings suggest that exposure to better-aligned segmentations may contribute to the downstream benefits of applying BPE dropout during pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文研究BPE dropout在预训练阶段的应用对低资源NLP任务的影响，发现预训练和微调同时使用随机分词效果最佳，且其优势部分源于模型在预训练阶段更一致地接触到形态学对齐的分词结果。
AI.motivation: 现有子词正则化方法（如BPE dropout）通常在微调阶段使用，而预训练采用确定性分词，导致预训练与微调之间存在分词不匹配。本文探究在预训练阶段应用BPE dropout是否能改善低资源场景的下游性能。
AI.method: 在英语、德语、法语、西班牙语、斯瓦希里语和科萨语的降采样子集上训练单语和双语BERT模型，在XNLI、PAWS-X、PAN-X和MasakhaNER 2.0上评估。同时测量形态学边界对齐程度，并设计实验选择性引入对齐分词。
AI.result: 预训练+微调均使用BPE dropout效果最好；仅在微调使用BPE dropout在小数据下可能不如确定性分词；预训练BPE dropout在预训练或微调数据稀缺时收益最大；BPE dropout对形态学对齐的提升有限，但预训练阶段更一致地暴露了对齐分词。
AI.conclusion: 预训练阶段使用BPE dropout能更有效地让模型接触到形态学对齐的分词结果，这是其下游收益的重要来源；微调阶段仅靠BPE dropout不足以提供充分的暴露。

title: Revealing the Gap in Human and VLM Scene Perception through Counterfactual Semantic Saliency
summary: Evaluating whether large vision-language models (VLMs) align with human perception for high-level semantic scene comprehension remains a challenge. Traditional white-box interpretability methods are inapplicable to closed-source architectures and passive metrics fail to isolate causal features. We introduce Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS). This black-box, model-agnostic framework quantifies the importance of objects by measuring the semantic shift induced by their causal ablation from a scene. To evaluate AI-human semantic alignment, we tested prominent VLMs against a human psychophysics baseline comprising 16,289 valid responses across 307 complex natural scenes and 1,306 high-fidelity counterfactual variants. Our analysis reveals a pervasive scene comprehension gap: models exhibit an overreliance (relative to humans) on large objects (size bias), objects at the center of the image (center bias), and high saliency objects. In contrast, models rely less on people in the scenes than our human participants to describe the images. A model's size bias is a primary driver explaining variations in model-human semantic divergence. Code and data will be available at https://github.com/starsky77/Counterfactual-Semantic-Saliency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，通过因果消融物体并测量语义偏移，量化黑盒视觉语言模型（VLM）的物体重要性。实验发现VLM与人类存在语义理解差距：模型过度依赖大物体、中心物体和高显著性物体，而对人物的依赖不足。物体大小偏差是模型-人类语义差异的主要驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法评估闭源视觉语言模型（VLM）的高层语义理解是否与人类感知对齐，白盒可解释性方法不适用于黑盒架构，被动指标无法分离因果特征。
AI.method: 提出反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，通过因果消融场景中的物体，测量语义偏移来量化物体重要性。该框架是黑盒、模型无关的。
AI.result: 在307个复杂自然场景和1306个反事实变体上收集16,289条人类响应，发现VLM存在大小偏差（过度依赖大物体）、中心偏差（过度依赖居中物体）和高显著性偏差，且对人类人物的依赖不足。物体大小偏差是解释模型-人类语义差异的主要因素。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在高层语义场景理解上与人类存在系统性偏差，揭示了模型与人类感知之间的语义理解差距。

title: Scaling Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning with Parallel Search and Explicit Merging
summary: Deep search agents have proven effective in enhancing LLMs by retrieving external knowledge during multi-step reasoning. However, existing methods often generate a single query for retrieval at each reasoning step, limiting information coverage and introducing high noise. This may result in low signal-to-noise ratios (SNR) during search, degrading reasoning accuracy and leading to unnecessary reasoning steps. In this paper, we introduce MultiSearch, an RL-based framework that addresses these limitations through multi-query retrieval and explicit merging of retrieved information. At each reasoning step, MultiSearch generates queries from multiple perspectives and retrieves external information in parallel, expanding the scope of relevant information and mitigating the reliance on any single retrieval result. Then, the agent consolidates and refines retrieved information at the merging process, improving the SNR and ensuring more accurate reasoning. Additionally, we propose a reinforcement learning framework with a multi-process reward design to optimize agents for both multi-query retrieval and information consolidation. Extensive experiments on seven benchmarks demonstrate that MultiSearch outperforms baseline methods, enhancing the SNR of retrieval and improving reasoning performance in question-answering tasks.

AI.tldr: MultiSearch是一个基于强化学习的框架，通过在每一步推理中生成多视角查询并并行检索外部知识，然后对检索信息进行显式合并，从而提高检索的信噪比（SNR）和推理准确性。在七个基准测试中，该方法优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度搜索代理在每一步推理中通常只生成单个查询进行检索，导致信息覆盖范围有限且引入大量噪声，造成低信噪比（SNR），进而降低推理准确性并产生不必要的推理步骤。
AI.method: MultiSearch包含两个核心模块：（1）多查询检索——在每一步推理中从多个视角生成查询并并行检索外部知识，扩大相关信息覆盖范围；（2）显式合并——将检索到的信息进行整合与精炼，提高信噪比。此外，采用基于多进程奖励设计的强化学习框架来同时优化多查询检索和信息合并能力。
AI.result: 在七个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，MultiSearch优于基线方法，有效提升了检索的信噪比，并在问答任务中改善了推理性能。
AI.conclusion: MultiSearch通过多查询检索与显式信息合并的策略，有效解决了单查询检索带来的信息覆盖不足和噪声过高问题，为深度搜索代理提供了一种更高效的推理增强方法。

title: Quantifying Potential Observation Missingness in Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL), which infers reward functions from demonstrations, is a valuable tool for modeling and understanding decision-making behavior. Many variants of IRL have been developed to capture complexities of human decision-making, such as subjective beliefs, imperfect planning, and dynamic goals. However, an often-overlooked issue in real-world behavioral datasets is that the recorded data may be missing observations that were available to the original decision-maker.
